name: NDRC
subject: Trump is having federal agents “monitor polls”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This is an attempt to intimidate voters and potentially a trial run for a bigger operation in the midterms.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118880570/581195792/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3NWZkNmRmLTM1YmMtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uFrSVjemtxGybhTDGu7lPnG9OIEwgbMD3WptyOtv0fc=&emci=8d6620f5-0abc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=f75fd6df-35bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, As voters in California and New Jersey cast their ballots on Tuesday, the Trump administration was on hand to "monitor" the polls — the latest example of this regime's weaponization of the Department of Justice and its undermining of the right to vote. This is becoming a part of the Republican playbook. Voter intimidation and false claims of voter fraud — all designed to undercut the will of the people. And make no mistake: This is part and parcel with their strategy in states like Texas, Missouri, and North Carolina to rig congressional maps so they can’t lose. We have to stand firm against these attacks on democracy. We must call this out loudly for what it is: An attempt to intimidate voters and, potentially, a trial run for a bigger intimidation operation in the 2026 midterms. [**Help us prepare for any attempt by extremists to silence voters’ voices — in map manipulation or beyond. Make a donation so the NDRC can continue fighting the Trump administration’s anti-democracy schemes.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118880571/581195793/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_VotingRightsAttacks_email_20251107-NDRC-Tier1-VotingRightsAttacks_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251107-NDRC-Tier1-VotingRightsAttacks_&utm_campaign=VotingRightsAttacks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3NWZkNmRmLTM1YmMtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uFrSVjemtxGybhTDGu7lPnG9OIEwgbMD3WptyOtv0fc=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The Department of Justice has a long history of defending Americans’ voting rights — from safeguarding the rights of voters with disabilities to protecting voters from threats and coercion.
The Trump administration has, unfortunately, completely reversed this trend. Instead, they are weaponizing the DOJ to pass more restrictive voting rules and clear the way for more voter suppression at the state level. It’s even pushing the Supreme Court to gut the Voting Rights Act.
Taken together with Trump’s pressure on states to redistrict, it’s clear that these efforts are part of a coordinated attack to make it harder for voters to make their voices heard — particularly voters of color.
**This latest attack to send “federal election observers” to California and New Jersey — for non-federal elections — is just the latest evidence that the Trump administration is terrified of letting voters have their say.**
[**The NDRC will never back down from standing up for voting rights — but this work takes enormous resources, especially now. Your donation will help us fight back against ongoing threats to democracy while preparing for whatever attacks on voting rights the Trump administration has planned.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118880578/581195800/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_VotingRightsAttacks_email_20251107-NDRC-Tier1-VotingRightsAttacks_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251107-NDRC-Tier1-VotingRightsAttacks_&utm_campaign=VotingRightsAttacks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3NWZkNmRmLTM1YmMtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uFrSVjemtxGybhTDGu7lPnG9OIEwgbMD3WptyOtv0fc=)

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Hell in a handbasket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter, I apologize for coming to you on such short notice. Now, I know you're busy, but I'm going to ask you to read this message in its entirety.

_Trust me, it 's that important._

For those that don't know me, my name is Bill Hagerty, and I'm a United States Senator representing the great state of Tennessee.
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/amcA-Fjvpzso9srdtTIoJK0P7IAtU5Hhmc9VyornVMSiAeUX_EDNK8FebRNBeYoskXfpo2cVIbYnLqe-AxoGn2a8pWSUaEzdsIWhjuph6WkSmM69ZsmCFFZkw-Dt3YrAee3hmsOYPSG4NaJH668AgoFY8Ndbcku7jChZf3YUUs9zC_iSF6QkRFm63oqoOgYHmMgnWZiQWIlDnj7t9BO7A7JIHWNAsj8Vks8ZLngjiDJah76YcvBxmQqTe3eL-9qZaUv5a2T38Re77GxNavIvtiltY3KP1Sr6Iqxg2pl7ZBET8QrddtSFOdDKZ-580eLkKro1WDbIvWZz-FkmEgFB93ow6DGmVcda460-i0eZFHsAa6gfjbLp1N7kx3_EwbvBqNMlTfguBUykR0t9yNYTsGzTBtYKshH6W87xvlyzDUrCxwo0uHaLEkkE-7sYpGaRot3BcYpQa53RZ0DFBLmGHKtKGflF57a-xPibT0e35Ho13gq3nXeW6T1Ym5C-6o_jYQF4qTWZ20mAg_ckAMAdF85J2P0QHMgFrEGCzLV6i0Fi0bZfqylwh8r1FhqfKAOIXj_11igAsh9yjbfbf_znGL61-cv0Z6tYI9RiAYxTbwDt9xgs0K2ibPfliO_Dqdt7OVk0hu6_4xbz3OCT7WcQLy4dfucZUc-cnLibuiG5taTXTQdLhsQYVsBMaJUDEJ4bFtM83HwPFhtIWIDxNHuVOPOow6KdcppzL_DblTlWtYuKcQxgv9ZEWlN6TnMgddoCjsNEcl6zVebvBRIh6WPh6ljPPfaHNVBHzjdfxMxFT_Lf1gcj4yjfhqFKLKGP7kyDVSRgSRcZBitvDc8eb8qLqFBCIPT1mAEgo1NWhQtL2_uwmsF9K-KdBGPmafLmPxy-0g-ohEmwcGsqviBB74yR30UNpMcB52IwPtlP0AAOOxELYJzE4U25DVQqo4M0W9TY0vMI0D_pU1RlktBQ0O2qZ5Uls7-TN3CaZAfk4hD7T9tdDKOiL4O10t0_npMX1YdpKxL5Z6tEdAQlVIKlgnC-wIfAiAIONS-AxyoR73R7FP9wGWbAknB3qsikHA/mKuwlt4GMv6vEOc7nE3ZCwoTzStPMb20/14)
Before that, I served as President Trump's ambassador to Japan, fighting for America First policies on the other side of the world.

I've poured my heart and soul into every second of this fight, and as one of President Trump's top allies in the Senate, _I was proud to do it._

clean_body: Peter, I apologize for coming to you on such short notice. Now, I know you're busy, but I'm going to ask you to read this message in its entirety. Trust me, it 's that important. For those that don't know me, my name is Bill Hagerty, and I'm a United States Senator representing the great state of Tennessee. Before that, I served as President Trump's ambassador to Japan, fighting for America First policies on the other side of the world. I've poured my heart and soul into every second of this fight, and as one of President Trump's top allies in the Senate, I was proud to do it. But Democrats and the vast network of left-wing NGOs are laser-focused on blocking the Trump America First agenda at all costs. You know the threat firsthand, Peter. Every time you turn on the TV, there's some sleazy career politician spreading lies about President Trump and the good folks that make up our movement. Just look at Chuck Schumer - he shut down the government over giving taxpayer-funded healthcare to illegals! I've seen these politicians up close, and I know what they're capable of. And now, top Democrats and their cabal of shadow donors are orchestrating a million-dollar scheme to throw me out of the Senate. Yours in patriotism, Bill Hagerty, | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

Republicans have now led our country into the longest government shutdown in history. |
---
It’s official, Peter — **Republicans have now led the country into the longest government shutdown in history.** This is what Republican governance looks like: a non-functional government; skyrocketing health care premiums; SNAP and WIC benefits lapsing, leaving vulnerable Americans to go hungry; and a Great Gatsby themed party hosted by the president of the United States. My message to Speaker Mike Johnson? **Bring House Republicans back from their vacations so they can get back to work for the American people.** [The ineptitude of House Republicans is staggering — and it's exactly why we need to flip the House blue. The GOP has tried to pin this shutdown on Democrats, but this is on the party that currently holds all three branches of government. They’d rather cater to billionaires than make life easier for you and your family.
Together, we can elect a majority that is committed to everyday people.

Yassamin

U.S. Senator Katie Britt (R-Alabama) has received an honorary Doctor of Laws degree from Tuskegee University during its homecoming weekend convocation.

The University said it was honoring Britt in recognition of her steadfast leadership and advocacy on behalf of the university.

Alabama U.S. Senator Katie Britt sharply criticized Democrats following their sweeping wins in Tuesday’s off-year elections.

“Tonight, Democrats elected a socialist to run the financial capital of the world and an attorney general who is on the record fantasizing about murdering children,” Britt (R-Montgomery) wrote.

“These elections aren’t a referendum on where the country is, they’re a referendum on where the Democratic Party is.”

U.S. Senator Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) joined CBS Sunday Morning’s Tracy Smith for a discussion on child care accessibility and affordability — a topic Britt has made central to her bipartisan work in the U.S. Senate.

Appearing alongside U.S. Senator Tim Kaine (D-Virginia), Britt spoke to the economic toll of high child care costs and the urgent need for federal solutions.

I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. **I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come.** Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. **This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.** Will you stand with me?

clean_body: | | | | | | | U.S. Senator Katie Britt (R-Alabama) has received an honorary Doctor of Laws degree from Tuskegee University during its homecoming weekend convocation. The University said it was honoring Britt in recognition of her steadfast leadership and advocacy on behalf of the university. | | Alabama U.S. Senator Katie Britt sharply criticized Democrats following their sweeping wins in Tuesday’s off-year elections. “Tonight, Democrats elected a socialist to run the financial capital of the world and an attorney general who is on the record fantasizing about murdering children,” Britt (R-Montgomery) wrote. “These elections aren’t a referendum on where the country is, they’re a referendum on where the Democratic Party is.” | | U.S. Senator Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) joined CBS Sunday Morning’s Tracy Smith for a discussion on child care accessibility and affordability — a topic Britt has made central to her bipartisan work in the U.S. Senate. Appearing alongside U.S. Senator Tim Kaine (D-Virginia), Britt spoke to the economic toll of high child care costs and the urgent need for federal solutions. | | | | | | | I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come. Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere. body:
|
We’re just **hours away** from the end of our biggest fundraising drive since Prop 50 passed, and I’m personally reaching out one last time for your help. This has been one of the most intense 72-hour pushes we’ve had all year. Because of Prop 50, CA-22 is now one of the most competitive seats in the country, and national Republicans are paying close attention. They know David Valadao is vulnerable. After Prop 50 passed, _The Cook Political Report_ officially moved CA-22 into **toss-up territory**. That’s a big deal. It means the path to flipping the House runs directly through the Central Valley. **And if we win here, we win the majority**. My team has been working nonstop to hit our goal. We’re still $7,500 short, and if we can close that gap by midnight, we’ll be in a position to build serious momentum heading into the next phase of this race. **[This is the most competitive CA-22 has ever been, and I know that _together_ we can win. subject: The fight for San Diego’s future starts today

body:
---
| | Peter – California voters passed Prop 50, a victory for democracy, fair representation, and the belief that every voice should count. Across the country, Democrats notched major wins in key races, proving that grassroots organizing works.

Here in San Diego, that same grassroots power will be more important than ever. Prop 50 means new district lines, and analysts are already saying our race will be one of the most competitive in the state.

**But if there’s one thing this movement has shown, it’s that when we organize early and stay united, we win.**

So before the GOP ramps up their attacks, we’re channeling this wave of momentum into action – expanding outreach, training volunteers, and taking Scott’s message of progress to every neighborhood in the new 50th District.

[Your support is what makes all of this possible. Prop 50 means new district lines, and analysts are already saying our race will be one of the most competitive in the state. But if there’s one thing this movement has shown, it’s that when we organize early and stay united, we win. name: GOTV PAC
subject: 17 Toss-Ups
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Tuesday night’s results weren’t just good news for Democrats. They were historic.
From Loudoun County, Virginia to Orange County, California, Americans showed what happens when we believe in each other and roll up our sleeves. When Democrats show up and organize, we win!
Now, as we head into 2026, the House battlefield is evenly split -- 209 seats leaning Democratic, 209 leaning Republican, and just 17 Toss-Ups left.
This is exactly the kind of landscape that makes GOTV PAC’s mission urgent. If we sit back and coast on good headlines, Republicans will pour dark-money millions into these competitive districts while we’re too busy patting ourselves on the back. We can’t let that happen.
So can you chip in $25 or whatever you can to power our voter-turnout teams in the most competitive districts and help Democrats take back the House for good: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11072025]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11072025]
- GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11042025]
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: The Democrats
subject: How do you want to feel?
body:
---
Derek, How do you feel right now? Knowing that Democrats won big across the country this week? Knowing that — together — we delivered a stunning rebuke of Trump, his cronies, his hideous ballroom, and his harmful policies? We feel pretty good. **Now the question is: If you knew that chipping in $7 to the DNC _right now_ would help us feel this way again on November 4, 2026 — the day after Election Day — wouldn’t it be the best $7 you’ve ever spent?** The truth is that Democrats were only able to deliver big wins this week because grassroots supporters stepped up and chipped in. If we want to win even bigger in the midterm elections and put a major check on Donald Trump’s power in January of 2027, we can’t let this momentum slow. Not even for a second. [**So, Derek, will you chip in $7 today to help us carry this momentum straight into the midterms? Your donation will help us build the infrastructure we need to win — up and down the ballot in all 50 states.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251107_5195_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5195_22930333_Vi1Qlh&akid=5195%2E22930333%2EVi1Qlh) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251107_5195_fr&refcode2=5195_22930333_Vi1Qlh&akid=5195%2E22930333%2EVi1Qlh)**

subject: Election night was a warning

body:
Across the country the opposition saw huge gains. Analysts are sounding the alarm: the other side is energized, mobilized, ahead of schedule. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/382f1e56646f/im-their-worst-nightmare-13906247?e=36b5d8efc6)
---
| | [ ](https://alexforarizona.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67160ca84dc611797a3361cec&id=260c6bd601&e=36b5d8efc6)
---
| | Patriot, Election night on Tuesday is proof the moment is now. **Across the country the opposition saw huge gains. Analysts are sounding the alarm: the other side is energized, mobilized, ahead of schedule. ** They’re not waiting for our primary. They’re testing their infrastructure, building their lists, and positioning for the fight.
---
| [Help Us Prepare Now!](https://alexforarizona.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67160ca84dc611797a3361cec&id=9ddf75841d&e=36b5d8efc6 "Help Us Prepare Now!")
---
| In our district, **we cannot let this happen.** They’ll fundraise quietly, recruit quietly, and when August arrives, they will strike. **But we’ll be ready.** With your help today, we send a different message: We’re already rising. We’re already active. We’re already winning. **[Can you step up right now with $25, $50, or whatever you can invest to give us the firepower we need to counter theirs?](https://alexforarizona.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67160ca84dc611797a3361cec&id=5f4aa86247&e=36b5d8efc6)**
---
| [Chip in Now](https://alexforarizona.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=67160ca84dc611797a3361cec&id=bcbd39de14&e=36b5d8efc6 "Chip in Now")
---
| Here’s what your donation powers right away:
* **Building our contact lists and outreach in key neighborhoods.**
* **Messaging that tells voters we’re the only option prepared for the long haul.**
* **Early groundwork so when the campaign season hits full swing, we’re not scrambling; we’re leading.**

The other side is creeping into ground we should own. But this is our district. This is our fight. **If we don’t move now, we’ll be playing catch-up. I don’t want that. I know you don’t either.** So thank you for stepping up. Every dollar today builds the momentum we need to dominate ahead of schedule. **Let’s show them we’re not just on offense. We’re the offensive they’re worried about.**
For freedom, Alex Stovall
-U.S. Army Veteran | Conservative | AZ-05

Across the country the opposition saw huge gains. Analysts are sounding the alarm: the other side is energized, mobilized, ahead of schedule. They’re not waiting for our primary. They’re testing their infrastructure, building their lists, and positioning for the fight. | "Help Us Prepare Now!" | In our district, we cannot let this happen. They’ll fundraise quietly, recruit quietly, and when August arrives, they will strike. But we’ll be ready. With your help today, we send a different message: We’re already rising. We’re already active. We’re already winning. | "Chip in Now" | Here’s what your donation powers right away: Building our contact lists and outreach in key neighborhoods. Messaging that tells voters we’re the only option prepared for the long haul. Early groundwork so when the campaign season hits full swing, we’re not scrambling; we’re leading. The other side is creeping into ground we should own. But this is our district. This is our fight. If we don’t move now, we’ll be playing catch-up. I don’t want that. I know you don’t either. So thank you for stepping up. Every dollar today builds the momentum we need to dominate ahead of schedule. Let’s show them we’re not just on offense. We’re the offensive they’re worried about.** For freedom, Alex Stovall -U.S. Army Veteran | Conservative | AZ-05 | "© PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR ARIZONA " | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Alex For Arizona, All rights reserved. subject: I am blown away.

body:
Here’s where we go from here:
| Hi friend, it’s Heather from the Voter Protection Project. Let me just start by saying WOW — _I am absolutely blown away by Democrats’ wins this week!_

[Before I go any further, we’re counting on 203 more top Democrats to fuel our fight to flip the House and keep this amazing momentum going. Can you chip in just $1 to get it done? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96315?t=6&akid=21777%2E878179%2Ev8yy3C) | [CHIP IN $1 TO FLIP THE HOUSE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96315?t=7&akid=21777%2E878179%2Ev8yy3C)
---
Tuesday was the first major referendum on Trump and his MAGA trifecta since they took control in January, and _Democrats STEPPED UP._

🔵 We WON highly competitive gubernatorial races in New Jersey and Virginia.
🔵 We PASSED new maps in California to stop Trump’s gerrymandering plot.
🔵 We FLIPPED counties all over the country that voted for Trump in 2024.

**Among so many other INCREDIBLE historic victories.**

**But we can’t get too comfortable.** Trump is already filing lawsuits against California, wants to BAN mail-in voting, and is filling his dark money war chest.

name: Katie Porter
subject: My vision for helping working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40386%2E3422442%2EfW7oUE)
Peter,
Today, I want to share a bit about my childhood and how those experiences shaped my vision for helping working families.
I grew up in rural Iowa, where my parents, two siblings, and I lived in a two-bedroom, one-bath house. My father was a farmer and my mother was a small business owner.
As I grew older, I saw neighbors and friends lose everything as Iowa’s economy collapsed during the farm crisis of the 1980s. **That experience shaped how I see the economy, which is set up to bail out the rich and powerful while working Americans are left behind.**
I got scholarships to attend good schools, but I was reminded that other students came from different backgrounds and didn’t have to work multiple jobs through college. **Ever since then, I’ve never forgotten my roots growing up.**
Those lessons taught me that government should stand with working families, not the powerful.
That’s why I’m running for California’s next governor: to make it easier to afford a home, find good schools and child care, get quality health care, and to hold special interests accountable so our economy works for people—not the well-connected.
**[Can you pitch in $5 today to help me fight for working families and win next year?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251107_2_ak.Q7m5FH&refcode=em20251107-40386&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40386%2E3422442%2EfW7oUE)**
Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251107-40386&amounts=&t=4&refcode2=40386_3422442_fW7oUE&akid=40386%2E3422442%2EfW7oUE)**

name: John Gray
subject: You wont believe what the Democrats just admitted…

# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5561%2E400544%2EBrcafq)
We’re reaching out with urgent news:
_**A SECOND REPUBLICAN OPPONENT JUST ENTERED THE RACE FOR GOVERNOR OF NEW MEXICO!**_
**[Deb and our team launched an emergency goal to raise $25,000 in the next 24 hours — because grassroots power is the only way we can stop Republicans in their tracks. Can you rush a $5 donation?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251107_1_opponent.lc47L6&amount=5&refcode=em20251107-5561&t=2&akid=5561%2E400544%2EBrcafq)**
We know that Donald Trump and Republicans are trying to flip New Mexico red. Now opponents are lining up to help bring the MAGA playbook to the governor’s office.
They know just as well as we do that New Mexico’s governorship tends to flip parties every eight years, and they’re coming for this seat right on schedule. Before long, right-wing megadonors will begin pouring millions of dollars into our state and try to buy a path to victory.

Deb Haaland HQ

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Supreme Court Battle for PA Voter Rolls
body:
IL Gov. Pritzker Harbored Truant Texas Dems

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH, AEF ASK SUPREME COURT FOR ACCESS TO VOTER RECORDS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36434&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj14TkdwWUhCNW9rOCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=86ec857abd7731733d567b83db3cb5bdc9a5867fb5d71e0aaeeefd2c66f6d431]

We filed an _amici curiae_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36424&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3BpbGYtdi1zY2htaWR0LWV0LWFsLWFtaWNpLXBhLW52cmEtMzc5L11fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=285560a13bd56a04c1fa79d85a13befd6978c9c4276ae226478f47d0f5b33194
_(friends
of the court) brief along with the Allied Educational Foundation (AEF)
to the Supreme Court of the United States, asking it to reverse the
Third Circuit’s decision
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36425&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9jYXNlcy5qdXN0aWEuY29tL2ZlZGVyYWwvYXBwZWxsYXRlLWNvdXJ0cy9jYTMvMjMtMTU5MC8yMy0xNTkwLTIwMjUtMDQtMjUucGRmP3RzPTE3NDU2MDA0MTEmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=19fcf9ecec7d0c3b65e016a352853a84bd0fb31bc28b79e2654a46ff534dbc99]
denying the Public Interest Legal Foundation (PILF) standing to sue
for voter information guaranteed under the National Voter Registration
Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvY3J0L25hdGlvbmFsLXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi1hY3QtMTk5My1udnJhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f158da4a5ae1de35e565a6a8f53da89cd8322253d93d918bf210c72ca3be414b]
(NVRA).

The Public Interest Legal Foundation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36426&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9wdWJsaWNpbnRlcmVzdGxlZ2FsLm9yZy9hYm91dC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=3642d9be5030a06e188ca659a91a93f49d0bc165c53e4bff324edcc92024c6a8],

law firm dedicated to election integrity, is suing for access to

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36427&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMTkvamFuLzMwL3Blbm5zeWx2YW5pYS0xMTAwMC1ub24tY2l0aXplbnMtcmVnaXN0ZXJlZC12b3RlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=f3f46ab0b52249dc6311f10d36f2a4c8667ff4a5926185bf397c9e77906eed15]

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36428&F=T&&hash=16971cf879c264d8356e22de0403d552f068477ff7b4018ec3f130909d09ea44]

Our _amici_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36432&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3BpbGYtdi1zY2htaWR0LWV0LWFsLWFtaWNpLXBhLW52cmEtMzc5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=14363406f8f690ebb27239e3195ee4f482da511613037bd3e48ae4ff66793b78]
brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36432&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3BpbGYtdi1zY2htaWR0LWV0LWFsLWFtaWNpLXBhLW52cmEtMzc5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=14363406f8f690ebb27239e3195ee4f482da511613037bd3e48ae4ff66793b78]
comes in the case _Public Interest Legal Foundation v. Al Schmidt,
Secretary of Pennsylvania, et al._
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36429&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3VwcmVtZWNvdXJ0Lmdvdi9zZWFyY2guYXNweD9maWxlbmFtZT0vZG9ja2V0L2RvY2tldGZpbGVzL2h0bWwvcHVibGljLzI1LTM3OS5odG1sJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=5b9f3cc34f9adbf881357144b87a4a305006a095de44a58033b4ed65e560b5f4]
(No. 1590, 1591, 3045, 379)), which is on appeal from the Third
Circuit, where the court denied access to public records requested
under the NVRA’s public disclosure provision. The issue in the case
is whether the Virginia-based nonprofit has standing to sue under the
National Voter Registration Act (NVRA).

In our _amici_ brief, we and AEF argue:

> The denial of access to public records requested under the NVRA’s
> public-disclosure provision, 52 U.S.C. § 20507(i)
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36430&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly91c2NvZGUuaG91c2UuZ292L3ZpZXcueGh0bWw/cmVxPSh0aXRsZTo1MiBzZWN0aW9uOjIwNTA3IGVkaXRpb246cHJlbGltJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=fe274e2fc02fcd4a73c282711b404fe579602f547d04e878775ea61934217437)],
> inflicts a concrete informational injury deeply rooted in centuries
> of common-law tradition.
>
> The Third Circuit’s decision ... departs from this precedent by
> imposing a novel “nexus” requirement, demanding plaintiffs prove
> downstream harms beyond the denial itself. This ruling exacerbates a
> sharp and growing circuit split. Circuits like the Fourth adhere to
> this Court’s framework, finding standing upon denial alone.
>
> The Third Circuit’s decision contains serious legal errors and
> directly conflicts with longstanding Supreme Court precedent. This
> Court has held that a person who is denied requested public records
> suffers a concrete injury ... [The Third Circuit adopted] a new
> requirement [that] conflicts with previous rulings by this Court on
> this issue.

This case shows the urgent need for citizenship verification for
voting. The Department of Justice should follow up with a national
investigation.

The Allied Educational Foundation is a charitable and educational
foundation dedicated to improving the quality of life through
education. In furtherance of that goal, the Foundation has engaged in
a number of projects, which include educational and health conferences
domestically and abroad. AEF has partnered frequently with us to fight
government and judicial corruption and to promote a return to ethics
and morality in the nation’s public life.

We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. As
part of our work, we have assembled a team of highly experienced
voting rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory elections in
Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and
Kentucky, among other achievements
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=35695&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL2VsZWN0aW9uK2xhdy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9397a9e3d745abe0c3f21cda7e7ee80355607c49f190c9e5632b403f671aff4b].

Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads our election
law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil
Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting
rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements
in dozens of states.

We have several federal lawsuits to clean up potentially millions of
names from the voter rolls.

Texas’ House Rules Manual states
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36404&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaG91c2UudGV4YXMuZ292L3BkZnMvcmVzb3VyY2VzL0hvdXNlLVJ1bGVzLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=bdbdc9acc089d4deb524928d06f5988cb1f6eb61fda6439482809241def7ec4d]

cooperation from federal immigration enforcement authorities
(_Judicial Watch Inc. v. Office of the Arizona Governor_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtb2ZmaWNlLW9mLWF6LWdvdmVybm9yLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMzkyMTcvXV8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=94886daf045cef674862715477cb6b526eebc8f761ed040908fdc4aae7f2bb7d
_(No.
CV2025-039217)).

Governor Hobbs’ apparent refusal to allow state resources to support
lawful immigration operations undermines the rule of law and places
law enforcement and other innocent lives at risk.

We sued in Maricopa County Superior Court following the governor’s
office’s “no responsive records” response to a December 17,
2024, records request. The request specifically sought:

* Any communications, memos, or orders issued to state agencies
reflecting a policy of non-participation in federal immigration
enforcement;
* Documentation of any legal analyses or contemplated litigation
related to the governor’s stance on state-level involvement in
immigration law enforcement.

Arizona law states
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36394&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXpsZWcuZ292L2Fycy8xMS8wMTA1MS5odG1dOj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=55915c3e905e28654a8b0e1ab7606a5886d3dd8f36c35bbc02992ca4353cf18a
“No
official or agency of this state or a county, city, town or other
political subdivision of this state may limit or restrict the
enforcement of federal immigration laws to less than the full extent
permitted by federal law.”

In November 2024, Hobbs responded
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36395&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvYm9yZGVyLXN0YXRlLWdvdmVybm9yLXZvd3MtZGVmeS10cnVtcHMtbWlzZ3VpZGVkLW1hc3MtZGVwb3J0YXRpb24tcHVzaD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=4b4ef9b1383c57991040ab2f9b8861184f1c9e5a1706575a69431d968ac892ba]
to a question on whether Arizona’s state police and National Guard
would assist with federal immigration enforcement efforts by stating,
“What I will unequivocally say is that, as governor, I will not
tolerate efforts that are part of misguided policies that harm our
communities, that threaten our communities, that terrorize our
communities, and Arizona will not take part in those.... We will not
be participating in misguided efforts that harm our communities, and
I've been incredibly clear about that.”

Federal supremacy in immigration matters is established by the U.S.
Constitution’s Supremacy Clause
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36396&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zdGl0dXRpb24uY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2Jyb3dzZS9hcnRpY2xlLTYvY2xhdXNlLTIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=15af885bb9ca0ffa3e32f2673236e2d74ce74d169192cc09a97846c0f84f9ec5]
and
codified in the Immigration and Nationality Act in Title 8
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36397&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly91c2NvZGUuaG91c2UuZ292L3ZpZXcueGh0bWw/cGF0aD0vcHJlbGltQHRpdGxlOC9jaGFwdGVyMTImZWRpdGlvbj1wcmVsaW0mdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=fd54db3a724b288288eab0492ababe894a7f604baef27acb030184c4e772d4b8]
of the U.S. Code. These provisions reserve exclusive authority to the
federal government for the regulation of admission, removal, and
enforcement of immigration laws.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES EVANSTON MAYOR FOR BREAKING WITH IMMIGRATION LAW

Federal law clearly gives the federal government responsibility for
immigration matters, but the mayor of Evanston, IL, population of
76,000, decided to take matters into his own hands.

We filed an Illinois Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36415&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbWF5b3ItZXZhbnN0b24tY29tcGxhaW50LTExMDAyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=087000102055f2cfc5110025761715058773c751e69ddddb8bd3b7da9543e978]
against Evanston, IL, Mayor Daniel Biss for records related to
obstruction of federal immigration enforcement (_Judicial Watch Inc.
v. Office of the Mayor_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36415&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbWF5b3ItZXZhbnN0b24tY29tcGxhaW50LTExMDAyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=087000102055f2cfc5110025761715058773c751e69ddddb8bd3b7da9543e978]
(No. 2025CH11002)).

We sued in the Circuit Court of Cook County, Illinois, County
Department, Chancery Division, after the mayor’s office failed to
comply with a September 25, 2025, FOIA request for:

* Records of Biss’s activities related to ICE [U.S. Immigration and
Customs Enforcement] operations, including “Operation Midway
Blitz,” and the protest at the ICE facility in Broadview, IL, where
tear gas was deployed in September 2025.
* Media related to ICE protests and activities, including any of the
city’s photographs, videos or audio recordings depicting Biss’s
participation in ICE-related protests or monitoring.
* Communications involving Biss as related to ICE operations,
protests, or sanctuary city policies.
* License plate camera deactivation.
* Use of city resources and taxpayer time on ICE-related protests.
* Sanctuary city policies and ICE non-cooperation.

On September 8, 2025, the U.S. Department of Homeland Security
announced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36417&F=T&&hash=f47099ccc618e227d15aec6b5b5b28c086944decb0f1b8c147826dcfc5058562]
“Operation Midway Blitz,” targeting “the criminal illegal aliens
who flocked to Chicago and Illinois because they knew Governor
Pritzker and his sanctuary policies would protect them and allow them
to roam free on American streets.”

On September 11, 2025, Biss said
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36418&F=T&&hash=27215e2d8dc1466877d7d8a8a29ba1ae5f4abe34b2cad46ef1d2076966730e90]
that upon learning of planned federal immigration enforcement activity
in Evanston, he notified residents so they could “protect
themselves.” He further stated, “We’ve been doing everything we
can to protect our residents from before Donald Trump took office,
passing strong sanctuary laws to make sure police are not cooperating
with federal civil immigration enforcement.” Biss reportedly ordered
Evanston’s license plate cameras turned off after learning the data
was being shared with federal immigration authorities.

On September 19, Biss reportedly was involved in a protest during
which federal law enforcement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36419&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXhpb3MuY29tL2xvY2FsL2NoaWNhZ28vMjAyNS8wOS8xOS9kYW5pZWwtYmlzcy1wcm90ZXN0ZXJzLXRlYXItZ2FzLWljZS1icm9hZHZpZXctYWdlbnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bd05c0d1867e453cf0c0d8037de5931fc95e0c88521f41906bc37448262e1c49]
agents deployed pepper and tear gas at an ICE processing center in
Broadview, IL. The U.S. Department of Homeland Security stated
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36420&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9ESFNnb3Yvc3RhdHVzLzE5NjkwNTg2MjM3MzgzMDY2OTI/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a7d36c657119fe51ec25de346697ce454dc7ce115a7a4f6c883183114d835455]
“desperate
politicians want their 15 minutes of fame, and they’re willing to do
it off the backs of our law enforcement.... We will not back down.”

On September 26, tear gas
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36421&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vdXMvY2hpY2Fnby1hbnRpLWljZS1wcm90ZXN0ZXJzLWJsb2NrLXZlaGljbGVzLWdldC1oaXQtdGVhci1nYXMtcGVwcGVyLWJhbGxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=13a47eb32a93e64652262ffba401c906aae88090c0304bea9db9fd90680e9229]
again was used to disperse violent protesters at the Broadview
facility. An ICE spokesperson said two people were arrested, “one of
whom was carrying a firearm.” Also, “rioters and sanctuary
politicians obstructed law enforcement, threw tear gas cans, rocks,
bottles, and fireworks, slashed tires of cars, blocked the entrance of
the building, and trespassed on private property.”

In October 2025, Evanston, IL, issued a press release
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77634&L=36422&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2l0eW9mZXZhbnN0b24ub3JnL0hvbWUvQ29tcG9uZW50cy9OZXdzL05ld3MvNjcyMC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=022915d259a5f68f094a59e96a71a2bbb833ba9cf1a53ffdd7569f84bd4888ab]
discussing “ICE-Free Zones” and strategies for “state and local
agencies—including the Secretary of State, the Illinois
Accountability Commission, and the Cook County State’s Attorney’s
Office” to hinder federal immigration enforcement actions.

The mayor of Evanston’s apparent interference with lawful
immigration operations shows disrespect for the rule of law and the
safety of innocent lives.

clean_body: IL Gov. Pritzker Harbored Truant Texas Dems [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH, AEF ASK SUPREME COURT FOR ACCESS TO VOTER RECORDS [] We filed an amici curiae [ (friends of the court) brief along with the Allied Educational Foundation (AEF) to the Supreme Court of the United States, asking it to reverse the Third Circuit’s decision [] denying the Public Interest Legal Foundation (PILF) standing to sue for voter information guaranteed under the National Voter Registration Act [] (NVRA). The Public Interest Legal Foundation [], a nonprofit, public interest law firm dedicated to election integrity, is suing for access to Pennsylvania’s voter rolls following a failure to disclose an estimated 100,000 [] noncitizen registered voter records. Pennsylvania officials reportedly [] admitted that “for decades, the Department of Motor Vehicles had allowed non-U.S. citizens to register to vote through the state’s ‘motor voter’ system.” Our amici [] brief [] comes in the case Public Interest Legal Foundation v. Al Schmidt, Secretary of Pennsylvania, et al. [] (No. 1590, 1591, 3045, 379)), which is on appeal from the Third Circuit, where the court denied access to public records requested under the NVRA’s public disclosure provision. The issue in the case is whether the Virginia-based nonprofit has standing to sue under the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA). In our amici brief, we and AEF argue: The denial of access to public records requested under the NVRA’s public-disclosure provision, 52 U.S.C. § 20507(i) [)], inflicts a concrete informational injury deeply rooted in centuries of common-law tradition. The Third Circuit’s decision ... departs from this precedent by imposing a novel “nexus” requirement, demanding plaintiffs prove downstream harms beyond the denial itself. This ruling exacerbates a sharp and growing circuit split. Circuits like the Fourth adhere to this Court’s framework, finding standing upon denial alone. The Third Circuit’s decision contains serious legal errors and directly conflicts with longstanding Supreme Court precedent. This Court has held that a person who is denied requested public records suffers a concrete injury ... [The Third Circuit adopted] a new requirement [that] conflicts with previous rulings by this Court on this issue. This case shows the urgent need for citizenship verification for voting. The Department of Justice should follow up with a national investigation. The Allied Educational Foundation is a charitable and educational foundation dedicated to improving the quality of life through education. In furtherance of that goal, the Foundation has engaged in a number of projects, which include educational and health conferences domestically and abroad. AEF has partnered frequently with us to fight government and judicial corruption and to promote a return to ethics and morality in the nation’s public life. We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. As part of our work, we have assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements []. Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads our election law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements in dozens of states. We have several federal lawsuits to clean up potentially millions of names from the voter rolls. On October 8, 2025, oral arguments [] were held in the U.S. Supreme Court in a historic case we filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law allowing the counting of ballots received up to 14 days after Election Day (Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews [ (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)). We recently filed a brief [] to the U.S. Supreme Court on behalf of the Libertarian Party of Mississippi, opposing the State of Mississippi’s attempt to overturn the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit’s decision, which struck down a law allowing ballots received after Election Day to be counted. Federal courts in Oregon [], California and Illinois [] recently ruled that Judicial Watch’s lawsuits against those states may proceed, forcing them to clean their voter rolls. We announced [] in May that its work led to the removal of more than five million ineligible names from voter rolls nationwide. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES PRITZKER FOR RECORDS ON TEXAS DEMOCRAT LAWMAKERS Gov. JB Pritzker (D-IL) decided to harbor Texas Democrats, who fled the state in an effort to derail a congressional redistricting bill, and we’d like to know more about his actions. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against Pritzker for records on the state’s role in providing refuge to Texas Democrat legislators, who fled their state in an attempt to deny quorum and block the redistricting vote (Judicial Watch Inc. v. Office of the Governor [] (No. 2025CH000057)). Texas’ House Rules Manual states [] that “all absentees for whom no sufficient excuse is made may, by order of a majority of those present, be sent for and arrested, wherever they may be found, by the sergeant-at-arms or an officer appointed by the sergeant-at-arms for that purpose, and their attendance shall be secured and retained.” The state Supreme Court in 2021 upheld [] that rule, giving the House the power to arrest absent members to establish a quorum. We sued in the Circuit Court of Sangamon County, Illinois, County Department, Chancery Division after Pritzker’s office failed to respond to an August 2025 FOIA request for: All audio/visual recordings, handwritten notes, agendas, minutes, and reports related to a meeting or meetings held between Governor Pritzker and congressional Democrats at which Texas congressional redistricting and/or Illinois possibly housing Texas Democratic state lawmakers was discussed. All audio/visual recordings, handwritten notes, agendas, minutes, and reports related to a meeting held between Governor Pritzker and Democratic party officials in late June 2025 in Oklahoma regarding congressional redistricting matters, as discussed at . All emails sent between and among officials in Governor Pritzker’s immediate office, including but not limited to Governor Pritzker and his chief of staff, regarding Texas congressional redistricting. On August 3, 2025, more than 50 Texas Democrats fled the state [] in an attempt to derail a congressional redistricting bill. Pritzker then announced: “[Texas Democrats] are here in Illinois. We’re going to do everything we can to protect every single one of them and make sure that — ’cause we know they’re doing the right thing, we know that they’re following the law.” Pritzker’s involvement reportedly began [] “at a dinner in late June hosted by Oklahoma Democrats, where he discussed the possibility of helping Texas Democrats fight back against the redistricting plan with state party chair Kendall Scudder ..” Pritzker, a billionaire heir to the Hyatt Hotel fortune, appeared [] on The Late Show with Stephen Colbert on August 6, 2025, and when asked why the Texas legislators went to Illinois, the governor responded, “The great heroes of the House Democratic caucus decided the only thing they could do in order to stop it was leave Texas. And where did they decide to come to? The safe haven of the state of Illinois where we are going to protect them and take care of them.” Later in the interview, Colbert asked whether the FBI could arrest the Texas legislators located in Illinois. Pritzker stated, “Frankly in the state of Illinois, we are not going to let them get taken away. We are going to protect the Texas House Democrats.... As long as they are in Illinois, they are safe.” The Texas Democrats ended their walkout on August 18, 2025. The Texas state Senate on August 22, 2025, passed the [] new redistricting map and Republican Gov. Greg Abbott signed it into law on August 29, 2025. Pritzker seemed delighted to host the truant Texas Democrat “heroes,” aiding and abetting an illegal two-week tantrum. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES AZ GOV. HOBBS OVER IMMIGRATION ENFORCEMENT NON-COMPLIANCE We filed an Arizona Public Records Law lawsuit [] against Gov. Katie Hobbs for records regarding her office reportedly ordering state police and the Arizona National Guard to withhold cooperation from federal immigration enforcement authorities (Judicial Watch Inc. v. Office of the Arizona Governor [ (No. CV2025-039217)). Governor Hobbs’ apparent refusal to allow state resources to support lawful immigration operations undermines the rule of law and places law enforcement and other innocent lives at risk. We sued in Maricopa County Superior Court following the governor’s office’s “no responsive records” response to a December 17, 2024, records request. The request specifically sought: Any communications, memos, or orders issued to state agencies reflecting a policy of non-participation in federal immigration enforcement; Documentation of any legal analyses or contemplated litigation related to the governor’s stance on state-level involvement in immigration law enforcement. Arizona law states [ “No official or agency of this state or a county, city, town or other political subdivision of this state may limit or restrict the enforcement of federal immigration laws to less than the full extent permitted by federal law.” In November 2024, Hobbs responded [] to a question on whether Arizona’s state police and National Guard would assist with federal immigration enforcement efforts by stating, “What I will unequivocally say is that, as governor, I will not tolerate efforts that are part of misguided policies that harm our communities, that threaten our communities, that terrorize our communities, and Arizona will not take part in those.... We will not be participating in misguided efforts that harm our communities, and I've been incredibly clear about that.” Federal supremacy in immigration matters is established by the U.S. Constitution’s Supremacy Clause [] and codified in the Immigration and Nationality Act in Title 8 [] of the U.S. Code. These provisions reserve exclusive authority to the federal government for the regulation of admission, removal, and enforcement of immigration laws. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES EVANSTON MAYOR FOR BREAKING WITH IMMIGRATION LAW Federal law clearly gives the federal government responsibility for immigration matters, but the mayor of Evanston, IL, population of 76,000, decided to take matters into his own hands. We filed an Illinois Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against Evanston, IL, Mayor Daniel Biss for records related to obstruction of federal immigration enforcement (Judicial Watch Inc. v. Office of the Mayor [] (No. 2025CH11002)). We sued in the Circuit Court of Cook County, Illinois, County Department, Chancery Division, after the mayor’s office failed to comply with a September 25, 2025, FOIA request for: Records of Biss’s activities related to ICE [U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement] operations, including “Operation Midway Blitz,” and the protest at the ICE facility in Broadview, IL, where tear gas was deployed in September 2025. Media related to ICE protests and activities, including any of the city’s photographs, videos or audio recordings depicting Biss’s participation in ICE-related protests or monitoring. Communications involving Biss as related to ICE operations, protests, or sanctuary city policies. License plate camera deactivation. Use of city resources and taxpayer time on ICE-related protests. Sanctuary city policies and ICE non-cooperation. On September 8, 2025, the U.S. Department of Homeland Security announced [] “Operation Midway Blitz,” targeting “the criminal illegal aliens who flocked to Chicago and Illinois because they knew Governor Pritzker and his sanctuary policies would protect them and allow them to roam free on American streets.” On September 11, 2025, Biss said [] that upon learning of planned federal immigration enforcement activity in Evanston, he notified residents so they could “protect themselves.” He further stated, “We’ve been doing everything we can to protect our residents from before Donald Trump took office, passing strong sanctuary laws to make sure police are not cooperating with federal civil immigration enforcement.” Biss reportedly ordered Evanston’s license plate cameras turned off after learning the data was being shared with federal immigration authorities. On September 19, Biss reportedly was involved in a protest during which federal law enforcement [] agents deployed pepper and tear gas at an ICE processing center in Broadview, IL. The U.S. Department of Homeland Security stated [] “desperate politicians want their 15 minutes of fame, and they’re willing to do it off the backs of our law enforcement.... We will not back down.” On September 26, tear gas [] again was used to disperse violent protesters at the Broadview facility. An ICE spokesperson said two people were arrested, “one of whom was carrying a firearm.” Also, “rioters and sanctuary politicians obstructed law enforcement, threw tear gas cans, rocks, bottles, and fireworks, slashed tires of cars, blocked the entrance of the building, and trespassed on private property.” In October 2025, Evanston, IL, issued a press release [] discussing “ICE-Free Zones” and strategies for “state and local agencies—including the Secretary of State, the Illinois Accountability Commission, and the Cook County State’s Attorney’s Office” to hinder federal immigration enforcement actions. The mayor of Evanston’s apparent interference with lawful immigration operations shows disrespect for the rule of law and the safety of innocent lives. MAINE LAWMAKER DEFAMES PARENTS PROTESTING TRANS BOYS IN GIRLS’ SPORTS Leslie Trentalange, an elected official in Kennebunk, Maine, publicly attacked parents with traditional values. Our Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports []. In a public declaration that is shocking even for an attention-seeking liberal politician, an elected official in Maine defamed parents who oppose transgender males in girls’ sports and restrooms as having “pedophilic tendencies.” Though the egregious attack in Kennebunk may seem worse to some, it brings to mind when Hillary Clinton called Donald Trump supporters “deplorables [ at a New York Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender (LGBT) fundraiser during her second failed presidential campaign in 2016. Clinton further described Trump supporters to her loyal fans as racist, sexist, homophobic, xenophobic and Islamophobic. Years later, Clinton doubled down on her reprehensible comments, writing in a major newspaper during a campaign to promote her latest book that deplorables is “too kind [ for some Trump backers. The Maine public official who blasted concerned parents is also sticking to her highly offensive words, refusing to apologize for calling them pedophiles because they want to protect their children. The incident occurred a few weeks ago during a school board meeting when Kennebunk Select Board member Leslie Trentalange suggested the protesting parents have “pedophilic tendencies.” A video of the appalling comments is available on the website of the local newspaper, which also quotes the elected official in a story [] of the October 20 school board meeting []. Referring to parents who object to boys in girls’ sports and bathrooms, Trentalange said: “Their obsession with what private parts are sitting in between the legs of our students is nothing less than creepy and should absolutely be raising eyebrows in and around our school district.” She continued even as those in attendance, including members of the school board, seemed taken aback: “Their obsession with genitalia points not to caring for the students in this district, but perhaps to an underlying guilt for their own pedophilic tendencies. There is a registry for that,” the Kennebunk legislator added. School Board Chair Matthew Stratford attempted to interrupt Trentalange’s tirade, according to the local news report and video of the meeting and called her comments “inappropriate.” She kept talking however and finished her insulting rant. The unhinged lawmaker insisted she did not think her comments were inappropriate and that she stood by them. Trentalange is the vice chair of Kennebunk’s Select Board [ a school board liaison, though she reportedly stepped down from that position after her offensive testimony at the recent meeting, but remains on the Select Board. The Select Board is the town’s governing body and consists of seven elected members who serve three-year staggering terms. Among their duties and responsibilities are establishing policy, supervising Kennebunk’s manager, representing the town on various regional and state issues, and providing public leadership. The governing body’s code of conduct [] includes a provision that states “discussions should be conducted in a professional manner with all participants treating each other with civility and respect.” The code was designed to define the behavior, manners and courtesy expected of Select Board members as they interact with each other, Town staff, and their constituents and requires them to “demonstrate honesty and integrity in every action and statement.” Accusing parents of being pedophiles for trying to shield their girls from the detriments of the transgender revolution does not seem to demonstrate integrity required under the town’s code for elected officials. At a follow-up board meeting Trentalange issued what the local newspaper called a “non-apology for calling protesting parents pedophiles [ She acknowledged that she made a statement that may have pushed some boundaries at the school board meeting, but “avoided in any way recanting her inflammatory statements or acknowledging that they were inappropriate,” according to the news article. The elected official did however apologize to the “queer community” for the harm caused by her comments. “If there are folks in the marginalized queer community that feel my message did not serve them or hurt them in any way, it is that which I regret,” Trentalange said. No mention of the girls harmed by outrageous policies that allow boys, who are physically much stronger and bigger, to compete on their sports teams. body:
Now the LEFT is dumping millions to take her out. The fight is on, and I need backup.

You might be wondering how this young teacher...
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgg0u5jfq1o1uec2pld87vgbjapikkijol919bjg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or1c1h2bs)
...ended up here.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbrlmkq2qlkp6q0eo3um094cspqs47il5723oj00_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or1c1h2bs)
Let me take you back to the beginning, Friend.
I was raised in Hinton, Iowa, a town of 500 people. My parents started out in a trailer on my grandparents' farm. We grew soybeans and sweet corn.
When I was old enough, I'd walk the fields for $4/hour and sell corn door to door just to keep the lights on.
We didn't have much, but we never felt poor. My parents taught me that faith, family, and hard work were everything. And I guess I became a conservative before I even knew the word.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpuhqr9qttdv111mvvbdctlkssaujhess2jiod8g_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or1c1h2bs)
From day one, I wanted to be a teacher. I got my degree, moved to Nevada, and took a job in a tough North Las Vegas school. Half of my students didn't speak English, but we made it work. Later, I helped turn one of the state's worst schools into one of the best.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv2ot8sut47mruuuhehpu36lqtupkb2hbaodc358_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or1c1h2bs)
Then came the moment that changed everything.
I was told by a state bureaucrat that I had to spend money on outdated textbooks instead of the laptops our students desperately needed. That was it. I realized if you want to change the rules, you had to be at the table. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z19jscdto91o78egnupkcu7d008dt6j95pv0du48_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or1c1h2bs)
So I ran for State Senate in a district Joe Biden won by 5 points in 2020. And I won. And I've spent every day since fighting for Nevada families, not the political elites..
I still can't believe how far we've come. But this new campaign? It's going to be the toughest one yet. The left is pouring millions into Nevada to try and buy this seat, flip the House, and DESTROY President Trump's agenda FOREVER.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zghpl7arpatp7hljka6456tmjka3tjq1lmi5lihg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or1c1h2bs)
Friend, if you're still reading, thank you. I know we don't always get a chance to slow down and hear someone's story.
But if mine resonates with you, if you believe this country is still worth fighting for, [I could really use your support. ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo96i3id5tgifehk607rorpve4qn7l3b729unhbo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or1c1h2bs)
[Would you consider chipping in $10, $25, $50, or any amount before my CRUCIAL deadline to help me keep fighting for the American Dream.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ucdg4seinfscccjndhpgb4c30ljd0l8lr6a6ko_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or1c1h2bs) [ CHIP IN $50 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd49uuv1mpsv58itpdioi8id59shs46c9437fgog_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or1c1h2bs) [ CHIP IN $25 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc97c0sn8l7dnpteqve777clb1jsvhde7ala8qdg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or1c1h2bs) [ CHIP IN $10 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8sj9n9uab4s53502s2qj79hfif5ce1d3ineq5go_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or1c1h2bs) [ CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdigq01lbco4dr3oq58kgtsiq4ieqlucskrns2u0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or1c1h2bs) With all my heart, Carrie Buck Candidate for Congress Nevada's 1st District |

body:

name: Carrie Buck
subject: Joe Biden won my district I won it back for conservatives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carrie Buck for Congress
body:
Now the LEFT is dumping millions to take her out. The fight is on, and I need backup.

You might be wondering how this young teacher...
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6r5hde76ofbifbsh3lnvgr5slq7mr7uhe79efio_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or3c1h2bs)
...ended up here.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zotenjo4mlq9ghpcc5kbarqlntqb1qt7krcrldn8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or3c1h2bs)
Let me take you back to the beginning, Friend.
I was raised in Hinton, Iowa, a town of 500 people. My parents started out in a trailer on my grandparents' farm. We grew soybeans and sweet corn.
When I was old enough, I'd walk the fields for $4/hour and sell corn door to door just to keep the lights on.
We didn't have much, but we never felt poor. My parents taught me that faith, family, and hard work were everything. And I guess I became a conservative before I even knew the word.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4ekd1ctqj48kldvjj4ggl27s1egoepuqptertcg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or3c1h2bs)
From day one, I wanted to be a teacher. I got my degree, moved to Nevada, and took a job in a tough North Las Vegas school. Half of my students didn't speak English, but we made it work. Later, I helped turn one of the state's worst schools into one of the best.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1pr7pjo3jpv00enniimpgnmbmsgrf6mkj8nq0h8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or3c1h2bs)
Then came the moment that changed everything.
I was told by a state bureaucrat that I had to spend money on outdated textbooks instead of the laptops our students desperately needed. That was it. I realized if you want to change the rules, you had to be at the table. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zghdq6t9aq3q1cgs98unp8k2vujl3eofa6kt048g_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or3c1h2bs)
So I ran for State Senate in a district Joe Biden won by 5 points in 2020. And I won. And I've spent every day since fighting for Nevada families, not the political elites..
I still can't believe how far we've come. But this new campaign? It's going to be the toughest one yet. The left is pouring millions into Nevada to try and buy this seat, flip the House, and DESTROY President Trump's agenda FOREVER.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd2qk56ct4jbt06c8ddoh544unq7a9k66buep9l8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or3c1h2bs)
Friend, if you're still reading, thank you. I know we don't always get a chance to slow down and hear someone's story.
But if mine resonates with you, if you believe this country is still worth fighting for, [I could really use your support. ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1dg7qj5429d2lv3b59frf3ffqdcv6c69cqmg6a8_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or3c1h2bs)
[Would you consider chipping in $10, $25, $50, or any amount before my CRUCIAL deadline to help me keep fighting for the American Dream.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z72tm25d0istk82qrbkb8me8mgi0fqkve70v9ceo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or3c1h2bs) [ CHIP IN $50 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt9bc19srnmquvbtsmg6f9sk63ka9m8sslndppr0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or3c1h2bs) [ CHIP IN $25 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhvu6iooo9re9bjckkcl9prngumto837hlr4lv00_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or3c1h2bs) [ CHIP IN $10 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs49hfccukebrclu5ku5ffrlupfjqvrpbcvro2ag_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or3c1h2bs) [ CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhpcr6rnvhs9ctdohge9f9tkk0j9qmuf0okqvd4o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2clie9or3c1h2bs) With all my heart, Carrie Buck Candidate for Congress Nevada's 1st District |
---

name: Team Wilson
subject: The Future of America is at Stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wilson for SC
body:
Conservative Patriots, act before it’s too late.

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z00pnhd1rct3jvpkidm2mh138cfmjkvp08k73hs0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdg62p32c1h2bs)
---
| | Conservative Patriots, My heart is broken thinking about New York City’s future and what it means for the rest of America. The contrast between our parties has NEVER been further apart. These consequences will pour across the nation sooner than you might think. _I’ve seen firsthand what it takes to defend freedom in the military, in law enforcement, and as South Carolina’s Attorney General. Now, the fight is coming to our states._ [_**_Are you ready to stand with me?_**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhlcrndt4eaj2ttiv3qv4guo9ed7g05r0o6a167o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdg62p32c1h2bs)
---
| | | [ STAND WITH ALAN WILSON ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdcqf1vdrpboho9f13oihbv89refml3o0mh25fao_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdg62p32c1h2bs)
---
| | The Left is counting on apathetic Americans to let this slide. Please, for our next generation, I implore you to show them we will not back down.
---
| | | [ PROTECT FREEDOM NOW ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zua3bqgu2ns601fjrvu7drhfd9vi2th1l48h6cpg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdg62p32c1h2bs)
---
| | Alan Wilson _Husband, Father, Veteran, Attorney General_
---
| | | [ MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zooaqrihmb7la27dpaabqvacpg6h9mb12fs3jm4o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdg62p32c1h2bs)
---
---
| Delivering Results

Alan Wilson has spent his career on the front lines of the fight to protect South Carolina. As Attorney General, he has led with integrity, toughness, and an unwavering commitment to defending our people, our Constitution, and the rule of law. Wilson has spearheaded major legislative victories for public safety and victim protection, including the recent passage of the Administrative Subpoena bill to fast-track child predator investigations. He quadrupled the size of South Carolina's Internet Crimes Against Children Taskforce, helping secure over 1,200 convictions of child predators. His office also established and expanded the Human Trafficking Task Force, transforming South Carolina from one of the worst to one of the strongest states in the nation in combatting human trafficking. Alan has led the charge in prosecuting violent criminals, launching a Violent Crimes Case Reduction Unit (VCCRU) and hiring more prosecutors and victim advocates to cut case backlogs. He helped pass landmark reforms to domestic violence laws and championed judicial reform to restore public trust in South Carolina's courts. Wilson has defended South Carolina values in courtrooms across the country. He’s taken on the Biden Administration and fought back against federal overreach, whether it’s on immigration, radical gender ideology in schools, unconstitutional COVID mandates, or targeting of religious liberty. And when President Trump was under attack, Wilson stood with him in the courtroom and in the trenches.
---
---

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I am officially running for governor of New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.

You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zma20ankiejpnd0d11lcejtu6is6c8j2v2psbvbg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdg6epr1cth2bs)
---
**_OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally...
---
**_I’m officially launching my campaign for governor of New York – and I’d like _YOU_ to be one of our very first Founding Members!_**
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj98uhkhvk6rmdmp1fqeeinbg5j4j3rnbpbhio2o_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdg6epr1cth2bs)
---

Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she’s brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda.
---
__But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw.__
---
**As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover!**
---
This isn’t just another election, Friend.
---
**_It’s the _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ to SAVE New York before it’s lost forever!_**
---
Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani’s dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees.
---
**But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the _FINAL_ _FIREWALL_ that protects New Yorkers from this insanity!**
---
We’re starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a _**ONE-POINT LEAD**_ – _and that’s before I even officially launched our campaign!_
---
As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul’s attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory.
---
That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign.
---
Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state!
---
**_That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,_600% MATCH_!_**
---
When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank...
---
**_Our Founding Members like _YOU_ who had my back on day one!_**
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount to become an official Founding Member of my gubernatorial campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul – and help unlock a 600% MATCH.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmcdpj1kkhnsc9pintgar8tabsk159mdpffmqgkg_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdg6epr1cth2bs)
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0hknohhs0ldbfaf8ptlbm54h66g0pqemr4adtvo_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdg6epr1cth2bs)
---

Thank you,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpge7rsfjeua9iahvlbffu8vlo1jq3uttr79h1r0_rp22sh2s8i6eor2cdg6epr1cth2bs)
---
Rep. Elise Stefanik
Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership
---

That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign. Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state! That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,600% MATCH! When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank... Our Founding Members like YOU who had my back on day one! Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Troy Downing
subject: Will you help defend our narrow Majority?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Help us get a head start!

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter,

The GOP has a historically narrow Majority, and the Democrats are already gearing up to take that from us in just 1 year. If we are going to have any shot at keeping this lead, we need to start fighting back ASAP.

Democrats will march in lockstep with the party line to destroy anything we put forward, and if we have any hope of continuing to advance our America First agenda, we need to get ahead on building our war chest for the next cycle. **[Will you chip in to help us get ahead on defending our Majority?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[ **CHIP IN NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE** ](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Thank you for your support,
---

---
Troy Downing

body:
The bi-weekly collection of all things grassroots! No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-qkhulll-didthutlhu-k/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkhulll-didthutlhu-r/) **November 7, 2025** Patriot,Recently, WisGOP announced the SIXTH year of our successful Farm Team initiative. We look forward to traveling around the state and helping local candidates win in April and building the momentum needed to win in November 2026!Join the team at [wisgop.org/take-action](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkhulll-didthutlhu-y/)!-Team WisGOP **Upcoming Events****11/8: Trempealeau County Spaghetti Fundraiser

**11/18: Election Inspector Training Meeting
