12/1: Barron County Member Meeting
12/1: Polk County Member Meeting
12/1: Jackson County Member Meeting
12/2: Buffalo County Member Meeting
12/2: Adams County Member Meeting
12/2: UW La Crosse CR Meeting
12/3: Washington County Pints and Politics
12/5: WIYR Inaugural 1848 Gala
12/7: St. Croix Bags/Cornhole Tournament
12/12: St. Croix Christmas Party
12/15: Racine County GOP Christmas Party****For more information, please visit:[wisgop.org/calendar/events/](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkhulll-didthutlhu-j/) ** **Taylor County**
Republicans in Taylor County participated in the Medford Harvest Day Parade with over 2,000 in attendance! **Brown County**
Brown County Republicans sold out of tickets for their incredibly successful Lincoln Reagan Trump Dinner. The event included speeches by Congressman Tony Wied and former National Security Advisor Michael Flynn! **Calumet County**
Republicans in Calumet County held a conservative citizens meeting with special guest Michelle Wynveen. Michelle works at the Calumet County Veterans Service Office and helps veterans access the benefits they deserve. Thank you, Michelle! ** Crawford County**
Crawford County Republicans held a membership meeting in addition to their participation in the Prairie du Chien Oktoberfest Parade with Congressman Van Orden! **Green County**
The Republican Party of Green County hosted its annual Lincoln Day Dinner at the historic Turner Hall in Monroe on Saturday, October 25th. The event was a huge success, and we heard from Senator Howard Marklein and Larry Jackson of the Ben Jackson Foundation. **Jackson County**
Members of the Jackson County Republican Party handed out Halloween candy to trick-or-treaters at the County's Republican Party office! **Kenosha County **
Republicans in Kenosha County held a star-studded Lincoln Day Dinner featuring WI Republican Party Chairman Brian Schimming, Former RNC Chairman Reince Priebus, and Bryan Steil! **Milwaukee County**
Milwaukee County Republicans held a meeting focusing on efforts to run for local office. Even in a Democrat stronghold, Milwaukee Republicans are determined to find electoral wins at all levels! **Monroe County**
Monroe County Republicans were busy registering voters at the Tomah Gun Show and enjoying a great conservative breakfast meeting! **Ozaukee County**
Ozaukee County Republicans got together for a couple of events recently, including an Oktoberfest celebration. Prost! **Waupaca County**
Republicans in Waupaca County were giving out candy, signs, and stickers at downtown Waupaca's Halloween celebration! **Buffalo County**
Buffalo County Republicans prepared for 2026 with a Farm Team presentation by Christina Estenson! **St. Croix County**
Republicans in St. Croix gathered for their new members meeting and phone bank orientation! Good job getting a head start on 2026! **Extra!**
County Party Chairs from across the state gathered in Tomah for a two day meeting to learn from each other and find strategies to grow our base and increase voter turnout! [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkhulll-didthutlhu-t/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkhulll-didthutlhu-i/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkhulll-didthutlhu-d/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qkhulll-didthutlhu-h/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-qkhulll-didthutlhu-u/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-qkhulll-didthutlhu-o/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-qkhulll-l-b)

Green County The Republican Party of Green County hosted its annual Lincoln Day Dinner at the historic Turner Hall in Monroe on Saturday, October 25th. The event was a huge success, and we heard from Senator Howard Marklein and Larry Jackson of the Ben Jackson Foundation. Jackson County Members of the Jackson County Republican Party handed out Halloween candy to trick-or-treaters at the County's Republican Party office! Kenosha County Republicans in Kenosha County held a star-studded Lincoln Day Dinner featuring WI Republican Party Chairman Brian Schimming, Former RNC Chairman Reince Priebus, and Bryan Steil! Milwaukee County Milwaukee County Republicans held a meeting focusing on efforts to run for local office. Even in a Democrat stronghold, Milwaukee Republicans are determined to find electoral wins at all levels! Monroe County Monroe County Republicans were busy registering voters at the Tomah Gun Show and enjoying a great conservative breakfast meeting! Ozaukee County Ozaukee County Republicans got together for a couple of events recently, including an Oktoberfest celebration. Prost! Waupaca County Republicans in Waupaca County were giving out candy, signs, and stickers at downtown Waupaca's Halloween celebration! Buffalo County Buffalo County Republicans prepared for 2026 with a Farm Team presentation by Christina Estenson! St. Croix County Republicans in St. Croix gathered for their new members meeting and phone bank orientation! Good job getting a head start on 2026! Extra! County Party Chairs from across the state gathered in Tomah for a two day meeting to learn from each other and find strategies to grow our base and increase voter turnout! | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.www.WisGOP.org |

subject: What I saw in Julesburg
body:
Lauren Boebert voted for this. She voted to gut the care her constituents depend on.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tk7_VpCk6yyloSeGw_vohsPY7QEx2EwNmhSzb4Ko0n0CAExMZDkd5T0_eOxSKiBRBQ4Mb0C-vtqvd-jpzIDyj2DQAvYI-i815bmYZMQ3B9hfzDHiw9LxixcCUPq54pXQOQJ7RGa4ZeTQjNNcoM47hcuEOUSHyEp2MbrF-AyWQu7ibeNkE6gkGNHVWtmuVjDuxucYKt3yR87jj6xW6TNngclzvGp2jMDY&c=OFk093V8eGbBE0wl6AwciYbSSdHhLSafT-bwbshhOXfdwBkOL8JBlg==&ch=fBN8KpQy7cfhOIpXARQumYuBHQHDzqEoPFWujzfLg9YgtUz6GzvxmQ==)

---
| Peter, I recently visited Sedgwick Health center in Julesburg, Colorado. They serve seniors, run the local nursing home and keep their ER open around the clock. According to the hospital, 80% of their patients rely on Medicaid and Medicare. But now that the GOP's "Big, Beautiful Bill" has become law, Sedgwick will lose 25% of its Medicaid reimbursement - and all of their services might not survive it. Lauren Boebert voted for this. She voted to gut the care her constituents depend on. I know firsthand how critical accessible health care is for Coloradan families. I fought tooth and nail to get my parents the care they needed when they were both diagnosed with cancer. No one should have to beg for help when they're sick or struggling - but that's exactly the reality Boebert just voted for.
As one rural hospital CEO put it: "Where you live shouldn't determine if you live." He's right. And I'll never stop working to ensure our neighbors get the care they need - no matter their ZIP code. That's why I'm on the road - meeting with hospital leaders, families and local officials who know what's really at stake. But this kind of campaign takes resources, Peter. Every trip we take, every ad we place, every door we knock on - it's all powered by grassroots folks like you. [So I have to ask: Will you pitch in $25 or more before midnight to help me beat Boebert, flip this seat and stand up for Coloradans?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tk7_VpCk6yyloSeGw_vohsPY7QEx2EwNmhSzb4Ko0n0CAExMZDkd5T0_eOxSKiBRB3sFV_0rK1zln2v8Nxfki2oFZGSUYiv-yEyL2d14qAMzmmYMCfVjtA62nXu0aHLmy0sNR2-2KnHxCs4DPuUdFmD3-8SI5bA5BNwU7Cih105hR8mtGP0V9U9Tqk06c0dZxPyC14ybUwOFkpDq15eQ-PP5pUWcXh98YTcUsu7Rxf4=&c=OFk093V8eGbBE0wl6AwciYbSSdHhLSafT-bwbshhOXfdwBkOL8JBlg==&ch=fBN8KpQy7cfhOIpXARQumYuBHQHDzqEoPFWujzfLg9YgtUz6GzvxmQ==)
---

As one rural hospital CEO put it: "Where you live shouldn't determine if you live." He's right. And I'll never stop working to ensure our neighbors get the care they need - no matter their ZIP code. That's why I'm on the road - meeting with hospital leaders, families and local officials who know what's really at stake. But this kind of campaign takes resources, Peter. Every trip we take, every ad we place, every door we knock on - it's all powered by grassroots folks like you.

clean_body: Lauren Boebert voted for this. She voted to gut the care her constituents depend on. | | | | | == | | == | Peter, I recently visited Sedgwick Health center in Julesburg, Colorado. They serve seniors, run the local nursing home and keep their ER open around the clock. According to the hospital, 80% of their patients rely on Medicaid and Medicare. But now that the GOP's "Big, Beautiful Bill" has become law, Sedgwick will lose 25% of its Medicaid reimbursement - and all of their services might not survive it. Lauren Boebert voted for this. She voted to gut the care her constituents depend on. I know firsthand how critical accessible health care is for Coloradan families. I fought tooth and nail to get my parents the care they needed when they were both diagnosed with cancer. No one should have to beg for help when they're sick or struggling - but that's exactly the reality Boebert just voted for. As one rural hospital CEO put it: "Where you live shouldn't determine if you live." He's right. And I'll never stop working to ensure our neighbors get the care they need - no matter their ZIP code. That's why I'm on the road - meeting with hospital leaders, families and local officials who know what's really at stake. But this kind of campaign takes resources, Peter. Every trip we take, every ad we place, every door we knock on - it's all powered by grassroots folks like you. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Thanks for believing in this campaign. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I am officially running for governor of New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.

You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.
| [](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkb2OnTAQhZ_GdCD_YMAFxW4Q3UZRmi2RsQd2JP9cjc1d5e0jpJsHSHvmzMz5dD4_tg-LAdP500aY3b5R2dDGfBzo0Ibwh66UMJ1HpjNvkkvdCtHy6faJxs_OgOz3voFZjIPUxoy6b77mfZqOcfLqsKYHZY0Q1ihtvRBaTLs0Dc73LSH4JATnSndi34XuD2-0ncBoxXoOHmumzuVUgJ624hN2ytY7W2qXoDZh_qr1UZh6Y3Jlci3gLoLuGxOB71yOTK4QsEB7ZGrP_ARKmZhcD_BaDr7nHLiDQd3rar1q3JyND4tnYmp5BRyZHO5JBI9XZGqBaDG8xOqYWn68t_9gXnLJFzlgavn9ub0zOdAdjDCdTC2VLnjZXE4VUmVq-fXW0Owf3xgClmFkPT_vLzdDU_-7lucs_wYAAP__aiKYtg)

**_OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally...
---
**_I 'm officially launching my campaign for governor of New York - and I'd like _YOU_ to be one of our very first Founding Members!_**
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkb2OnTAQhZ_GdCD_YMAFxW4Q3UZRmi2RsQd2JP9cjc1d5e0jpJsHSHvmzMz5dD4_tg-LAdP500aY3b5R2dDGfBzo0Ibwh66UMJ1HpjNvkkvdCtHy6faJxs_OgOz3voFZjIPUxoy6b77mfZqOcfLqsKYHZY0Q1ihtvRBaTLs0Dc73LSH4JATnSndi34XuD2-0ncBoxXoOHmumzuVUgJ624hN2ytY7W2qXoDZh_qr1UZh6Y3Jlci3gLoLuGxOB71yOTK4QsEB7ZGrP_ARKmZhcD_BaDr7nHLiDQd3rar1q3JyND4tnYmp5BRyZHO5JBI9XZGqBaDG8xOqYWn68t_9gXnLJFzlgavn9ub0zOdAdjDCdTC2VLnjZXE4VUmVq-fXW0Owf3xgClmFkPT_vLzdDU_-7lucs_wYAAP__aiKYtg)
---

Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she's brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda.
---
__But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw.__
---
**As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover!**
---
This isn't just another election, Friend.
---
**_It 's the _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ to SAVE New York before it's lost forever!_**
---
Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani's dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees.
---
**But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the _FINAL_ _FIREWALL_ that protects New Yorkers from this insanity!**
---
We're starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a _**ONE-POINT LEAD**_ - _and that 's before I even officially launched our campaign!_
---
As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul's attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory.
---
That's why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign.
---
Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state!
---
**_That 's not a gimmick - it's a REAL, authentic, _600% MATCH_!_**
---
When I'm sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I'll know exactly who I have to thank...
---
**_Our Founding Members like _YOU_ who had my back on day one!_**
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount to become an official Founding Member of my gubernatorial campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul - and help unlock a 600% MATCH. **](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkb2OnTAQhZ_GdCD_YMAFxW4Q3UZRmi2RsQd2JP9cjc1d5e0jpJsHSHvmzMz5dD4_tg-LAdP500aY3b5R2dDGfBzo0Ibwh66UMJ1HpjNvkkvdCtHy6faJxs_OgOz3voFZjIPUxoy6b77mfZqOcfLqsKYHZY0Q1ihtvRBaTLs0Dc73LSH4JATnSndi34XuD2-0ncBoxXoOHmumzuVUgJ624hN2ytY7W2qXoDZh_qr1UZh6Y3Jlci3gLoLuGxOB71yOTK4QsEB7ZGrP_ARKmZhcD_BaDr7nHLiDQd3rar1q3JyND4tnYmp5BRyZHO5JBI9XZGqBaDG8xOqYWn68t_9gXnLJFzlgavn9ub0zOdAdjDCdTC2VLnjZXE4VUmVq-fXW0Owf3xgClmFkPT_vLzdDU_-7lucs_wYAAP__aiKYtg)

FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkb2OnTAQhZ_GdCD_YMAFxW4Q3UZRmi2RsQd2JP9cjc1d5e0jpJsHSHvmzMz5dD4_tg-LAdP500aY3b5R2dDGfBzo0Ibwh66UMJ1HpjNvkkvdCtHy6faJxs_OgOz3voFZjIPUxoy6b77mfZqOcfLqsKYHZY0Q1ihtvRBaTLs0Dc73LSH4JATnSndi34XuD2-0ncBoxXoOHmumzuVUgJ624hN2ytY7W2qXoDZh_qr1UZh6Y3Jlci3gLoLuGxOB71yOTK4QsEB7ZGrP_ARKmZhcD_BaDr7nHLiDQd3rar1q3JyND4tnYmp5BRyZHO5JBI9XZGqBaDG8xOqYWn68t_9gXnLJFzlgavn9ub0zOdAdjDCdTC2VLnjZXE4VUmVq-fXW0Owf3xgClmFkPT_vLzdDU_-7lucs_wYAAP__aiKYtg)

name: Conor Lamb

Hear about how Lindsey went from being a Republican for Hillary to becoming chair of the Crawford County Dems, and even better how an online class dissecting the city of Meadville budget allowed the local Democrats to give police officers back their pensions. A truly impressive example of the kind of local leadership we need to pick up ground and deliver for the people we want to represent.

name: The Flyover
subject: Supreme Court Stay, Farmers' Almanac Closes, and an $800,000 Gold Treasure
body:
Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson on Friday night [temporarily halted a federal judge’s order](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8GNiLAGMLA0MVbuna0XsxzTIWNBS-J_PdV0v5B5yPdq3O-LuMFUk7b7RNWDDSXccNny0iEdWz3veKKU7lXagTHDHXF2iCPWupeKCXkeYyQ8jEaHsOMqLHjGJSzuvfee8WXIL07Q5zMBJ2N1pkrzs7FyRg1Weh6yVN4rSklz0pJq_3J2zkqlNLJDg1eIzMSY6JST98lbbTgnI_ywHqayspzWIj2xroPpgemB1pwSTm_GNNDxds9A6WyMT28PcQViDI2poe-91ZLKf40xS9fIFMTbYNdlBqxMj3wGuL-TDmnZh0z8rZCej9w-leyR9A_AQAA__9cuoGJ) that would have required the Trump administration to make November’s full SNAP food assistance payments by Friday, Nov. 7.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MtqxCAUxvGnMbsEL7m5cFEIs5tuuxRHj4lFYzAnM-Tty5T0Cbo9P_hz-L7u-m5CDOv8aRIo9Fmv8NojIELR-7EVSGDzUXBHc3pTEpTdRM0p72rGajpqZ0I8dVs55QE4iAoUG3reSSklqxZFB9NTZgcBfmy7h-DUMmmseHjpZA9jFdS7xhgdGaM9l43svWNA6UAFtPBwpKXgAubSfOew4gI-nvkJpbE5VVEtiNtOxAfhN8Jv1qCJeW5sXp_5zH7JGzS5zG8VtwOT3vNRLBAxXRnC-_c5gQtHImJyYQ5oYm3cJdakzYR5JWK66jXv_iyvCCsSMc3Bo768KsptrxBj2PuBtHROJsTfd_FfGz8V_wkAAP__Pi-T4w) | |
# Saturday, November 8, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1889, [Montana became the 41st state](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GuiDbgMGFi7-hy99eaS3ZdfCdjZG9ScTbn3K6N7hyNKP5pO_j6q4QYtjv_yGRZZ_dTq8aiZmKq4-jUKJbfhSuDKeHkqhUiE4JNV6kvIjZIYR4uqFF64kU9S1ZOWk1GmOMbDc7zn6V49prP93AjFrOKyAJMSHi7LVvg32_SSlmKYVWpjPao3wvRE8DrdgMgjBwLt1nDjtv5OOZn1S6W05ttBvzUZv-X6OWRi0p7ww7fAWs775RyxYq53I62NEdhX5jo5bKwLTljN3GqS0Wj1eIMVQ9NYO4Jwjxh8B_0vK06jsAAP__EDd6Hw) to join the Union. Before gaining statehood, the region had been governed by seven different U.S. territories until Congress created the Montana Territory in 1864, leading to decades of political wrangling before its eventual admission.

A fresh social-media dustup asks whether you should tuck your pajamas under your pillow each morning. Take a listen to the brouhaha [here on _The Flyover Podcast_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz0Fu6yAQANDT4F2sYXDAXrD4UuRd_jZLhM2Q0OIQ4bFT375qr9ALPOndru7qU07P-3-_kOVY3JPeayZmqm7dXpUWmstWeWV_RF8XqqvPDgHPJylP0LvgUz5c1wQbiZBUQ1YajedhGAbZPGw4q37yoMHMs4pkZjJqmpDA6z6i7ppkfzQpoZcSNA7toGOQBGBAUUdTEB1QSFxq-1HSkx8U81F2qu1clibbB_NrFeqfwFHgeJSNt3YigSPK4_aJu7t8FaFGFuqiTNdUG17vlHNatREd3Bef8q_Ef-rvFr8DAAD__5TYbfU), then weigh in by casting your vote in today's _Poll_ below.

This Christmas, we're partnering with today's sponsor, [Convoy of Hope](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MtqxCAUxvGnMbsEL7m5cFEIs5tuuxRHj4lFYzAnM-Tty5T0Cbo9P_hz-L7u-m5CDOv8aRIo9Fmv8NojIELR-7EVSGDzUXBHc3pTEpTdRM0p72rGajpqZ0I8dVs55QE4iAoUG3reSSklqxZFB9NTZgcBfmy7h-DUMmmseHjpZA9jFdS7xhgdGaM9l43svWNA6UAFtPBwpKXgAubSfOew4gI-nvkJpbE5VVEtiNtOxAfhN8Jv1qCJeW5sXp_5zH7JGzS5zG8VtwOT3vNRLBAxXRnC-_c5gQtHImJyYQ5oYm3cJdakzYR5JWK66jXv_iyvCCsSMc3Bo768KsptrxBj2PuBtHROJsTfd_FfGz8V_wkAAP__Pi-T4w), to make giving truly meaningful--turning holiday generosity into life-changing gifts that bring food, clean water, and hope to families in need around the world.

|
---
## Supreme Court Halts SNAP Order
Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson on Friday night [temporarily halted a federal judge’s order](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8GNiLAGMLA0MVbuna0XsxzTIWNBS-J_PdV0v5B5yPdq3O-LuMFUk7b7RNWDDSXccNny0iEdWz3veKKU7lXagTHDHXF2iCPWupeKCXkeYyQ8jEaHsOMqLHjGJSzuvfee8WXIL07Q5zMBJ2N1pkrzs7FyRg1Weh6yVN4rSklz0pJq_3J2zkqlNLJDg1eIzMSY6JST98lbbTgnI_ywHqayspzWIj2xroPpgemB1pwSTm_GNNDxds9A6WyMT28PcQViDI2poe-91ZLKf40xS9fIFMTbYNdlBqxMj3wGuL-TDmnZh0z8rZCej9w-leyR9A_AQAA__9cuoGJ) that would have required the Trump administration to make November’s full SNAP food assistance payments by Friday, Nov. 7. Jackson said the pause [will remain in effect](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuunDAURb_GdEZ-8SpcRIroJk0UpUQHfBic2BjZhxnx91fML9x6S1trrb-P6QE--P35CyJaWtO047sEJMI8lfPIGHFJZ6ZCcK2QI-YCYVJCNVxKLvrJgQ_XZCpnV0SFukIru1Y1wzAMstqsNsvqxNK0sxGi7-d-bhtndL9gLxBWqLy936QUvZSiVUM9tKuTKEQnNBqcHTMCnaeU63_J77ThGq70wlwvKVbBbkRHYfoHUyNTI8zLbVA_0z0zNf75zdRI-YwHBxf97gtlIJ92DuV_4XAcCKHwjyT3MaLzQBguvkEgns87DlNjoZQvpkfvmP4pVacGo0VXZeuOtw_Bl7ZjRjwj-PDhom_FfFn1FQAA__9hx4rd) until 48 hours after the 1st U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals issues a judgment on the matter. Her order didn’t rule on the substance of the case. Earlier Friday, the Trump administration had announced that it was preparing to [fully fund the benefits](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOnTAQhJ8GOiNfOFwKF2no_rQp0R68HBytL7KXH_H2EWnyAGmmGc1o5vv1tX6BJx8_PyGg5T2tEa9KyIxlrWcuGHBLZ-HKcO9QApYKtGqpX0IpIafVgad77Vtnd0SNpkWrxkG_5nmeVXvYF6r3MLrRODP3Zhpx0Jua-8FMo3bbIFtvnzal5KSUHPTczcPuFEo5SoM9vl3TS3SeU-l-Jx_5wJ3u9I2l21JoyR7MuTbmR6OXRi_XdXU3HCk9bqOX506jl_MRKOw3wkYvNUIWb4y4e66CgLGy4HKGLMAFH33lAuxTFLlghoJVcBIZbrGfRP-SUAXhB0i8gZlQbCmyjydWoSY1KWmM6g4O1Bbr8uWJfB3GppefAJ7-7uf_gv5t9Z8AAAD__7XOmaM) in accordance with the original lower court’s order, even as Justice Department lawyers were trying to block it. _“The court below took the current shutdown as effective license to declare a federal bankruptcy and appoint itself the trustee, charged with picking winners and losers among those seeking some part of the limited pool of remaining federal funds,”_ Solicitor General D. John Sauer [wrote in the emergency appeal.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOwyAQBdDT4I4IMMamoNjGXbbd0hqbISbCxoJxotx-lWhvsPVo_td_P9fpCjHF_fYNGzoKedrxWRMSYZnqeRTccMlnoUrwClA2LBXSpITquJRcDJOHmF6TbrwLiArbBp3sjeqstVY2qxv62WptRDvIJfiAcyslQDBaoRm8Xpro3mlSikFKYZS9WBO8RCF60aLG2TMt0EfK5XLPcacVQ3rlB5bLkrcmuZXoqKz9YmpkaqQV15jS-8bUWPB2JqCYd6bGzw4-A1HCytTYddaIXnMq53Zwn-8cjgMhVV53OHg53y78D4F_vpkam-L88YwpxWp6psVtg_ipa-hffg-nfgMAAP__NrmGog)
## China Ups Naval Stakes
China launched its largest and most advanced aircraft carrier, the _Fujian_ , marking a significant step forward for Beijing, which now [has the world's largest navy](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u3CAURleDO0aAGf8UFBNF7l4U6RVRKusarsdEGKwLHjK7j5wsIfWRjr7v_PiYP8AHH5_fYEdT1jRHrDlgKUhzPg_CHW06qeQC7xVoR8oQZiXUnUvJxTA78OE968aZFVFh26CRfafu4ziOstmMloB6UZ1oB0ClFt0ufdcNd7UsPaB2jTeXTUoxSCk6Nd7GbnUShehFixoXx7RA50ui26_kY9lwDe_0QrrZtDfBbKUcmbUPpiamplrrbc_xYkxNGPmZmZquUxdMFBxTk918BB7gjHbDzCNWDp4swVq4BSKPxH3kEV4QOIFFXn3ZeNnwnw6IPx7y-8_P8Ju1U7Lesfbrl6si1vyJdDRk3FF9CD53PdPiuYMPf_eW_4r8MupPAAAA___uVJLm) in terms of sheer number of ships. The _Fujian_ , the country's third warship, is equipped with electromagnetic catapults which allow three different types of planes with heavier payloads to be launched at higher speeds. The _Fujian_ is only the [second aircraft carrier](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO5CAQRL_GzrCAsRkTEFzibC-90GpDs-4VBqth1jd_f_L9wqZVUqne-_OxfgAlyp-_4UDXYlkzXjVha8hrfZ2MB_ry4lYbvCPwgVwhrVrqSSgl5LwGoPRexz64iKjx0aNTT6Mna61V_e7AKDSgIs5xDmHeLKI0s5-8mcEqufXk7jWl5KyUNNoO1sSgUMqnfOCIW-hGiYFa4eGrUG47xvQu38iDL0ef3N7aWbvHr04vnV6u6xry5m-Ku7-Twil0eoFK0OnF75RBAB1V4N8TchBnuZDFCZ4ieZHxEvH1RZAFEHuG2IQHZkIW7DPoUU9q6tmF86KUqJpnN8rPAyj9P9R-ZPHb6X8BAAD__xyAiWA) in the world to use an electromagnetic catapult system, along with the latest American carrier, the _USS Gerald R. Ford_. Most American carriers use older steam catapult technology that China has bypassed.
## Sunset for _Farmers' Almanac_
_The Farmers' Almanac_ , a 208-year-old American institution, announced that [it was ending publication](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3upDAMR08TOpBjviZFim3SzbZbokCcIatARokZxO1XjPYG_8ou_Gy_35_n9LQhhv31226k2adpp7NEYqY8leOdaaMlHZkL28vbvFEuNk4I2NdS1vCYnA3xmrrKaU-E1Fak5Thgr5RSslq1d0hukdB56N2gvAeEXvrRq7lv1TxXQd_bpISHlDCgatTgnSSAEVrqaHaiA3KBU27-prDzSj5e6UO5WdJWRb0yv4tofwk0As15ns1RLCdnr3tAoCmc8iXQ3GZ3sRzSLtDcZwUaKQUaGAWa_361jZvd7VLT7sL-qst6MN-NS-fNPUbZYa8G-EJV1u59hhhDGUbRwWuzIX5f4x_l-dH4LwAA__8JvYhj) with its current 2026 edition due to financial issues. Since 1818, readers have relied on the _Farmers' Almanac_ for long-range winter forecasts and articles about crops, gardening, cooking and home remedies. _”This decision, though difficult, reflects the growing financial challenges of producing and distributing the Almanac in today’s chaotic media environment,”_ the company said in [its official statement.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1ugzAUBeCngc3IP8TgwUOXbOnaEV3wdXIrYyPbBPH2VaqoL9D90zlH5-s23YACxfsnrGirT1PEowSsFfNU9i3jikvacy0VTg95xVwgTJLLCxOC8XFyQOGc-tZZjyhRtWjFoOXFGGNE-7CovFD9AOMycD7PSoBDrUc1O6N1j6Yl-0oTgo9CcC1NZ7R3AjkfuMIeZ9f0HB3VlLvvRLE-0IczPTF3S1rbYB-1bqVRH428NvJ6HEf3t3OFCMuLNfKK0bHkGUSGGdibsLdhEGPa44KFeYoQ2LbPgRaolGKbrdsOCoGKHpqe31eg8Ntd_3XY08qfAAAA__8ZJoKq)

A separate but similar publication, _The Old Farmer's Almanac_ , said [on Facebook that it would continue](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M1u4yAcBPCnsW-xAH-FA4ddZZ3VRlkpu02j9GJh-BPTgHEB2_XbV-mhL9DTXEajn-ZybI9cGz3c_nILLCrXDrAEAzGCb8M0erAg3ORjiHxV3FvwgZuWIFJuMN6gbSu5NmtbpJIpAAJ5CgzXFSkppRSnPcsJLkmFAOeUF4XqVFcrqIWAnNSKYJlq9ljDGG0xRhWhGa2UxIBQjXIooJNJgUDq6Hz26vQQe1BmdTP4TDibGtbHOIYk_5GQJiHNsiyZ4gI65-6PQkKa2IMz8gtv-cBFQprRhRgeqTotkT7T-v6Cf4n1D_1vd-u_K9e7-XDQpx2tyu2zW56mczVTK37T7v5zvayTuoRuf9oP78X4djWpZ3JctDE6VHVSoJvl2nwS47d-nRn5CAAA__8xG479) publication. It’s the oldest survivor of that early generation of American almanacs, dating back to 1792.

| Delivering Results

Alan Wilson has spent his career on the front lines of the fight to protect South Carolina. As Attorney General, he has led with integrity, toughness, and an unwavering commitment to defending our people, our Constitution, and the rule of law. Wilson has spearheaded major legislative victories for public safety and victim protection, including the recent passage of the Administrative Subpoena bill to fast-track child predator investigations. He quadrupled the size of South Carolina's Internet Crimes Against Children Taskforce, helping secure over 1,200 convictions of child predators. His office also established and expanded the Human Trafficking Task Force, transforming South Carolina from one of the worst to one of the strongest states in the nation in combatting human trafficking. Alan has led the charge in prosecuting violent criminals, launching a Violent Crimes Case Reduction Unit (VCCRU) and hiring more prosecutors and victim advocates to cut case backlogs. He helped pass landmark reforms to domestic violence laws and championed judicial reform to restore public trust in South Carolina's courts. Wilson has defended South Carolina values in courtrooms across the country. He's taken on the Biden Administration and fought back against federal overreach, whether it's on immigration, radical gender ideology in schools, unconstitutional COVID mandates, or targeting of religious liberty. And when President Trump was under attack, Wilson stood with him in the courtroom and in the trenches.
---

**_OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally...
---
**_I 'm officially launching my campaign for governor of New York - and I'd like _YOU_ to be one of our very first Founding Members!_**
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](https://email.alert.conservativelibertywire.com/c/eJyUkb-O2zAMh59G3hxIlCw7g4drDU-9ouiS0VBlykdAfwJaTnBvX7jI1O1W8iP5Eb_b-_LuKFLefrqEo4_PhfeFXCohkCcX4ycfOVPeQuGtLCCha5Vq5XBy0KxjNwBebYOj6i1YqUHr5mNUYDqA1QdrnAm9N0ENV7X25jpY44ehofFcpZQcFEip5QVkF0KA4K9a9TYoYaSLyPXiS96RH67SAyP9Qa6fT2K8-JKaOH7Uet-FfhMwC5h39Afj5UmZcT0JATNG2rENhdutPJBzYQFzwLUDuxopUXq0-hzX81HT4l26O9qy0NPLsBdgz07ClY4k9ITJUXwVqxd6-v7j1v4H7-Vgj0JPv2_LNwGWTzOmvAk9VT7whfmSK-Yq9PTrreFxvT8pRtptL4zczjP_3qxfD-Yxwt8AAAD__9FMmak)
---

Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she's brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda.
---
__But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw.__
---
**As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover!**
---
This isn't just another election, Friend.
---
**_It 's the _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ to SAVE New York before it's lost forever!_**
---
Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani's dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees.
---
**But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the _FINAL_ _FIREWALL_ that protects New Yorkers from this insanity!**
---
We're starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a _**ONE-POINT LEAD**_ - _and that 's before I even officially launched our campaign!_
---
As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul's attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory.
---
That's why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign.
---
Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state!
---
**_That 's not a gimmick - it's a REAL, authentic, _600% MATCH_!_**
---
When I'm sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I'll know exactly who I have to thank...
---
**_Our Founding Members like _YOU_ who had my back on day one!_**
---

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Drag Ban OK'd, Texas Tech vs. BYU, and Texas Book Festival
body:
A federal appeals court has ruled that Texas can enforce a 2023 law prohibiting “[sexually explicit performances](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ugzAUhZ8GNpB_MIHBQxe2dO2Iru3rYNVgZN-E8PZVeIVuRzrSd35-7vMdQgzb4xtW1PT2ad7wKBGJMM8uw8PAln4d4RsKoV1exZxPmAUTquG8YcPsIMRz7mqnDXMjr1HzWy96JiW_1YvupRo7yYSUPaBHJjsJwovReONt51wd9AfGORu4YFyp1is-OItcAoARzFQdQxco5ZYWvIr4eKYX5tamtY56IdpLJb8qMVViOo6jPWFJ6eNWYvrMqcQEmYKNeMl9R4ilsemZqYlIpbmoDW4-ZYsNH5SUo-pVu9Aa66zdfoQYQ-lvVcceK4R4RdP_Dntp8RcAAP__jESA1A)” where children might be present, reversing a lower court ruling that deemed the law unconstitutional.

## Federal Court Allows Enforcement of 'Drag Ban'
A federal appeals court has ruled that Texas can enforce a 2023 law prohibiting “[sexually explicit performances](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ugzAUhZ8GNpB_MIHBQxe2dO2Iru3rYNVgZN-E8PZVeIVuRzrSd35-7vMdQgzb4xtW1PT2ad7wKBGJMM8uw8PAln4d4RsKoV1exZxPmAUTquG8YcPsIMRz7mqnDXMjr1HzWy96JiW_1YvupRo7yYSUPaBHJjsJwovReONt51wd9AfGORu4YFyp1is-OItcAoARzFQdQxco5ZYWvIr4eKYX5tamtY56IdpLJb8qMVViOo6jPWFJ6eNWYvrMqcQEmYKNeMl9R4ilsemZqYlIpbmoDW4-ZYsNH5SUo-pVu9Aa66zdfoQYQ-lvVcceK4R4RdP_Dntp8RcAAP__jESA1A)” where children might be present, reversing a lower court ruling that deemed the law unconstitutional. Opponents of the law refer to it as the “[drag ban](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O6yAURleDOywu4J8UFK9xl9dOaV3MJUZDTAQkjnc_ijU7mP7T0Tnf13W-Yohhu_3HO5n69mneaC-RaqU8u4w3i1v6dpXeWCot66vY44mzFLLjAFyMs8MQj1k3zljhLtCQgaGXvVAKhmY1yg_OgvRLf9GghbCDBxjlMIpOkQVsgvnAAMQIUkDXtb6D0S0EChGtFJZpQS7UlNu60ini45FelNsl3Zto1lofhal_TE5MTvu-tw5jxJJsofw7Y3L6dDE5nQD-KeNlTTu3uPFMYSsVKzluD-7JUcbIl_TMlWvRg9bqwuTUZOMee4gxlH5gWtzuGOIpUf923cvInwAAAP__WPeD-A)” and claim it directly targets drag performers and violates their right to free speech. The ruling sends the case back to the lower courts for a [fuller analysis](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAMQL8GOmVsQyApXFyTbq-9kpFtGTzr2FlbQPj7G_ILW6nQ6M3T-_c1fWGIIc1_8Uma3z5PifYaiZnK5ArOBlP-dkxvrEx22ao5VpyUUFeQEsRtchjiMfWt00a4u2xJy3FQg-g6ObaLHsk7Mqi866i3dxqkGa2422FQsvfetUGfMCnFTSohr9eLv8qbsyQ7RDRKmKYX5ALncuGFPiI-HnmjcrH52Ua9ML9q0_1p1KNRj--Vt3PRqMf5yTmQQ06w5xJdox74ehHGCjavhQFjzHuFDxY4AyWfiyWIuEMlSoAVClUuwXLYCLKHswrU5TyLs-GfgDBTclTgZyUqEBwlDny0RbvXHmIMdRibXsxPDPHjzL8rvWn1PwAA__9QH5kw), with justices saying there was insufficient “review of all applications of the law” in the lower court’s overturning. The court also stated that the law would not be enforced against drag performances unless they include overtly sexual acts.
## Paxton Acts Against Tylenol, Roblox
Texas Attorney Gen. Ken Paxton’s office took action this week against a range of entities, from [Tylenol](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM1uhCAUhZ8GdxguqDgLFk0a081026W5yFXpoEyA-fHtm5lX6PrknHzn-zmPZ_TB78s3bmTKc47jTo8cqBRKo0u4WNzjxRV6Yi40rfdsjxuOUsiWA3DRjw59OMamcsYKd4KKDOhOdkIp0NVqrBV2Bq2wPSH01HWT6Imk7hulJwBXefMaAxA9SAFtW88t9G4iUIhopbCsEeR8iakuK71B5nDEO6V6ilsVzFrKNTP1weTA5IB2ej2ol_iKmRy-CENZmRzeVY75kvnvzS3EE-WS0O9-X3hMjhIvR6A9Br7hhRLPJV6ZHHKJ6WBq8I6pT5BaNk3b6CoZd334EHzuNGvEsqEPb6LyP493I_8CAAD__2EliIc) to the Dallas Stars. On Thursday, Paxton filed a request with a federal judge to issue a restraining order on the makers of Tylenol, which would force the company to stop advertising its pain reliever as safe for pregnant women and young children. Also on Thursday, Paxton sued the company that operates [Roblox](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTHOozAQhU9jOkfjMcGmoNiG7t92SzTGk8TKxI7AgeT2qyDtCbaaYp4-vU_vz8_0Q0lSvv6mBw_1fSlT5n0VrpWXKS50DZTLPVZ-01p5vm1r-LxoQsCzNkaDnyIl-UxtE4cAsTcND8Z12IG1xjW3AdoYwfVoOuvaCD15B723HUSYLQfbpOELMwa8QTDn8-lyNj7ObCwRBYSgWuCYallO9cZHkYt8ysbLaS6PRoZbrc9V2V8KR4Xjvu-n-_bi71PhSEtNs7DC8eulcJQykygcD9C_q--c9ZPetWQttK-vVPVSgpS3JhG-ctRbKkI1laxLlpRZr3Th-jni-pFyWb407Hpt0XLwbdB27jvdcu-0D2R1RI_euoCArlmG-NyTSFo7p1q4PijJ4VP_b4VtwL8BAAD__2s-m78), a popular online children’s game, alleging the site is a “breeding ground for predators” and is “flagrantly ignoring" online safety laws.

Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Federal Court Allows Enforcement of 'Drag Ban' A federal appeals court has ruled that Texas can enforce a 2023 law prohibiting “” where children might be present, reversing a lower court ruling that deemed the law unconstitutional. Opponents of the law refer to it as the “” and claim it directly targets drag performers and violates their right to free speech. The ruling sends the case back to the lower courts for a , with justices saying there was insufficient “review of all applications of the law” in the lower court’s overturning. The court also stated that the law would not be enforced against drag performances unless they include overtly sexual acts. Paxton Acts Against Tylenol, Roblox Texas Attorney Gen. Ken Paxton’s office took action this week against a range of entities, from to the Dallas Stars. On Thursday, Paxton filed a request with a federal judge to issue a restraining order on the makers of Tylenol, which would force the company to stop advertising its pain reliever as safe for pregnant women and young children. Also on Thursday, Paxton sued the company that operates , a popular online children’s game, alleging the site is a “breeding ground for predators” and is “flagrantly ignoring" online safety laws. Texas Tech, A&M in Top-25 Matchups Today ESPN's is in Lubbock today as the No. 8 Texas Tech Raiders take on undefeated No. 7 BYU, kicking off at 11:00 a.m. Former Texas Tech great and Kansas City Chiefs quarterback will be on hand as College Game Day ’s guest picker, as Lubbock hosts the iconic show for the first time since 2008. subject: DA Dysfunction: Top ADA Exits Jackie Sartoris’ Office Amid Allegations of Toxic Work Environment
body:

------------------------------------------------------------
By Jon Fetherston on Nov 08, 2025 06:49 am
A senior prosecutor has departed the Cumberland County District Attorney’s Office amid allegations of internal conflict and concerns about workplace culture under District Attorney Jackie Sartoris, sources told the Maine Wire. An office spokesperson confirmed that Assistant District Attorney Valerie Adams is no longer employed with the office. The confirmation followed information provided to the [...]

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.
---

name: Catalina Lauf
subject: I can’t stop thinking about what we could do together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina Lauf for Congress
body:
Everyone says it’s impossible but I hope you’ll at least hear me out

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bt48/?__vbtrk=MzMyMzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzMyMzI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

Just think of all the things we could do together.

With you by my side, we could make a real difference.

Because we both know that actual change happens in the town squares and church halls across America – not at the elitist cocktail parties in DC.

**My name is Catalina Lauf.**

I’m the pro-Trump conservative running in the most hotly-contested race in Florida.

_The RINO establishment is deadset on filling this seat with another puppet who will do the bidding of the ruling class in DC._

But my allegiance is to God, Country, and We the People.

Which is why the Establishment made it their sole focus to demolish me the second I announced my candidacy.

My campaign will be built by the hardworking people who make this country run, and they see our grassroots movement as a direct threat to their regime.

_They despise ordinary people like you and I – and they’ll go to EXTREME lengths to keep us silenced and their grip on power tight._

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, friend.

**We need to build a huge wave of support to start this campaign strong and build an early lead.**

The RINO establishment has endless resources to drown us out before we can even get off the ground. We can’t afford to stumble out of the blocks.

Peter,
As you may have seen, Lauren Boebert dressed as a Mexican caricature for Halloween while her boyfriend went as an ICE agent and it is going over exactly how you would expect.
Colorado Latinos, even conservative ones, are rejecting her en masse.
This is not going to help her perilous 2026 election bid.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e0er9ChBIRmFQKkjHy_wSojcsB2OoXfaPX28jCD07Icy3bQaZKyxTOnDBFNToXL5Mo9A54mrHHiyALbov2rrfC2twsQVThw77ppjH3Ef_tzzbmm7E60A9YKX-qQcuZjEppZ_oPD0qZlSjCTVpNm-CuK2OdhbFARi3ZNQp658DSCTfHKGRAIV2pV8vq477Vfhmr0i96Q-5rMo-2L0of9kRVsA5UqNmwJ-&c=67zWrCWxvXrZYFrUX-C5HkzqwZVRKYwf8cMNDWk6fGg1X3z2IR2AIw==&ch=UiUAVnFAeww3u65WWtLTCuKCqlPkdPtbbaUL59syeKs6smkfY9-jyA==)
---

For decades the GOP has wooed Latino voters and in 2024 it seemed these efforts had finally paid off, Trump trailed Kamala by just 3 points with this demographic.
In the 2025 elections on Tuesday, Latino voters in CA, NJ, VA, and PA swung hard in the other direction voting overwhelmingly in favor of Democrats. Exit polls showed that many voted directly to oppose MAGA.
It's now clear to the vast majority of the Latino electorate that the promises Trump made are lies. MAGA's hatred lies towards all Latino people, not just undocumented immigrants.
Boebert's Halloween costume is a testament to this. In a recent poll, 7 out of every 10 Colorado latino voters agreed that the nation was headed in the wrong direction under the new administration.
To win in 2026 Boebert will need these voters and they aren't having it. She is in Congress because of just 546 votes and in 2024, her Democratic opponent Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a democrat has ever had in this district while Boebert underperformed Trump in every county.
Trisha is back to flip this district and finish the job in 2026 and we need your help. [The best way to support our outreach to Latino voters and ensure that we have Spanish campaign lit and Spanish fluent canvassers in this district is with a monthly donation of $50, $25, or whatever amount is meaningful to you.](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e0er9ChBIRmFQKkjHy_wSojcsB2OoXfaPX28jCD07Icy3bQaZKyxTOnDBFNToXL5N51o0jsRbGyBvnIEvOSYl2Q89VLMt2IFYdR1bsDw51hQW_rpo50gRkZ7CU02N7Nsp2EMIoQJ_gZYb3PKKKpD_qtWbNOzCOEay6mYVElG5ZvA9p0kD3-E5Mqwt8O7SsYuQDnCu2NLK60Gv1063DALnbQHTHOBPAAW8dz0F8Hxs1k=&c=67zWrCWxvXrZYFrUX-C5HkzqwZVRKYwf8cMNDWk6fGg1X3z2IR2AIw==&ch=UiUAVnFAeww3u65WWtLTCuKCqlPkdPtbbaUL59syeKs6smkfY9-jyA==)

body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tb1wj2TABA7maKDi6xCdpVaYKQ3wkotjCmTomEY7deh00am_t3DMebtoeRiQm4rBMa5MUIH0_7ekM-qZWtKZ62ToC_q3lCDFoT3TltVAQrMH9mmCnToqi64OU91sCITKf-DMSXUL5p9IUYpeiWDMoX3WzCo7rgaEUV0zsecWqbW1EFF5X6fVGZFTx-q1KDdvU3z7qkCVHemNfrhwEdqevWA-nYUWmpcF&c=20O1jknU6ogCBiNl6hRSVIzOQM4I5TzsLaV4_-aVvCnwkkG5OvJLNw==&ch=0Lq-Qi1e5AxN-f56MuZn_LqDGXTO19z0FJNDhplJDQylfmpwr2iSLg==)

|

Peter,
As you may have seen, Lauren Boebert dressed as a Mexican caricature for Halloween while her boyfriend went as an ICE agent and it is going over exactly how you would expect.
Colorado Latinos, even conservative ones, are rejecting her en masse.
This is not going to help her perilous 2026 election bid.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tb1wj2TABA7maKDi6xCdpVaYKQ3wkotjCmTomEY7deh00am_t3DMebtoeRiQm4rBMa5MUIH0_7ekM-qZWtKZ62ToC_q3lCDFoT3TltVAQrMH9mmCnToqi64OU91sCITKf-DMSXUL5p9IUYpeiWDMoX3WzCo7rgaEUV0zsecWqbW1EFF5X6fVGZFTx-q1KDdvU3z7qkCVHenowvckNEQXHp_OazmqJipm&c=20O1jknU6ogCBiNl6hRSVIzOQM4I5TzsLaV4_-aVvCnwkkG5OvJLNw==&ch=0Lq-Qi1e5AxN-f56MuZn_LqDGXTO19z0FJNDhplJDQylfmpwr2iSLg==)
---

For decades the GOP has wooed Latino voters and in 2024 it seemed these efforts had finally paid off, Trump trailed Kamala by just 3 points with this demographic.
In the 2025 elections on Tuesday, Latino voters in CA, NJ, VA, and PA swung hard in the other direction voting overwhelmingly in favor of Democrats. Exit polls showed that many voted directly to oppose MAGA.
It's now clear to the vast majority of the Latino electorate that the promises Trump made are lies. MAGA's hatred lies towards all Latino people, not just undocumented immigrants.
Boebert's Halloween costume is a testament to this. In a recent poll, 7 out of every 10 Colorado latino voters agreed that the nation was headed in the wrong direction under the new administration.
To win in 2026 Boebert will need these voters and they aren't having it. She is in Congress because of just 546 votes and in 2024, her Democratic opponent Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a democrat has ever had in this district while Boebert underperformed Trump in every county.
Trisha is back to flip this district and finish the job in 2026 and we need your help. [The best way to support our outreach to Latino voters and ensure that we have Spanish campaign lit and Spanish fluent canvassers in this district is with a monthly donation of $50, $25, or whatever amount is meaningful to you.](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Tb1wj2TABA7maKDi6xCdpVaYKQ3wkotjCmTomEY7deh00am_t3DMebtoeRiQm4rBSgsiASBST09rX47FqKflIcbuA1teosCLBz1oWwoxB5TkcO5fXr-P6PMHGkWhP4MmvpTXZhLDkAHVsdHVkoXM3FmH29eLAfyIAk8215eLLrtaGt_NvKPranjkwiOpZy2ZyVPOjX759hl7wRaVmMTdBC948KZOGzUBcgp8zAddkWY=&c=20O1jknU6ogCBiNl6hRSVIzOQM4I5TzsLaV4_-aVvCnwkkG5OvJLNw==&ch=0Lq-Qi1e5AxN-f56MuZn_LqDGXTO19z0FJNDhplJDQylfmpwr2iSLg==)

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Trump is attempting to evade accountability
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Voters have spoken.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118896964/581255482/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251107reaction_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDhjNTMzOC1hYmJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f-Eh8In508iM4Cowm6brTArU_Nfcy8xCGViqz5ELgWA=) Peter,

On Tuesday, American voters sent a LOUD message to Trump and his cronies that they’ve had enough. We no longer are going to stand by as families starve, healthcare premiums skyrocket, and the price of everyday goods continue to rise.

In response, Trump deviated from his own messaging to urge Republicans to end the government shutdown. However, _**instead of calling on them to do so by addressing the impending healthcare crisis**_ , he stated that they should pass legislation that would make it “**impossible to beat us.** ” This comes as Trump continues to use SNAP as a bargaining chip by illegally refusing to release the funds allocated to keep the program running through a government shutdown.

**This is the MAGA way: Attempt to evade accountability by undermining our democracy.**

Trump knows that his party is in trouble – and that is why he is calling on Republicans to “terminate the filibuster,” and “pack” the Supreme Court. To save our nation, we must maintain the momentum that we saw on Election Day.

[**The House is a critical check and balance on the Trump regime, and in order to defend our fundamental rights, we need to elect Democrats in 2026. Will you rush $5 to join the fight today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118896966/581255493/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251107reaction_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDhjNTMzOC1hYmJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f-Eh8In508iM4Cowm6brTArU_Nfcy8xCGViqz5ELgWA=)

Together,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---
********[DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118896968/581255500/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251107reaction_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_biobox&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDhjNTMzOC1hYmJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f-Eh8In508iM4Cowm6brTArU_Nfcy8xCGViqz5ELgWA=)********

name: David Hogg
subject: Help Christian cross the finish line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Christian came in first — but he’s headed to a runoff, and the fight starts now.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251108-1&t=1&akid=2816%2E587540%2EyOPxCX)
Hey Peter,
Major news: **Christian Menefee came in first place in a crowded 16-person race** on Tuesday night.
Because when voters see a leader who actually shows up for them by suing people like Trump, corporate polluters, and price gougers, they respond. Voters want fighters, not folders.
**But we can’t celebrate yet, Peter — his race isn’t over.** Because no candidate cleared the 50% threshold, Christian is headed to a runoff, and the real work to win starts _right now._
**[We need your help to finish this fight. If you’re able to, please chip in $5 right now, split between Christian’s campaign and Leaders We Deserve.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251108_1_houston.-ha3aN&refcode=em20251108-2816&amount=5&t=3&akid=2816%2E587540%2EyOPxCX)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251108_1_houston.-ha3aN&amount=5&refcode=em20251108-2816&t=4&akid=2816%2E587540%2EyOPxCX)**
Christian has never backed down from a fight. Not when corporations polluted Black and Brown neighborhoods, not when Texas Republicans tried to overturn election results, and not when Trump tried to rip funding away from Houston. He stood up, took them to court, and won.
That’s who Christian is and why Houston showed up for him. And he’s not backing down from this runoff either. But to win, we need to double down right now.
**We only have a short timeframe to raise funds and mobilize volunteers to drive voter turnout.** In a runoff election, especially one in an off-year, turnout is everything — it _will_ decide the outcome of this race.
And here’s the truth: Christian’s runoff opponent finished close behind and is nearly matching him in fundraising. The momentum from his first-place finish is real, but we can’t afford to slow down now.
Christian is _this close_ to becoming Houston’s next representative in Congress and leading the fight for lasting change. We can’t drop the ball now. Thank you for helping him get 1st place on Tuesday — now let's get him across the finish line. Christian has shown up for his constituents in Houston. He will show up for us in Congress, but right now he needs us to show up for him. Leaders We Deserve’s Regional Finance Director, Matt, has been on the ground in Houston since the election getting Christian’s campaign in the best shape possible for the runoff. Because of your continued support, we’re able to provide that kind of hands-on advising to our candidates.
**[Can you split $5 or anything else between Christian’s campaign and Leaders We Deserve to help us finish the job and win this runoff?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251108_1_houston.-ha3aN&refcode=em20251108-2816&amount=5&t=5&akid=2816%2E587540%2EyOPxCX)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251108_1_houston.-ha3aN&amount=5&refcode=em20251108-2816&t=24&akid=2816%2E587540%2EyOPxCX)**
I really wish we didn’t need to raise so much money to get young people elected. Emails like this should not be needed because it shouldn't cost millions to run. But for now, we need your support to elect Democrats with a spine who aren’t propped up by special interests. That’s where you come in.
Thank you for your support.
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251108-1&t=25&refcode2=2816_587540_yOPxCX&akid=2816%2E587540%2EyOPxCX)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=2816%2E587540%2EyOPxCX)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2816%2E587540%2EyOPxCX)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

People are saying you have to “see it to believe it...” and they’re right. | | |

---
Hi Peter,

National studies continue to rank Oklahoma as one of the worst states (if not THE worst state) for women. Oklahoma has the highest rates of domestic violence and the worst maternal death rates nationwide. They have one of the strictest abortion bans in the country, with no exceptions for rape or incest. Most recently, in the aftermath of Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” more than half of Oklahoma's rural hospitals are at risk of closing.

Despite all of that, the Republican frontrunner for Governor of Oklahoma – Charles McCall, who is currently the GOP Speaker of the Oklahoma House of Representatives – has decided that the biggest issue he’d like to address with voters is that “gender is god-given, and there’s only two of ‘em.”

See below for his, truly, BANANAS, ad. You have to see it to believe it.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118906346/581285519/1126729394?refcode=EM_F_251110CyndiAD_N_AP_90DO_10_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjZjI0MzY5LWFmYmMtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1LoCl5lv19FlDMiBy6r5uXukt9_WSRXLEfIXtil64To=)
---
In addition to this horrifying ad, McCall’s campaign website brags about his record of passing the **_strongest anti-choice law_** in the nation, supporting legislation that attacks vaccines, holding an A rating from the NRA, banning sanctuary cities, erasing Critical Race Theory from schools, and much more.

**THE GOOD NEWS is that, if McCall wins the Republican primary, he will have a formidable and qualified Democratic WOMAN as his opponent. Her name is Cyndi Munson, and she is running a strong, well-organized campaign to be the GOVERNOR of Oklahoma. Her Bold Move is honored to support her.**

**Unsurprisingly, Oklahoma is among the states with the lowest women’s representation in its state government – less than 20%. As outlined above, this underrepresentation is reflected in the state’s dangerous and draconian policies for women:** [**Now is the time to block men like Charles McCall from passing even more harmful legislation – and bullying his own constituents. Will you help Her Bold Move bring pro-women leadership to Oklahoma by rushing a split donation of $20.25 or more today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-cyndiad/?refcode=EM_F_251110CyndiAD_N_AP_90DO_10_G_N_L1&amount=20.25)

As Governor, Cyndi will repeal Oklahoma’s abortion ban. As she’s been meeting with thousands of voters across her state, she’s found that voters on both sides of the aisle feel that the current anti-abortion laws do not meet their values and instead prevent women from getting the care they need.

Additionally, according to the 2024 March of Dimes report, 51.9% of Oklahomans do not have access to maternity healthcare, and an additional 18.2% have low/moderate access to healthcare. As Governor, Cyndi wants to increase access to maternity healthcare for women across the state and fully eliminate these healthcare deserts. Her plan is to introduce legislation that would increase funding for hospitals and assist in the recruitment of doctors who specialize in women’s healthcare.

**Here’s the thing:** Cyndi flipped a _majority_ _Republican_ district and has kept it for the last 10 years – she’s actually increased her win margins election after election. She accomplished this by knocking on doors, having honest conversations, and staying true to her values. Now, she needs our help to keep up that momentum.

We’ve seen Democratic Governors win in “red” states – despite having Republican supermajorities in their State Houses and Senate chambers. Kentucky and Kansas, for example, have both elected popular Democratic Governors. **If anyone can do it, it’s Cyndi Munson.**

[**As women across Oklahoma endure harsh conditions inflicted on them by their majority-male government, we can help make an actual difference – and ensure men like Charles McCall do not get to govern women’s bodies. Please rush critical early support to our efforts by chipping in a split $20.25 or more contribution between Cyndi’s campaign and Her Bold Move today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-cyndiad/?refcode=EM_F_251110CyndiAD_N_AP_90DO_10_G_N_L2&amount=20.25)

Thank you,

Colleen Davis

Despite all of that, the Republican frontrunner for Governor of Oklahoma – Charles McCall, who is currently the GOP Speaker of the Oklahoma House of Representatives – has decided that the biggest issue he’d like to address with voters is that “gender is god-given, and there’s only two of ‘em.” See below for his, truly, BANANAS, ad. You have to see it to believe it. = In addition to this horrifying ad, McCall’s campaign website brags about his record of passing the strongest anti-choice law in the nation, supporting legislation that attacks vaccines, holding an A rating from the NRA, banning sanctuary cities, erasing Critical Race Theory from schools, and much more. THE GOOD NEWS is that, if McCall wins the Republican primary, he will have a formidable and qualified Democratic WOMAN as his opponent. Her name is Cyndi Munson, and she is running a strong, well-organized campaign to be the GOVERNOR of Oklahoma. Her Bold Move is honored to support her. Unsurprisingly, Oklahoma is among the states with the lowest women’s representation in its state government – less than 20%. As outlined above, this underrepresentation is reflected in the state’s dangerous and draconian policies for women: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Cyndi Munson: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = As Governor, Cyndi will repeal Oklahoma’s abortion ban. As she’s been meeting with thousands of voters across her state, she’s found that voters on both sides of the aisle feel that the current anti-abortion laws do not meet their values and instead prevent women from getting the care they need. Additionally, according to the 2024 March of Dimes report, 51.9% of Oklahomans do not have access to maternity healthcare, and an additional 18.2% have low/moderate access to healthcare. As Governor, Cyndi wants to increase access to maternity healthcare for women across the state and fully eliminate these healthcare deserts. Her plan is to introduce legislation that would increase funding for hospitals and assist in the recruitment of doctors who specialize in women’s healthcare. Here’s the thing: Cyndi flipped a majority Republican district and has kept it for the last 10 years – she’s actually increased her win margins election after election. She accomplished this by knocking on doors, having honest conversations, and staying true to her values. Now, she needs our help to keep up that momentum. We’ve seen Democratic Governors win in “red” states – despite having Republican supermajorities in their State Houses and Senate chambers. Kentucky and Kansas, for example, have both elected popular Democratic Governors. If anyone can do it, it’s Cyndi Munson. Thank you, Colleen Davis Endorsements Manager Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states. Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies. Support this important work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. name: third and FINAL attempt to reach you | Fight for Reform
subject: (2025 House Advisory Committee!!) are you ignoring us???
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-) [ **🔴THIRD AND FINAL ATTEMPT TO REACH dpwillis67@gmail.com🔴 ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=3&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-) Listen, this is the **third time** we’re trying to reach you.

I don’t believe that you’d purposefully ignore us – but that’s what it feels like.

Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP are continuing to rip our Democracy apart piece by piece with each new day that passes. **But – Democrats just SWEPT Tuesday's elections, making a path for us to FLIP THE HOUSE IN 2026!! We can really do it — but we need input from local Democrats like you, team.**

_The longer you wait to respond — the harder it is to fight back._

[**SO PLEASE team, take just [3] minutes to respond to join our 2025 House Advisory Committee >> **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=4&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-) | [BEGIN YOUR SURVEY >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=5&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-)
---
Your response is CRITICAL to helping us formulate our strategy to win in 2026 and beyond.

We wouldn’t be following up if it wasn’t so important,

_Fight for Reform_

\------FORWARDED MESSAGE------
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=6&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-)
Look, this is the [**last time**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=7&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-) we are going to reach out about your spot on our House Advisory Committee.

Republicans are holding onto their Majority by a THREAD, to the point where they’re REFUSING to seat a democratically elected Representative RIGHT NOW!!

They’re absolutely TERRIFIED of losing their power. So why did you still ignore our CRITICAL House Majority Strategy Survey? We could really stand a chance of taking back the Majority!!

We chose you because you are one of our most informed supporters in your city.

[**We just need [12] more responses, but we’re missing key data without your response. Please, it will only take 3 minutes to complete >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=8&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-)

**SO, we’re asking one last time, begin your survey before it closes for good:**
[Complete our survey now →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=9&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-)
---
Hoping to see your response,

Fight for Reform

\-------FORWARDED MESSAGE-------

**BREAKING:** [**_Trump and Republicans refuse to protect healthcare for millions of Americans, leading to government shutdown_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=10&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-)
[**_Please Begin ASAP!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=11&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-)
[**You have been selected to serve on our November House Strategy Advisory Committee. **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=12&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-) | [Complete your interview now → ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=13&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-)
---
[]()
[**NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
RESPONSE: PENDING
REPRESENTING: Local Democrats **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=14&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=15&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-)
---|---
Listen up: [For the first time in SIX years, **_the United States federal government has shut down._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=16&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-)

This shutdown is exactly why it’s more important than ever that we **come together as Democrats, sharpen our strategy, and stand up to Republicans’ reckless leadership** — and that’s why your input today is so critical.

As one of the most informed and engaged Fight for Reform members in your area, you have been selected for this strategy interview today.

Republicans have the House and Senate Majorities currently – YIKES!!

But if they lose just a handful of seats, we can TAKE BACK the Majority and finally combat Donald Trump’s corruption and bring real reform to DC.

That's why we need to develop a foolproof strategy NOW to take back the House! But this will only happen if we gather enough responses from smart Democrats like you.

[**Please click below to complete your interview:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=17&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-)
[Complete your interview now → ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69843?t=18&akid=23587%2E4449941%2EqLQHy-)
---
Thank you for your participation,

-_Fight for Reform_

body:
As a former Navy SEAL who has served the United States in more than 70 countries around the globe, I’m gobsmacked | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2f82c0675c0c472aaff885b14dfba0c1&_e=2ZKXtDPuFSatlZ2DtRqc1kh5QruCslvUM04xU2n_gelxWcr7VEoNfn9j_UVnGvR3yyAGn-iUTbCKI9sQ0ALHS8EX93wVScHBEbONzq0KhCl2_X_DJAcv8EXuxm45XE8aLuit-e-fL7DH6-Yqho51dNb2q0PCLhG09R_wixXHZGvEwl1VwtEgHqwTbWuOOaAhvyJibbKmhC7skcsiF3j25qmNuTh-or3p6XCU_16NCR2XyHH0g3HUQlwmKEdEYPlImPrshAYXNAyC5whakD03P-u_6DBgzimtB_KPf1_uN-yGST8fHF0PbD7sZOo2O7XIDzIMZBwgFGobQbFWzEbp56zKLMg0D72ZJQ1sN45_PdkIlQEpFzRavaOpII40yuasTkkUqF5lV1EQyWJAHsASw3b-QzPZBDKBb-9_9SAJFyWt0E--eC5Mru83olS3f11Nj3c20OFSVnyXFvONe-4__n5a-ZP2YABYVGDSbjP1BlA7e-Zv3oSdldXUCSFPTn-iNKhQq9-MQkZKHOd7z85F88KtchcNyBTGGRQEr-qKCC317BAWWh9TDyB0916bZai3eShACXRjHljHFC4HXQrpOQ38fpou-YHSHF3hwdNguH8A93T0TUwsOL48g1MSFE-U6B30I5vehnpBcdFxeG2qhMoAW5I8Wplgc1yhQBsqaGmtjd06bIfpTXxf-N_K5fk_dAbQG78K2GSk0cwzYra_XcINNnxmHR6z5zOHZUgfb7liD2EaP1Br6sI8xCX4M9AyOGy7gUkI8SzYHvkKtkzvoIPqvlKND11VEY2ffA5Pfb8%3D)

Peter,

As a former Navy SEAL who has served our nation in 70 foreign countries, I’m gobsmacked by the news out of New York.

**I’m thinking of all the lives we’ve lost against this enemy over the last century, and I want to weep.**

If you’re interested in hearing more about last night from a Navy SEAL's perspective,**[please read the letter I wrote to you.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2f82c0675c0c472aaff885b14dfba0c1&_e=2ZKXtDPuFSatlZ2DtRqc1kh5QruCslvUM04xU2n_gelxWcr7VEoNfn9j_UVnGvR3yyAGn-iUTbCKI9sQ0ALHS8EX93wVScHBEbONzq0KhCl2_X_DJAcv8EXuxm45XE8aLuit-e-fL7DH6-Yqho51dNb2q0PCLhG09R_wixXHZGvEwl1VwtEgHqwTbWuOOaAhvyJibbKmhC7skcsiF3j25qmNuTh-or3p6XCU_16NCR2XyHH0g3HUQlwmKEdEYPlImPrshAYXNAyC5whakD03P-u_6DBgzimtB_KPf1_uN-y4ndwtC4KlAgnzI7JE_CuyIUscU05cbMajiW_Wg_eQsoAz8ppMfuWcCKoYANG8M7EiVB4A0YQvWG82dmMrlBYc9TzKiBmTJV0C09d-_YRVt1yrMSjXMma-ccfC4cgyB-wsyow441qZ12YlVBYWGuhFcuP_Wk1o_nuzROU6Ny7BWwtC6_VqnzVdU3J0uu30FmqDcT0NkThi4g6ZHptiJ8GSg77lxVkjihfjlmWF5GRWipgCFpMpGqcb7ccdFHRguT3cJTK01I_Q4ekvDWn5kFBI4GtrK_d_GvLgTJ0Rqu82N4CxC6YImD15ntX1DnV3W1d97pJqBL9GJjAsa-0oFWXodIzky-rgwdrEwCVmdmxGXNmOa8BluIppH3EFAYrJFycZpyU0WOkH0FaJaAhwGQnlzF5YvS9jOE9-EZwR-_TaHM_TqkcO13iF2BTfg1CTHS4PaoTF7knxfPNml6RQx9yYHHEFzBe6T8lvmoOKfCFL438yiYRmOFuc-wDmW-9WhPw%3D)**

subject: Communist Islamist Warning from NYC

body:
Deadly serious- please read this note:

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-uAygUA)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, On Tuesday, New York City made a disastrous mistake. New Yorkers elected a Communist Islamist named Zohran Mamdani to be the next Mayor of New York. Mamdani is anti-America, and as even Democrat strategist Van Jones noted on CNN Tuesday night, Mamdani dropped his friendly liberal persona to reveal an angry, antagonistic one the very minute he stepped on stage to declare victory. This is typical of both communists and Islamists, and make no mistake, Mamdani is _**BOTH**_. They always strive to appear benign before they take power and begin their unrelenting campaign of destruction, dysfunction, and violent domination... And, of course, easily fooled liberals enthusiastically lap it all up... But this is far more serious than normal partisan politics- more people are going to die in New York City because of Mamdani's radical pro-criminal views. He has said that "violence" is a social construct, and he clearly favors criminals over law-abiding citizens. America is truly in trouble, and we must begin preparing for the 2026 midterms immediately if we're going to stop this tide of radical Democrats from destroying America. [**_Please stand with me and help fight back right now >>_**](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-DDoMw)
---
[ **RUSH URGENT SUPPORT TO TED CRUZ >> ** ](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
Thank you, Ted Cruz **PS:** In his victory speech, Mamdani mentioned the following countries: Yemen, Mexico, Senegal, Uzbekistan, Trinidad & Tobago, and Ethiopia. But he didn't mention _AMERICA_ once! We _MUST_ build up our war chest to stop anti-American Democrats from absolutely destroying our country- _this is deadly serious!_

New Yorkers elected a Communist Islamist named Zohran Mamdani to be the next Mayor of New York. Mamdani is anti-America, and as even Democrat strategist Van Jones noted on CNN Tuesday night, Mamdani dropped his friendly liberal persona to reveal an angry, antagonistic one the very minute he stepped on stage to declare victory. This is typical of both communists and Islamists, and make no mistake, Mamdani is BOTH. They always strive to appear benign before they take power and begin their unrelenting campaign of destruction, dysfunction, and violent domination... And, of course, easily fooled liberals enthusiastically lap it all up... But this is far more serious than normal partisan politics- more people are going to die in New York City because of Mamdani's radical pro-criminal views. He has said that "violence" is a social construct, and he clearly favors criminals over law-abiding citizens. America is truly in trouble, and we must begin preparing for the 2026 midterms immediately if we're going to stop this tide of radical Democrats from destroying America. Thank you, Ted Cruz PS: In his victory speech, Mamdani mentioned the following countries: Yemen, Mexico, Senegal, Uzbekistan, Trinidad & Tobago, and Ethiopia. But he didn't mention AMERICA once! We MUST build up our war chest to stop anti-American Democrats from absolutely destroying our country- this is deadly serious! | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. |
