name: Brad Finstad
subject: Remember how Al Franken got to the Senate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Friend, you probably remember how Al Franken first got elected. It took months of recounts, court fights, and “found” ballots that flipped a Republican win into a Democrat victory. That narrow and questionable win gave Democrats the one vote they needed to pass Obamacare. One vote that changed the course of our healthcare system forever. Now, Al Franken is trying to do it again. His political action committee recently donated to my Democrat opponent, hoping to bring that same kind of politics and disastrous policies back to Washington. Minnesota doesn’t need more Al Franken Democrats. We need proven conservative leadership that stands up to the D.C. crowd and defends our values. I’m fighting to make sure the First District keeps a commonsense, conservative voice. But I can’t do it without your help. Will you chip in $25, $50, or even $100 today to help us counteract the liberal money pouring in?
---
| | [Contribute Now →](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| Together, we’ll make sure southern Minnesota stays represented by someone who shares its values... not Al Franken’s. – Brad

name: Kathy Hochul
subject: re: Elise Stefanik
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96330?t=6&akid=21782%2E878179%2EpL-pO3) Team, I have some news to share:

**Republican Elise Stefanik just announced her campaign for Governor.**

And Stefanik’s special interest donors have already rushed her $12 million to take me down and flip New York red.

I’ve never backed down from a fight — and I sure as hell won’t start now.

But Stefanik will be watching us closely, and we need to usher in a record-breaking fundraising day to show Stefanik she doesn’t stand a chance.

[That’s why I’m calling on my top supporters to help me reach my goal of 1,000 gifts before midnight and prove the strength of our team. Can I count on you to split a $10 donation between myself and the Voter Protection Project in these first 24 hours?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96330?t=7&akid=21782%2E878179%2EpL-pO3)

I’ll be blunt: Sellout Stefanik is a self-serving politician who cares more about Donald Trump’s approval than what’s best for New York families.

She supports Trump’s expensive tariffs that are jacking up the costs of everything from clothing to groceries for New Yorkers. She voted multiple times against the Child Tax Credit.

Stefanik brags about being the “deciding vote” for his agenda that will rip away health care from 1.5 million New Yorkers and put 5 rural hospitals in her district on the chopping block.

And when the Trump administration threatened to cut NY police funding, Stefanik stayed silent.

**New Yorkers need a governor who will stand up to Trump and fight like hell for them.**

[I need all hands on deck to fight back. So I’m asking again: Will you split $10 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project before midnight to help me outraise Stefanik and win this race for every New Yorker?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96330?t=8&akid=21782%2E878179%2EpL-pO3) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kathy Hochul and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96331?t=9&akid=21782%2E878179%2EpL-pO3)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96332?t=10&akid=21782%2E878179%2EpL-pO3)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96333?t=11&akid=21782%2E878179%2EpL-pO3)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96334?t=12&akid=21782%2E878179%2EpL-pO3)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96330?t=13&akid=21782%2E878179%2EpL-pO3)
Thank you and ever upward,

Kathy
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21782%2E878179%2EpL-pO3). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21782%2E878179%2EpL-pO3).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21782%2E878179%2EpL-pO3) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=21782%2E878179%2EpL-pO3). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21782%2E878179%2EpL-pO3)

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Time to Get Washington Working Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5747b22ee1ad/be-the-difference-today-48157?e=561a28864e)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=17b0cd6450&e=561a28864e)
| | | | |
---
| |
Dear Friend,
I’ll be honest with you, Washington is a mess right now. Too many career politicians are more interested in headlines than helping hardworking Americans. But while others talk, I’m focused on delivering results that matter to families in Wisconsin.
Recent weeks have made one thing clear: we can’t sit back and hope things get better. We have to fight for them.
* * *
**What’s happening**

As you know, the government shutdown has exposed just how dysfunctional Washington has become. It didn’t have to happen. I voted with my House Republican colleagues to continue to fund the government. But instead of negotiating in good faith, Senate Democrats would rather play politics while federal workers and families are caught in the middle. I’ve said from the start that we need to reopen the government and get back to the table to find real solutions.
Also, I recently introduced the **Bank Competition Modernization Act** to make sure our small-town banks can compete on a level playing field — so local businesses and families aren’t squeezed by big corporations and Washington red tape.
I also introduced the **Combatting Money Laundering in Cyber Crime Act of 2025** to crack down on financial crimes and keep criminals — foreign and domestic — from exploiting the digital system hardworking taxpayers rely on.
And as health insurance costs continue to rise, I’ve been speaking out against policies that make things worse instead of better. Wisconsin families deserve a healthcare system they can rely on.
* * *
**Standing up for Wisconsin values** While others chase sound bites, I’m focused on protecting taxpayers, securing our communities, and defending the conservative values that built this country. But here’s the truth: none of this happens without you.
The fight for our future and for economic freedom, for secure borders, for common sense in government depends on grassroots supporters stepping up.
* * *
**Why your support matters****We’re heading into some big battles in Congress and gearing up for the 2026 election. The left is pouring millions into flipping conservative seats, and they’d love nothing more than to silence voices like ours.**
[**Your contribution of $25, $50, or $100**](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=620aebaeb9&e=561a28864e)** helps us fight back, get our message out, and keep Wisconsin’s 5th District a stronghold for common sense and conservative leadership.**[**Please click here to chip in today to keep the fight going.**](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=4b4971c78c&e=561a28864e)
* * *
Washington won’t fix itself. It takes people like you, people who care about faith, family, freedom, and the future of this country, to make sure we stay on the right path.
I’m fighting every day to hold the line. But I can’t do it alone. **Thank you for standing with me**.
Sincerely,
**Scott Fitzgerald**
U.S. Representative, Wisconsin’s 5th District

It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/22150/6374453/71e86152759aa866f8ff56dc9dee5af31222ca60/75a7f3d60b3150efc8fb5bb0225dba86e3803b9b). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter: Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)... Zero lines, classroom time or books to read... Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit). **It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/22150/6374453/71e86152759aa866f8ff56dc9dee5af31222ca60/75a7f3d60b3150efc8fb5bb0225dba86e3803b9b)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: Office of the Governor
subject: ⏳ Day 39: How We’re Protecting Marylanders During Trump’s Shutdown
body:
>From SNAP to transit, we’re helping our people weather this shutdown
---
| | | | | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fhome.aspx/1/0100019a640e2622-ae4a0ddb-ca40-404b-924e-5f35ac44737c-000000/TaXiaKoOUtzqlqF4yY--rxab_buKjpiIX0wFt6f4gQc=430)
---
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2FGovernor-Moore-Announces-Expanded-Support-for-Marylanders-Amid-Record-Long-Federal-Government-Shutdown.aspx/1/0100019a640e2622-ae4a0ddb-ca40-404b-924e-5f35ac44737c-000000/Sxwog-7YS3LvVGoFNaV-TOfgzoiymOC8t014BoZJcLs=430)
---
Maryland,
It’s Day 39 of President Trump’s federal government shutdown – **the longest federal government shutdown in American history.** The President’s cruelty has plunged hundreds of thousands of Marylanders into deep uncertainty, and in some cases, financial peril.
Maryland is home to over 269,000 federal workers and 160,000 federal contractors. Thousands depend on federal programs, including 680,000 Marylanders who rely on SNAP.
In the long term, no state can fill the gap created by the Trump Administration. **But that hasn’t stopped us from doing everything in our power to protect our people.**
We’ve worked to get financial support to federal workers who are missing paychecks, made MARC transit service free for federal workers, and rushed resources to food banks so families don’t go hungry and our agriculture sector stays afloat.
**Yesterday, I announced three additional actions we’re taking to rush support to Marylanders:**
1. We’re launching a second round of loans for essential federal employees working without pay. For more information about this loan program, visit [mdol.submittable.com/submit](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/http:%2F%2Fmdol.submittable.com%2Fsubmit/1/0100019a640e2622-ae4a0ddb-ca40-404b-924e-5f35ac44737c-000000/Q87vFmDfMik6fHziUp1HU0fAzAawHKrHDlY6PTAaGfk=430).
2. Maryland Transit Administration will now offer free rides to federal employees for ALL core transit services. Federal employees should email: [mtacharmpass@mta.maryland.gov](mailto:mtacharmpass@mta.maryland.gov) with “**Free Federal Transit”** in the subject line to request their pass.
3. We’re directing $10 million toward energy assistance for low-income Marylanders.

**These steps add to the work we’ve already done over the last several weeks to protect Marylanders**.
To learn more about each of the steps we are taking, I encourage you to visit [go.md.gov/FederalShutdown](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/http:%2F%2Fgo.md.gov%2FFederalShutdown/1/0100019a640e2622-ae4a0ddb-ca40-404b-924e-5f35ac44737c-000000/YSIyiN5jRSBLoOl9t1uKLymsGYrAue5DiYoO6BzHoyU=430).
We will continue to stand in the breach, but the only enduring solution is for the President to make a deal and end the shutdown.
Your Governor,
Wes Moore
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fhome.aspx/2/0100019a640e2622-ae4a0ddb-ca40-404b-924e-5f35ac44737c-000000/-MR6o8J2UbRnzXCB0ANJlTD6JoRa_Oh3r_14KZ5II5A=430)

| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=H5S7S4ZCpts/1/0100019a640e2622-ae4a0ddb-ca40-404b-924e-5f35ac44737c-000000/bsmPmm7WxKCIN0rrjffwXu64VmaUdFDesbyHSDT1qEI=430)

### [**Announcing the Governor’s Redistricting Advisory Commission**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=H5S7S4ZCpts/2/0100019a640e2622-ae4a0ddb-ca40-404b-924e-5f35ac44737c-000000/k_v7N7qdSpMZA1NFnYhJ8w-BIAuy0x8z2C36vHonfaM=430)

Earlier this week, I announced the [Governor’s Redistricting Advisory Commission](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fredistricting.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fdefault.aspx/1/0100019a640e2622-ae4a0ddb-ca40-404b-924e-5f35ac44737c-000000/bPyOem_Kji-BvQ1vrxH_hvObNiBMRCQj_qoL48HPnxU=430).
I’ve been clear from Day One: If other states are determining whether or not they have fair maps, so will Maryland.
| [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=4GTGscBsE9s/1/0100019a640e2622-ae4a0ddb-ca40-404b-924e-5f35ac44737c-000000/M0ZH7PEHpQ8HsiZH8HTToGdzPkS2O-R3D6IeQkk_LeM=430)
---
### [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-celebrates-the-formation-of-the-enough-alliance-and-100-million-dollar-philanthropic-investment-to-end-child.aspx/1/0100019a640e2622-ae4a0ddb-ca40-404b-924e-5f35ac44737c-000000/fUDgb3hZb9tgFoWDHKHAzb4ukLN1Sy3e0T4MdaGzAbE=430)[**Our October 2025 Recap**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=4GTGscBsE9s/2/0100019a640e2622-ae4a0ddb-ca40-404b-924e-5f35ac44737c-000000/LatzXxMUqEp8_1nuyUGsyNm1hsbV1V-3bs08zzfew1M=430)

From supporting Marylanders who rely on SNAP to delivering on business investments, we’re proving that — even while under attack from the Trump Administration — **we can and will deliver wins that grow Maryland’s economy and make life here more affordable for families.**
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.washingtonpost.com%2Fdc-md-va%2F2025%2F11%2F06%2Fmaryland-sues-trump-administration-over-decision-keep-fbi-dc%2F/1/0100019a640e2622-ae4a0ddb-ca40-404b-924e-5f35ac44737c-000000/kCMMNoq5cMvFgp-5kkjr7FHa-lVGN9m9stGPAO1K5zY=430) | |

clean_body: From SNAP to transit, we’re helping our people weather this shutdown | | | | | | | Maryland, It’s Day 39 of President Trump’s federal government shutdown – the longest federal government shutdown in American history. The President’s cruelty has plunged hundreds of thousands of Marylanders into deep uncertainty, and in some cases, financial peril. Maryland is home to over 269,000 federal workers and 160,000 federal contractors. Thousands depend on federal programs, including 680,000 Marylanders who rely on SNAP. In the long term, no state can fill the gap created by the Trump Administration. But that hasn’t stopped us from doing everything in our power to protect our people. We’ve worked to get financial support to federal workers who are missing paychecks, made MARC transit service free for federal workers, and rushed resources to food banks so families don’t go hungry and our agriculture sector stays afloat. Yesterday, I announced three additional actions we’re taking to rush support to Marylanders: 1. We’re launching a second round of loans for essential federal employees working without pay. For more information about this loan program, visit . 2. Maryland Transit Administration will now offer free rides to federal employees for ALL core transit services. Federal employees should email: mailto:mtacharmpass@mta.maryland.gov with “Free Federal Transit” in the subject line to request their pass. 3. We’re directing $10 million toward energy assistance for low-income Marylanders. These steps add to the work we’ve already done over the last several weeks to protect Marylanders. To learn more about each of the steps we are taking, I encourage you to visit . We will continue to stand in the breach, but the only enduring solution is for the President to make a deal and end the shutdown. Your Governor, Wes Moore | | | | Earlier this week, I announced the . I’ve been clear from Day One: If other states are determining whether or not they have fair maps, so will Maryland. | From supporting Marylanders who rely on SNAP to delivering on business investments, we’re proving that — even while under attack from the Trump Administration — we can and will deliver wins that grow Maryland’s economy and make life here more affordable for families. | | | | “Gov. body:
$1 to help Democrat and retired Navy Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher defeat Lauren Boebert. And no, that’s not a typo.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T689792a7-0aaf-48b1-8145-aeedf6a97e0c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, We’re emailing to ask you to give $1 to help Democrat and retired Navy Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher defeat Lauren Boebert. And no, that’s not a typo. Our next fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight, but we’re still very short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to send Boebert packing next November. We know that $1 might not seem like a lot – and to be honest, it’s not. But when your $1 is combined with thousands of other grassroots donors also chipping in to defeat Boebert, $1 can have an enormous impact. $1 lets Eileen fill the tank in her car as she drives across the district, meeting with voters who are fed up with Lauren Boebert. $1 lets us invest in staff and critical resources needed to build a field and organizing campaign strong enough to win. $1 lets us fight back against the GOP Super PACs and hold Boebert accountable. And $1 lets us take the lead and flip this seat that could decide whether or not Democrats take back control of the House for the next 2 years. If everyone who gets this email chips in just $1, we will hit our fundraising goal and send Lauren Boebert packing once and for all next November. But Eileen is counting on you to give right now if she’s going to defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue: [Please, will you split $1 right now between retired Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher’s campaign and Blue Amp Action – more if you can afford it! – to help defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb746fc5a-87b4-429e-8293-53cd3347c61e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Eileen is not taking a dime of corporate PAC money like Boebert is. Instead, she is funding her campaign entirely with donations from real people like you. No amount you can chip in today – yes, even $1 – is too small. When Eileen finally defeats Lauren Boebert and puts an end to her embarrassing political career, it will be because people like you gave whatever amount you could afford today. Thank you, Team Laubacher
---
|
---
| REAR ADMIRAL EILEEN LAUBACHER (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. USE OF HER MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE.

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c75d349-0bf2-4832-9828-b8c16870799f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Wes Moore
subject: Trump is coming after governors like me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I need you, Peter, if we’re going to be able to fight back.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97458?refcode=em20251108-9682&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9682%2E614464%2EY7xWCN)
Hi Peter, you probably already heard the news: **I’m running for reelection for Governor of Maryland.**
Together, we’ve proven that progress is possible when we put people first. But Donald Trump is doubling down to push his agenda – and he’s already coming after states like ours and Democratic governors like me.
That’s why I’m running: because Maryland needs a governor who will stand up to Trump’s dangerous threats and protect the progress we’ve made together.
**[Will you chip in a split contribution between Heartland Patriots and our campaign today to prove we won’t bow down to bullies and we’ll stand up for everyone?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97458?refcode=em20251108-9682&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9682%2E614464%2EY7xWCN)**

---
Trump and Republicans in Washington are trying to erase our hard-fought progress, and Republicans are testing a whole field of candidates to try to defeat me. Former governor Larry Hogan, Andy Harris, and even some guy named Ed Hale could run against me with millions in spending behind them.
I need you, Peter, if we’re going to be able to fight back. That’s why I have to ask:
**[Please, join our movement by making a split contribution between Heartland Patriots and our reelection campaign today. It will directly power our fight to leave no one behind.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97458?refcode=em20251108-9682&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9682%2E614464%2EY7xWCN)**

Elevate,
Wes

* Jon Ossoff is Chuck Schumer's golden boy.
* He's voted with the D.C. swamp every single time.
* And if he wins re-election, Schumer takes the Senate majority.

That means:

❌ The Supreme Court **PACKED** with RADICAL judges. ❌ The filibuster **ERASED**. ❌ Trump's America First agenda **STRANGLED** in its crib.

Mike isn't a creature of Washington. He's a trucker, a fighter, and a conservative with the **BACKBONE** to hold Georgia **RED** and block Schumer's **RADICAL** agenda.

If we win Georgia, we stop Schumer cold.

If we lose Georgia, America First is **FINISHED**.

Peter, we can't afford to sit this one out. Georgia is the tipping point for our future.

clean_body: | Peter, This is Newt Gingrich. I've been in Republican politics for decades, and I know when one race carries the weight of the entire country. Today, that race is in Georgia. The media won't say it. The Left is trying to hide it. But trust me, Here's the truth: Jon Ossoff is Chuck Schumer's golden boy. He's voted with the D.C. swamp every single time. And if he wins re-election, Schumer takes the Senate majority. That means: ❌ The Supreme Court PACKED with RADICAL judges. ❌ The filibuster ERASED. ❌ Trump's America First agenda STRANGLED in its crib. But there's good news. Mike Collins is leading the polls, and he is the Mike isn't a creature of Washington. He's a trucker, a fighter, and a conservative with the BACKBONE to hold Georgia RED and block Schumer's RADICAL agenda. If we win Georgia, we stop Schumer cold. If we lose Georgia, America First is FINISHED. Peter, we can't afford to sit this one out. Georgia is the tipping point for our future. | This isn't just another Senate race. It's the ballgame. For America, Newt Gingrich** PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO Box 6491 Athens, GA 30604 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please . |

name: Team Pappas
subject: They’re “all-in” to stop us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3342%2E582294%2EXBW-RM)
The National Republican Senatorial Committee is "all-in" to support Chris Pappas's newest opponent, John Sununu.
**That means millions of dollars are set to be spent against us here in New Hampshire.**
Republicans know that if we keep this Senate seat blue, Democrats have a shot at flipping the chamber in 2026. Without it, there’s no chance — so they’re “all-in” to stop us from sending Chris to the Senate.
The only way to compete with millions of dollars from the NRSC, corporate super PACs, and national Republicans is with a grassroots movement. That’s why we’re asking you:
[**Will you chip in any amount to help elect Chris Pappas today? Here’s a custom link so Chris knows it’s coming directly from you:**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251108_1_nrsc.i20VQz&refcode=em20251108-1&t=2&akid=3342%2E582294%2EXBW-RM)

subject: Join me and Nathan Shackelford for a powerful town hall in Rockwall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ryan Binkley for Congress
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Friend,

At a time when our nation is calling for renewal, I believe revival begins at home — in our churches, our communities, and in local leadership.
That’s why I’m inviting you to join me and Nathan Shackelford of First Liberty Institute for an inspiring Lunch & Town Hall on Faith, Freedom, and the Future, right here in Rockwall.
Together, we’ll talk about how courageous leadership can restore trust in government, defend religious liberty, and strengthen the moral and economic foundation of our country.
📅 Thursday, November 13🕰️ 11:30 AM – 1:00 PM📍 501 Yacht Club, Rockwall, TX💲 Free Admission – RSVP Required🍴 Light lunch
Seating is limited, so please RSVP today.

In faith,

name: EMILYs List
subject: This is unforgivable
body:
The latest on the Republican's shutdown → |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118918333/581319359/-1510725204?sourceid=1057319&refcode=WUEFEK23_20251108_SapphireAngle_ALL_v1s4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWYyNmY2My1iY2JjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJD4-7_ffYPVY8N1V5U8bxgNq2H9TpQt_fUFM_UTaf8=) Peter, here's the latest on Republicans' government shutdown:

FIRST: Congressional Republicans refused to work with Democrats to extend critical health care tax credits and keep the government open.

THEN: The federal government shut down, more than 750,000 federal workers are going without pay, and millions of Americans are seeing their health care premiums skyrocket.

NOW: **The Trump administration is cutting SNAP benefits** — forcing 42 MILLION Americans to go hungry.

It's unforgivable. American families should not be paying the price for this shutdown.

But here's the good news: Democratic pro-choice women are showing us what real leadership looks like. From fighting to protect crucial welfare programs to standing up to dangerous disinformation, EMILYs List women are doing the work Republicans refuse to do.

**The only way we'll restore sanity in Washington is by flipping the U.S. House — and that means electing more Democratic pro-choice women in 2026.**

[**We need to build on this week's victories and keep up the momentum into 2026. clean_body: The latest on the Republican's shutdown → | = Peter, here's the latest on Republicans' government shutdown: FIRST: Congressional Republicans refused to work with Democrats to extend critical health care tax credits and keep the government open. THEN: The federal government shut down, more than 750,000 federal workers are going without pay, and millions of Americans are seeing their health care premiums skyrocket. NOW: The Trump administration is cutting SNAP benefits — forcing 42 MILLION Americans to go hungry. It's unforgivable. American families should not be paying the price for this shutdown. But here's the good news: Democratic pro-choice women are showing us what real leadership looks like. From fighting to protect crucial welfare programs to standing up to dangerous disinformation, EMILYs List women are doing the work Republicans refuse to do. The only way we'll restore sanity in Washington is by flipping the U.S. House — and that means electing more Democratic pro-choice women in 2026. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. 2. **If Virginia's maps get redrawn, we can offset that by flipping up to FOUR House seats blue.**

**We need to stand up and push back.**

We need to support VA’s redistricting efforts, elect Democrats all across the Commonwealth, protect this Senate seat, and flip control of Congress next year so we can put a check on Trump’s deeply unpopular – not to mention dangerous – agenda.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: “Justice Democrats came in from the beginning.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrat Rep. Summer Lee talked about the state of the Democratic
Party and how the left can build power against the corporate machine with
Hasan Piker for more than two hours on his livestream in Washington, DC.
this week.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251108-sl.jAT8-j&refcode=em20251108-37176&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37176%2E1203867%2Ebe54Fn ]Screenshot of Hasan Piker and Rep. Summer Lee

The two covered a lot of ground, including how Summer defeated AIPAC in
order to win her congressional seat for the first time in 2022. When asked
how she broke through their noise, Summer said:

“I’ve always been very fortunate to have people who support me... My first
election, AIPAC came at us. That was the first election that AIPAC even
existed as a PAC. We were 27 points up. They came in the last 3 weeks
[spending] $1 million a week. But we had friends. Justice Democrats, they
came in from the beginning.”

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251108-sl.jAT8-j&refcode=em20251108-37176&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=37176%2E1203867%2Ebe54Fn ]Gif of Summer Lee telling Hasan Piker, "Justice Democrats, they came in
from the beginning.”

Summer is right. Thanks to people like you all over the country pitching
in $5 or $10 here and there, we generated grassroots resources to help her
take on AIPAC and its super PAC (United Democracy Project) and win —
despite being massively outspent.

Summer and Hasan also made this important point: When AIPAC dumps money
into opposing a progressive candidate running for Congress, they never
talk about Israel, because they know they wouldn’t win if they did.

AIPAC and its corporate donors don’t want anyone threatening the billions
of dollars in taxpayer funding that the Israeli military gets to commit
genocide and maintain its apartheid state.

That’s why they tried stopping Summer, why they broke records spending $30
million against Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush, and why they’re going to use
their war chest again to try and halt our progressive movement in 2026.

We can’t let them succeed. Just like in previous elections, we need to
build a groundswell of grassroots support to protect progressive
incumbents like Summer while expanding our bloc by winning Democratic
primaries against out-of-touch, corporate Democrats.

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, Justice Democrat Rep. Summer Lee talked about the state of the Democratic Party and how the left can build power against the corporate machine with Hasan Piker for more than two hours on his livestream in Washington, DC. this week. [ ]Screenshot of Hasan Piker and Rep. Summer Lee The two covered a lot of ground, including how Summer defeated AIPAC in order to win her congressional seat for the first time in 2022. When asked how she broke through their noise, Summer said: “I’ve always been very fortunate to have people who support me... My first election, AIPAC came at us. That was the first election that AIPAC even existed as a PAC. We were 27 points up. They came in the last 3 weeks [spending] $1 million a week. But we had friends. Justice Democrats, they came in from the beginning.” [ ]Gif of Summer Lee telling Hasan Piker, "Justice Democrats, they came in from the beginning.” Summer is right. Thanks to people like you all over the country pitching in $5 or $10 here and there, we generated grassroots resources to help her take on AIPAC and its super PAC (United Democracy Project) and win — despite being massively outspent. Summer and Hasan also made this important point: When AIPAC dumps money into opposing a progressive candidate running for Congress, they never talk about Israel, because they know they wouldn’t win if they did. AIPAC and its corporate donors don’t want anyone threatening the billions of dollars in taxpayer funding that the Israeli military gets to commit genocide and maintain its apartheid state. That’s why they tried stopping Summer, why they broke records spending $30 million against Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush, and why they’re going to use their war chest again to try and halt our progressive movement in 2026. We can’t let them succeed. Just like in previous elections, we need to build a groundswell of grassroots support to protect progressive incumbents like Summer while expanding our bloc by winning Democratic primaries against out-of-touch, corporate Democrats. Peter,

**Every day, I see something so crazy that it makes me reflect on how corrupt and psychotic the Radical Left is. I saw a video of a mentally ill person dancing in drag in front of children.**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b7db4452e245485099d2b4eeaf0ec399&_e=L7mXqT7dyTT6yUlluXmI2U0xRZN7VNOP8ySMP1X-jFO8JCi86cMtzvlzNlSWD0FnuEXNkY_J6TXjPy7Cil2yX9zyzAIfV_S58MXb_xy6pnM5QFNC02Ygpyoz3k8N_QXZIxS4b7vimw_omNxjBQFd_lqNC1Dhyfy5kwkjiwaEUB-cqn-FGFxOR55iMxuUN00L3iAunsAMaXemKsHJCrFuQc81SP_VS1YRW7qdQmvBbMpuI8ALQJLrBgxM6GCkH-38Kdq2tPZrjlVFsXIc-WsXgdBvwaILjTJoHy3EIdZf8psHp4e_fWPwzSNPxqi8bygVJWFv7RYQCMBSiA5bug9Y0fU-4P6Y4QtPsp532tZdzzHuo6AIkUqeg97P53sjsdBWZs_JTURedARXUPCmS22EPSjh3eZrE4nfUiqPlHQ871jv4ukeA0-0uysSAFn8LqrZO4KFAMcc281TT6aCs_cMiPnuCSSf2j8shGZFtr3e_zKUgKoJiYNLHPKo-72EofJQpHyyl_Ax-y7vx2Q7ldy1o27kryG6BoYpIa3FKuQMSNY%3D)

They're all pedophiles, all of them that support this weird ass behavior. Let's just call it what it is and stop playing around. Or, keep dancing around it and join the dance with these freaks. Stand up, America, have some backbone and courage.

**I’m running for Senate in Minnesota to put an END to this nonsense. But I have a huge problem.**

The Left and the soft Uniparty know who I am. They know I’m running. And they’re all TERRIFIED of what I would do as a sitting United States Senator.

**They’re scared of common sense and a Black Republican who is not afraid to stand up to the freak behavior.**

_So they’re pouring MILLIONS of dollars into defeating me._

**Which is why I’m coming to you for help.** **[Will you chip in $10 before midnight to help me put an end to vile things like Drag Shows for children?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=b7db4452e245485099d2b4eeaf0ec399&_e=L7mXqT7dyTT6yUlluXmI2U0xRZN7VNOP8ySMP1X-jFO8JCi86cMtzvlzNlSWD0FnuEXNkY_J6TXjPy7Cil2yX9zyzAIfV_S58MXb_xy6pnM5QFNC02Ygpyoz3k8N_QXZW374bz9gEdp4o0kDxD30xXpm7dxBipKdeAR0DCAXrKZ0YFPtFY99HcRXr_7UuqlKI6oynEtzfo2Fl6VBd99fV_xXt6Iq6roCM2mr78pU9R8-t5m6yDpPnUkkNN8iDmCt_ErQHfhx2vxyyxu3_vjtqtzQnLpT5BGH4GjvBt48q9kN8bWpmsNGZx4B77WCDmdFZFHYGcZvVHzpAxFY59yMeohFtcP5UqFX4jXJUJecbSRf4mHF8A97C0Hearhqjhcf-5ilt5ci__WkIFlE3fUbQe0gs67SqEuDRFB3vOuMDvnJVGd4uU2RTB81Xb_Oe5l0pt2k9PpcYoDkiQ9Wnz7Ojo62CxnV6V59AUcAgM1dIGvkF6R7ZelONW6KpE0HrF5XWVt-OG0FmGFb9DYRVDZe6jRFJiDSHhp92DeG6uz729uj6UntInwda1VYCc-pR-vK)**

name: Haley Stevens
subject: My Cutlass Supreme meant more to me than just freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I wanted to spend my life fighting for the communities I love

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1299%2E49239%2EoPHsQL)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8031?t=2&akid=1299%2E49239%2EoPHsQL)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8032?t=3&akid=1299%2E49239%2EoPHsQL)
**I bet you still remember getting handed the keys to your first car, null.** I sure do.
That old, used Cutlass Supreme? It meant more to me than just freedom.
I always knew I wanted to spend my life fighting for the people and communities I love. When the Great Recession hit and the American car industry faced extinction, I wanted to step up and do something for my state. So I answered the call to serve as chief of staff to President Obama’s auto rescue initiative, and we helped save over 200,000 Michigan jobs and stabilize our economy.
Fast forward to today, and Michigan jobs are once again at risk, this time from Donald Trump and his reckless tariffs – which are threatening the jobs of tens of thousands of hardworking Michiganders.
**Trump said he “couldn’t care less” if auto prices rise.**
Well, as someone who has spent my time in Congress fighting for Michigan jobs, Michigan families, and Michigan workers, _I couldn’t care more_.
That’s why I’m in this race, null – because just like that day I got the keys to my old Cutlass, we have the power to chart a new path. I’m determined to become Michigan’s next senator, stop Trump’s chaos, and keep fighting for working families here in Michigan and across the country. But I need your help.
Our race in Michigan will decide Senate control, and _The Cook Political Report_ rated it a “Toss Up.” The GOP is going to come after me with everything they’ve got, and I can’t fight back without your grassroots support. That’s why it’s so important to reach our fundraising goals – and why I’m personally asking:
**[Will you chip in $5 – or whatever you can give today – to help me win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats, and keep up my fight for working families?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8032?t=4&akid=1299%2E49239%2EoPHsQL)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8033?t=5&akid=1299%2E49239%2EoPHsQL)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8034?t=6&akid=1299%2E49239%2EoPHsQL)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8035?t=7&akid=1299%2E49239%2EoPHsQL)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8032?t=8&akid=1299%2E49239%2EoPHsQL)
---
Thank you so much for your early support. It will make such a huge difference.

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** Null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8084?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=9&akid=1299%2E49239%2EoPHsQL) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8031?t=10&akid=1299%2E49239%2EoPHsQL)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

body:
This is an UNPRECEDENTED breach of public trust
Words are escaping me right now...
Attorney General Pam Bondi found that the Biden Administration handed over President Trump's government-issued phone to the Special Counsel Jack Smith.
On top of that, Jack Smith subpoenaed all of President Trump's PERSONAL phone records. [](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=4e852fcccef145ce8212e0a15e8686ef&_e=ipf9Mbcfwkz5YE22OFksSn4yETUg34YvR4xUdIP0jJ0rLEfPRMeIws6MYMan1JzNbuoZ5iY_PlYYlayTs6FTxFUoLR0PFXDOjdTyQxsyaJh1Q2D2lsiy7zkHteGHd8kEO90ZsFhlzke21QudHTxkLDI97r3Xhj6irTPYvMDJGt0wFLwd0Aj_y1vjUHZTbgN3Kbd9AKYXhtEoTHmGlLBVuT0fGzGrLY5ixvvk0OaQx6oOBvL3LTiiTNmy6zLL-KAg4d4f4afKBtXehSdxYvmotMUA3VWtOqWZeaEuLaZbH-gWKf7_AjBRZYjAiPYFSth5PKB7Q076B9cXvt1Mfi2vgIEwPB8KinxcSlDhZBsAPg9TyS0wXdiHA5DS-9wZOC1DfW9xU6OpfX2lNqNV6-UHTQs8ax0_wpRR16y5xxijFjQJMU93cFMIHLVZ3-9LLNurT4dfBdUjGMRrwrbOdWbLCtmgzZAO1FqMr3zDktck0NnS-y4-Axq7m0g2gnaciHtZpvOHnEnRkcOssYgP_CdEnyRfdQRWjG4U72aX5L3DyOYxDb7ZkdLhn4uaqqCMIVx0AbBdyYgdAtE6b0qJNdKi5ymP60zX41seDmQz3mp9ghYu3Eo6pk4XZvzK6JtljaKqMUtA-LiHunmkZRIG4qjHVgvlz7WisvZrsSgJXU5aFqw%3D) This is an UNPRECEDENTED breach of public trust. And almost 90% of our support this cycle has come from folks who live right here in Colorado. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you! Team Phil | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add teamphil@philforcolorado.com to your address book. This campaign is powered by grassroots donations. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | = | Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado. body:
We're pretty sure you didn't wake up this morning, jump out of bed and say "Today is the day I am going to split a donation between Jon Ossoff's U.S. Senate campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand!" _If you did, great! Here’s the link and thank you in advance:**[_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q42025_ossoff-split_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118919718/581323435/141003652?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.08_Jon-Ossoff-Team-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_NC-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmRhMWUxMC1iZWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45CTh9TCbWgQKk6_iLxioqe0o_L1GYtvP4U923Gp1tg=)**_ Otherwise, please give us a second to explain why we’re asking you to chip in and why, particularly right now. It is going to take sustained effort from now through Election Day. And we have to get to work right away. Unfortunately, a lot of people think maybe it's too early to give. Your donation now will help us build the strong foundation we need to win, and ensure we’re ready for anything that comes our way on this campaign, from Donald Trump, our MAGA opponents, or anyone else. **So what do you say?** _**[_Can Jon count on you to chip in $10, or any amount, to his campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand today? Trump's Nightmare Week](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=178354828&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4MzU0ODI4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjI2MjIyNDMsImV4cCI6MTc2NTIxNDI0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9RrSC9JRsU2Tn40vjUNQg27W4zCZ3oT_otB7FIRoc-0)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a49f41f2-5d90-4540-9cfa-33b640dc402e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/14900fb7-f090-471e-a668-2c17703836a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This week on _Shuster 's Weekly Wrap-up_, [David Shuster](https://open.substack.com/users/16891317-david-shuster?utm_source=mentions) delivers a blistering yet hilarious rundown of the week's political chaos--where facts, justice, and sandwiches all play starring roles.
The show opens with Shuster's trademark smirk and a taunting message for Donald Trump himself--then dives headlong into what he calls "a Democratic sweep, a repudiation of Trump, and a humiliation for Fox News."
New Jersey's Mikie Sherrill shatters expectations with a stunning 13-point victory, as Shuster skewers Fox's polling acrobatics and the right's refusal to accept math--or reality.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/54a6adaf-667b-4b4e-a330-474b91ab3ca0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
From there, things get weirder. Trump, rambling about South Korea "pouring $2 trillion into America," sets up one of Shuster's best fact-checks of the season. The segment morphs from absurdity to indictment as Shuster highlights how Republicans' economic incoherence is catching up to them--and how even their own operatives are finally admitting it.
"If we don't win the economy," one GOP strategist warns, "we're going to lose next year."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eefc5eef-b643-4bf1-a8f8-2df93c220441?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
Subscribe for more free Shuster!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.NgeKf5J0S0jLJ97EQmU3oy_NRK1szdbBu40QPEtKl-A?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=178354828)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/14900fb7-f090-471e-a668-2c17703836a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But the real shockwave of the week is what Shuster calls the "Epstein Files Bombshell." Lawmakers are whispering about photographic evidence reportedly far worse than anything previously known--images implicating Trump in behavior too grotesque for Fox News to spin away.
The fallout reaches House Speaker Mike Johnson, who still refuses to swear in Rep-elect Adelita Grijalva--an Arizona Democrat promising to force a vote on releasing those files. Shuster doesn't mince words: "They're running a pedophile protection program."
He then turns to a powerful segment on justice and protest. In Washington D.C., ICE agents are confronted for detaining a migrant in front of schoolchildren, sparking viral outrage.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/82898711-41db-431c-89aa-1bafb7d30910?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f3750392-7528-4710-bb18-50f4a90874cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And in a moment both absurd and triumphant, Shuster celebrates "the sandwich heard 'round the world"--Sean Dunn's trial victory after he was charged for tossing a wrapped Subway sandwich at an ICE agent. "A jury laughed the Trump government out of court," Shuster grins.
Threading through the satire and fury is an unmistakable current of empathy. "Every life matters," Shuster reminds his audience. "No matter where you came from, no matter how you identify."
And just when you think you've seen it all, Shuster closes with "AI Clip of the Week," where an eerily accurate Trump-bot brags about making Elon Musk "great again" and "fertilizing eggs." It's weird, it's wild, and somehow, it perfectly captures the surrealism of American politics.
_Shuster 's Weekly Wrap-up_ is vintage Shuster--sharp, irreverent, and emotionally grounded. He gives viewers plenty to laugh at, plenty to rage about, and just enough left unsaid to make you click play and see how it all unfolds.

clean_body: Watch now (4 mins) | David Shuster dismantles MAGA delusions, Fox News fiction, and the pedophile-protection party in one explosive wrap-up. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? | | David Shuster dismantles MAGA delusions, Fox News fiction, and the pedophile-protection party in one explosive wrap-up. | | and | Nov 8 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- This week on Shuster 's Weekly Wrap-up, delivers a blistering yet hilarious rundown of the week's political chaos--where facts, justice, and sandwiches all play starring roles. The show opens with Shuster's trademark smirk and a taunting message for Donald Trump himself--then dives headlong into what he calls "a Democratic sweep, a repudiation of Trump, and a humiliation for Fox News." New Jersey's Mikie Sherrill shatters expectations with a stunning 13-point victory, as Shuster skewers Fox's polling acrobatics and the right's refusal to accept math--or reality. | | ---|---|--- From there, things get weirder. Trump, rambling about South Korea "pouring $2 trillion into America," sets up one of Shuster's best fact-checks of the season. The segment morphs from absurdity to indictment as Shuster highlights how Republicans' economic incoherence is catching up to them--and how even their own operatives are finally admitting it. "If we don't win the economy," one GOP strategist warns, "we're going to lose next year." | | ---|---|--- Subscribe for more free Shuster! | | ---|---|--- But the real shockwave of the week is what Shuster calls the "Epstein Files Bombshell." Lawmakers are whispering about photographic evidence reportedly far worse than anything previously known--images implicating Trump in behavior too grotesque for Fox News to spin away. The fallout reaches House Speaker Mike Johnson, who still refuses to swear in Rep-elect Adelita Grijalva--an Arizona Democrat promising to force a vote on releasing those files. Shuster doesn't mince words: "They're running a pedophile protection program." He then turns to a powerful segment on justice and protest. In Washington D.C., ICE agents are confronted for detaining a migrant in front of schoolchildren, sparking viral outrage. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- And in a moment both absurd and triumphant, Shuster celebrates "the sandwich heard 'round the world"--Sean Dunn's trial victory after he was charged for tossing a wrapped Subway sandwich at an ICE agent. "A jury laughed the Trump government out of court," Shuster grins. Threading through the satire and fury is an unmistakable current of empathy. "Every life matters," Shuster reminds his audience. "No matter where you came from, no matter how you identify." And just when you think you've seen it all, Shuster closes with "AI Clip of the Week," where an eerily accurate Trump-bot brags about making Elon Musk "great again" and "fertilizing eggs." It's weird, it's wild, and somehow, it perfectly captures the surrealism of American politics. Shuster 's Weekly Wrap-up is vintage Shuster--sharp, irreverent, and emotionally grounded. He gives viewers plenty to laugh at, plenty to rage about, and just enough left unsaid to make you click play and see how it all unfolds. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Invite your friends and earn rewards If you enjoy Blue Amp Media, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: If only you knew …
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We need your help to capitalize on our momentum.
#

Hey, it’s Ruben. The most important thing we can do right now is win elections. I’m sending over an email from Sherrod Brown, and I’d appreciate you taking a look and chipping in if you can.
---

$5, Peter.
We need your help to capitalize on our momentum. [**Can I count on you?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sherrod.7OMOGL&refcode=em251108-1-120&t=1&akid=4031%2E734936%2Ee2qjHV)
[CHIP IN $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sherrod.7OMOGL&refcode=em251108-1-120&t=2&akid=4031%2E734936%2Ee2qjHV)
If you knew that by giving $5 now, you could guarantee we flip this Senate seat and defeat my opponent, wouldn’t you donate immediately?
If you knew that by giving $5 now, you could help us fight back against misleading attack ads and reach more voters with the truth, wouldn’t you chip in?
If you knew that by giving $5 now, you could make real progress for working people and upend a status quo that only serves billionaires and big corporations, wouldn’t it be the best $5 you ever spent?
I know that $5 doesn’t feel like it can do all of these things and more. But in a race like this, every dollar counts.
**But by the time you get to this point in the email, thousands of folks have already given their $5 – and now, they’re counting on you to do the same.**
With a new poll showing me 1 point ahead of my opponent, we can flip this seat – but not unless we capitalize on our momentum and hit our critical grassroots fundraising goals.
[**So please, Peter, will you chip in $5 or more to Ruben Gallego and me today to help reach our $25,000 goal, power this campaign forward, and win in Ohio?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sherrod.7OMOGL&refcode=em251108-1-120&t=3&akid=4031%2E734936%2Ee2qjHV)

clean_body: = I have some news to share: Republican Elise Stefanik just announced her campaign for Governor. And Stefanik’s special interest donors have already rushed her $12 million to take me down and flip New York red. I’ve never backed down from a fight — and I sure as hell won’t start now. But Stefanik will be watching us closely, and we need to usher in a record-breaking fundraising day to show Stefanik she doesn’t stand a chance. = I’ll be blunt: Sellout Stefanik is a self-serving politician who cares more about Donald Trump’s approval than what’s best for New York families. She supports Trump’s expensive tariffs that are jacking up the costs of everything from clothing to groceries for New Yorkers. She voted multiple times against the Child Tax Credit. Stefanik brags about being the “deciding vote” for his agenda that will rip away health care from 1.5 million New Yorkers and put 5 rural hospitals in her district on the chopping block. And when the Trump administration threatened to cut NY police funding, Stefanik stayed silent. New Yorkers need a governor who will stand up to Trump and fight like hell for them. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Kathy Hochul and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you and ever upward, Kathy If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can .** Click here to . In a chilling abuse of power, Trump signed an Executive Order instructing his Department of Justice to investigate and target ActBlue — the trusted platform used by millions of Democrats to donate to campaigns, causes, and candidates across the country.
This is not a hypothetical.
This is not symbolic.
This is the sitting president of the United States trying to shut down the Democratic Party’s ability to fund itself.
That’s not democracy — that’s authoritarianism.

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: It's my 32nd Birthday Today, and I have a question foryou.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
What should the goal for the next year be?

| | | | |
---
| | Derek,

Today’s my 32nd birthday. Last night, my wife Melissa asked me a simple but important question:
**“What do you want to achieve in the next year?”** I’ve spent most of the time since thinking about that question, and I’d really like to hear what _you_ think. Over the last few years, I’ve been proud of what we’ve built together here in Salem and across New Hampshire. But as I look ahead, I want to make sure the goals I set for the next year reflect the priorities, challenges, and hopes of the people I serve and fight for everyday. So here’s my birthday request:
**Hit reply and tell me: what do you think I should try to achieve in the next year?** Your ideas, your experiences, and your vision help guide where we go next. Thank you for being part of this journey. I’m grateful for your support, your honesty, and your partnership.
\- Joe
---

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Peter, this is how we can win.
body:
Let’s do this again. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118921151/581327265/1573338254?refcode=ea.9c213648-c1bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ms=ea.9c213648-c1bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzIxMzY0OC1jMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oG-NxOfU066ld2qeBiT3AZ3YSa7k6GfvsWgfkbz-ee0=) North Carolina is one of the last true swing states on the map, Peter. I should know. I won both my elections for Governor in years that Donald Trump carried the state. It wasn’t easy, but with a groundswell of grassroots enthusiasm, we prevailed. We’ve begun building out a team that can win here again — this time for a seat in the United States Senate. We have a plan that we know can provide Democrats with success here in NC. And it’s only been possible through your support. **[I have to ask for that support again today, Peter, because we’re preparing for this to become the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history. With your help, we’ll engage with voters from every corner of this state and prove that our vision for the future is right for North Carolina. Please give what you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118921152/581327266/1573338254?refcode=ea.9c213648-c1bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ms=ea.9c213648-c1bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzIxMzY0OC1jMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oG-NxOfU066ld2qeBiT3AZ3YSa7k6GfvsWgfkbz-ee0=)** Statewide elections here are competitive and expensive. Republicans are already planning to spend hundreds of millions against us because they know this seat is the key to the Senate majority. But as we begin sharing our message with North Carolinians — a message rooted in respect for the values we share and the fundamental rights we’ve spent so long fighting for — I am confident that we’ll be able to bring voters onto our team. We can succeed here in North Carolina if we work together. **[If I can count on you to stand with me in the fight, please pitch in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118921153/581327267/1573338254?refcode=ea.9c213648-c1bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ms=ea.9c213648-c1bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzIxMzY0OC1jMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oG-NxOfU066ld2qeBiT3AZ3YSa7k6GfvsWgfkbz-ee0=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118921154/581327268/1573338254?refcode=ea.9c213648-c1bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ms=ea.9c213648-c1bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzIxMzY0OC1jMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oG-NxOfU066ld2qeBiT3AZ3YSa7k6GfvsWgfkbz-ee0=)**

Roy Cooper

* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12930932?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
|
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

The last several weeks have been very busy for me and my team. **We closed out October with events throughout the district, and we were back in Tallahassee for another round of committee weeks.** As we wrapped up our third committee week last week, I’m excited for all that we will continue to accomplish as we prepare for the upcoming legislative session in January.

**My fellow legislators and I are working tirelessly to put Florida first!** Our state is leading the nation in so many areas, but if we want to keep it that way, we must continue to promote legislation that prioritizes freedom, fiscal responsibility, and our conservative values.**Stay tuned for updates on our progress in the weeks and months to come!**

As always, please do not hesitate to [contact my office](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=598db7c993&e=d1c1b9864f) if there is something we can do for you. My team and I would be more than happy to help you in any way we can.
---
| | _**Committee Meetings**_
---
|
---
| **I have the honor of serving on several important committees for the upcoming 2026 Legislative Session.** I've**** wrapped up committee week 3. I will have another 3 committees, then head back to Tallahassee for the 2026 legislative session.
* [Human Services Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=7712e6cff2&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Economic Infrastructure Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=c32f355f57&e=d1c1b9864f)

Back in September, I also met with the [Select Committee on Property Taxes](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=b141c65ed9&e=d1c1b9864f) to further our discussion on how to provide meaningful property tax relief for hardworking Florida families.
---
| | _**Meetings and Events in the District:**_
---
|
---
| This week, I met with representatives from **Healthy Start North Central Florida** to discuss their ongoing efforts to support mothers, babies, and families across our region. Their work plays a vital role in ensuring healthier beginnings and stronger communities.
---
|
---
|
---
| **I was honored to join Senator Stan McClain for a check presentation to H.O.M.E.,** an organization making a real difference for teen moms and at-risk youth. We were proud to help secure funding to support their vocational training program, which equips young people with valuable skills and brighter futures.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
| It was great to attend the ribbon-cutting for **Marion Technical College’s new Diesel and Aviation Mechanics Program**. This marks an exciting step forward for workforce development in Marion County. Special thanks to Senator McClain for securing the funding that helped make this program a reality.
---
| | _**Meetings During Committee Weeks**_
---
|
---
| I met with the **Florida Association of Counties** to discuss priorities for the upcoming legislative session and ways we can continue working together to strengthen communities across our state.
---
|
---
|
---
| Happy to welcome the **Marion County School Board** to talk about local school needs and ways to support students, teachers, and staff.
---
|
---
|
---
| Had a great meeting with **Goodwill Industries-Suncoast** to discuss their programs supporting job training and career opportunities for individuals across our community.
---
|
---
|
---
| Enjoyed meeting with **Heart of Florida of Marion County** to learn more about their efforts to support local families and strengthen community programs.
---
|
---
|
---
| Had a productive discussion with the**Florida Physical Therapy Association** about advancing healthcare initiatives and supporting patients across the state.
---
|
---
|
---
| Spent time with the **Florida Building and Construction Trades Council** to discuss workforce development and ways to support skilled trades in our communities.
---
|
---
|
---
| Met with **Alzheimer Community Care** to learn more about their programs and discuss ways to support individuals and families affected by Alzheimer’s in our community.
---
|
---
|
---
| Welcomed the **Florida Airport Council** to discuss key issues and opportunities impacting airports and the aviation industry across the state.
---
| |
---
|
---
| Welcomed the **Florida Clerks of Court Operations Corporation** to talk about their work and learn more about how they serve communities across the state.
---
| | _**Events in the District**_
---
|
---
| Enjoyed connecting with the **Florida Association of Professional Lobbyists** to discuss their work and how they contribute to Florida’s government process.
---
|
---
| I had the pleasure of attending several events in Tallahassee, including the **AARP Florida Caregiving Summit** to learn about resources and support for caregivers, **Stetson University Day at the Capitol** to connect with students and faculty on higher education priorities, and the **Florida Airports Council Reception** to learn more about opportunities and challenges facing Florida’s airports.
---
|
---
|
---
| I had the honor of attending the **Florida Veterans’ Hall of Fame Class of 2025 induction ceremony** , where **Captain Steve Petty was recognized for his outstanding service.** A resident of Ocala, Captain Petty has dedicated countless hours to supporting veterans in Marion County through the Florida Veterans Resource Center. His work helps ensure that local veterans have access to the resources, guidance, and support they need to thrive. This well-deserved recognition highlights his commitment to honoring those who have served and improving the lives of veterans in our community.
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for your continued support of my leadership in the Florida House! I look forward to sharing with you again soon.

Have a great week!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2025 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=a725ed29eb) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=a725ed29eb).

---

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Those Dark Clouds Are The Debt
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=5703353baa&u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=076c61d883)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
The future for our state looks bright. **In just the past five years, Mississippi has seen more economic growth than in the entire fifteen years before that combined.**

We’re on track to phase out the state income tax entirely, allowing families to keep more of what they earn. Mississippi has attracted a surge of new investment, and for the first time in years, our workforce participation rate is finally heading in the right direction.

**Zoom out, and the picture gets even better.** Contrary to the endless gloom from the pundits, the American economy has consistently outperformed expectations for decades. Since the late 1990s, the U.S. has delivered strong, steady growth that few forecasters saw coming.

**But there is one dark cloud on all our horizons that we cannot forever ignore; US national debt.**
---
|
---
_That dark cloud is the debt._
| **As of today, US national debt stands at $38 trillion (with a capital T). **

To grasp how enormous a single trillion really is, try this:

* One million seconds ago was just last week, right before Halloween.
* One billion seconds ago was early 1994, when Clinton was president and the internet was dial-up.
* One trillion seconds ago was roughly 30,000 BC, deep in the Stone Age, when humans were still chasing mammoths.

**Now here’s the gut-punch: that $38 trillion mountain of debt has roughly doubled in just the past ten years.**

Costly foreign wars, mega bailouts, COVID giveaways and all those federal entitlement programs LBJ said would “end poverty”, eventually add up. (Incidentally, living standards for America’s poorest citizens are light-years higher than when those programs launched in the 1960s (indoor plumbing, air conditioning, smartphones, modern medicine), but the number of people dependent on government assistance is larger than ever).

Rather than pay for all that using tax receipts, the US government has borrowed, issuing IOUs. **Today we spend more money servicing all those IOUs than we do on defense.**
---
|
---
| As my fellow Brit, the historian Niall Ferguson, likes to point out, any great power that spends more on debt servicing than on defense risks ceasing to be a great power. That was true of the Romans and the British, the Habsburgs and the Dutch.

**What must America do to avoid a similar fate?**

When President Trump was first elected, Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy launched the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) with an ambitious target: to reduce annual federal spending by $2 trillion.

Because mandatory entitlement programs - Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid - remained largely untouched, DOGE hasn’t come close to achieving that yet. **The federal deficit has barely budged.**

Where, one might ask, are all those Tea Party types that railed against federal overspending ten years ago as the debt to GDP ratio went from 90 percent in 2010 to 125 percent today?

**If the US cannot rein in the growth of the debt, the only other way to avoid going the way of the Romans is to try to make the GDP part of the equation rise faster.** In other words, to try to grow our way out of the debt.

In order to stabilize debt-to-GDP at the current 125 percent of GDP, America will need to achieve real GDP growth of about 4 - 5 percent for the next 10 to 20 years. With the advent of AI and robotics, as Elon Musk suggests, it could be done.

Put it another way; without an AI / Robotics induced growth surge, US debt will hit 150 – 170 percent of GDP by 2050. Mamdani-economics would then become the least of our worries, as inflation and tax rises became inevitable whoever held office.

**The older I get, the more I think that there are two fundamental things that the federal government needs to get under control: mass immigration and the deficit. **Do that, and states like Mississippi have a bright future. Don’t, and all the good that we might do will only matter at the margins.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0a4879693d&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warmest regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=076c61d883) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=076c61d883).

_Copyright © 2025 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._

name: The Democrats
subject: WOW, Derek:
body:
---
Derek, This week, Democrats swept races across the country, from New York City to Virginia to New Jersey to Pennsylvania to California to Georgia to Maine, and ever since, thousands of Democrats from all over the country have been pitching in to support the DNC. These are donations we can put to work immediately to win back Congress in the midterms and prevent another two years of Trump with unchecked power. [**If you’re ready to flip the House and Senate, then we’re asking you to pitch in $7 today to help us send a powerful message to Trump and his allies: This week’s victories weren’t a fluke, and we’re coming for you in the midterms. You can use this link to help send that message, loud and clear.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251108_5208_fr&refcode2=5208_22930333_ZYdRdF&akid=5208%2E22930333%2EZYdRdF) Take a look at the donations we’ve received — _wow!_ [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251108_5208_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5208_22930333_ZYdRdF&akid=5208%2E22930333%2EZYdRdF) Every single dot on this map represents a person stepping up to help us build on our momentum and lay the groundwork to win critical races across the country next year. Now, they’re hoping you’ll do the same — especially right now. What do you say? [**Can you please make a $7 contribution to support the DNC today? We’ll put your contribution to work immediately, laying the groundwork to take back Congress.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251108_5208_fr&refcode2=5208_22930333_ZYdRdF&akid=5208%2E22930333%2EZYdRdF) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251108_5208_fr&refcode2=5208_22930333_ZYdRdF&akid=5208%2E22930333%2EZYdRdF)**

subject: A transparent look at how we will use your donation

body:
#
Peter —
James is grateful that more than 130,000 people have contributed to this campaign already.
It’s important to him that we’re good stewards of your contributions. It’s a big deal to invest your hard-earned money in a political campaign.
So before we ask you to give again, we wanted to be transparent about how we’d spend what you give to this email.
If you chip in $3, we’ll use it to buy placards for the thousands of supporters showing up at our events all across Texas.
[DONATE $3](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/504?c0=jt-em-launch._5puTu&refcode=em251108-1-ak&t=1&akid=215%2E1347274%2EjK8FDj)
If you give $30, we can buy three dozen clipboards to make sure our campaign’s thousands of volunteers have the resources they need.
[DONATE $30](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/965?c0=jt-em-launch.kAM7Si&refcode=em251108-1-ak&t=2&akid=215%2E1347274%2EjK8FDj)
And if you can afford to donate $50, it covers a half a tank of gas in James’ truck to keep him on the road meeting with and talking to voters.
[DONATE $50](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/498?c0=jt-em-launch.qllyRI&refcode=em251108-1-ak&t=3&akid=215%2E1347274%2EjK8FDj)
Running a campaign that goes everywhere and talks to every Texan willing to have a conversation takes a lot of resources, and our expenses add up quickly.
But unlike the super PACs we have to compete with, we don’t have unlimited dark money. It makes it that much more important that we use every dollar as efficiently as possible.
[**If you can, please use this link to make a contribution of any amount. We will put it to work laying the foundation to take back Texas next year.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251108-1-ak&t=4&akid=215%2E1347274%2EjK8FDj)

subject: I cannot emphasize the importance of this enough.
