body:
| | | Hi -- it's Adam Schiff, DSCC Vice Chair.

**In a moment, I'm going to talk to you about something deeply important, both to me personally and to the future of our nation. But first, I have to ask:[_Will you chip in $5 right now to help flip the Senate blue and take power away from the MAGA majority as they work to enact Trump's dangerous agenda?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22085?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251108-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251108-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&akid=21695%2E9716520%2EToI40p)_**

I'm going to put it plain and simple -- **Democrats have a huge opportunity to pick up Senate seats -- including in a pair of special elections on the calendar.** We've got a chance to capture seats that wouldn't have been up for years -- and in this moment, after all that we've seen from Donald Trump and his lawless administration including this shutdown, we have to fight for every opportunity to defeat them.**

As someone who has won a special election to the Senate, I cannot emphasize enough the importance of this. Democrats only need a few seats to flip the Senate majority, and with the GOP defending more seats than they were expecting, we have a real chance to catch them flat-footed.

But we can't just sit around and cross our fingers -- **we must do what we can right now to secure the resources we need to win seats like Ohio and Florida, defend blue battleground seats across the country, pick up key seats, and defeat Trump's handpicked enablers.**

**[These special elections are among a tiny handful of races that could decide the majority, so I have to ask: Will you chip in $5 to help Democrats win key elections like these and flip the Senate majority? In critical races, every dollar counts.](https://go.dscc.org/go/22085?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251108-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251108-AdamSchiff-SchiffSpecialElection-Pros-sl1&akid=21695%2E9716520%2EToI40p)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

For years, whispers have circulated about advanced research taking place in private labs.

Now, a newly released video brings these developments into the public eye—prompting discussion worldwide.

Respected defense expert Sarah Kent refers to this space as The Shadow Lab.

According to her, breakthroughs inside could usher in dramatic changes to how we communicate and protect our future.

[Click to watch this rare video before it’s taken offline.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=b5a63c7d4fd34c85ae9b4f8d791bc2db&_e=qtyNlyAx6z-idWQkpYlaa2lQY2EHTdMaAKvA-Jo3k0gh97zU5CaZWuA40b35bON_s_BorzNpWnFra5cpG05QDqsJGRPXhzLShpQeMBvVIJnErCQ3lNXKr0N3O8F6dIOqDB997ECiiOFzerPqmCwqXfh08flgeniSgJs9vLL6_f8YnghQ1W2vAj0rq5Z4Uajpkzrl4_DYKbWv_Sg-w_bEujsU7D9OoQxHpiRuYR5CFS2e4vJEfyqi38aPGQJi18bbwdQxAkM7sNA45FyVvLc9E1lI4Wjix48bzEAXwM_USZk6FuIHeP5Xl77whjs9kvuDGgMKlg6BvIcfvOITbWDTJrS_jROhzCgWtWqYddCUK2FxNJteVUk73x2YrCW20VHVLWm7OfN0NpG3XMVLZ2x2KzY2OhnmHIltXEkaIcybvy_mREOJsL2yVyfKS-hmkxBXkcU0d1xbGC6Y9dLQcq-rdP-1KNzuye9wjhZkmUTojWR7wMImQK3CcD56RMXQWlZ3ZKeuQZO6vMqw-v812zAWhfs4XlM1fletaRpBlYXURbqmd5C8g2Ff_J9SWXrPni7G)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Tell your governor to protect same-sex marriage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
29 states still have same-sex marriage bans on the books. If SCOTUS tears down Obergefell v. Hodges, they won’t issue marriage licenses. | |
---
Peter, The Supreme Court held a closed-door meeting Friday to consider whether to hear a case challenging _Obergefell v. Hodges_ , the decision legalizing same-sex marriage across the country. These nine justices are holding a secret meeting to decide whether or not to tear American families apart. **This is exactly why MAGA extremists worked so hard to pack the Supreme Court—they want to drag America back to a time when we were less free.** **If this MAGA Court overturns**** _Obergefell_****, 29 states will still have their same-sex marriage bans on the books.** Even though Congress protected same-sex marriage at the federal level, these state bans could still dissolve families in the eyes of the states. [**Striking down**** _Obergefell_****would be a disaster for the millions of gay couples who live in states with same-sex marriage bans. Send a message to your governor today, urging them to protect gay marriage at the state level.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRjp-vX_MniR796E0xIBGDZQw7_7Tqb1PGdhZhMMZP6-vK_2Tr9mj3vfRDS4Or6wL9tclfXLgu4Fkk48bLfCoSZrS3fW_TWxx3g-b1N6CpRPCY4vDadIaim9mw8vYmkoPJFv1n56d5N9esMTYCKlTKCO8dWag1sP6TKSUZvVX_a6rXr4kCumO0nXDZVo13snuU8AD3dZoS1j3TQFFEPPn7hSJ9d22RYQ9tvhjnpBa7YG_XcuuLd2zS2iRcbkn1TULK2c1OQwdfNmVgAnhR4VGRRwUknus9lNlA6ulHte_9kt7gOivq_bityyc_XOIZQTHc726OOeqldHqiuRiL6qD32g/4lf/XOBpETqhQgueBwSXCMrnTw/h0/h001.pVkfLm-De8o_xc0ypTSQ55JW-Xep_ahqRduW6EEdWWo) SCOTUS may or may not take up the case they’re meeting about now. The case stems from Kentucky county clerk Kim Davis, who refused to issue a marriage license to a same-sex couple. The couple sued Davis, and she was ordered to pay $300,000. Davis is asking the Court to cancel that debt and overturn same-sex marriage while she’s at it. But whether through this case or another, a challenge to same-sex marriage rights is coming. In his opinion for _Dobbs_ , the case that overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Justice Clarence Thomas specifically called for the Court to overturn _Obergefell_ as a next step. **States must step up to protect families who live in them from this out of control Supreme Court.** **This extremist Supreme Court no longer sees itself as accountable to the American people.** And now the Justices are meeting behind closed doors to decide whether or not to break up millions of American families. [**Write a message to your governor today. If your state doesn’t have a ban, our tool will give you a message urging your governor to keep protecting LGBTQ+ rights. If you live in a state with a ban, you’ll be given a message urging your governor to lead a fight against the ban.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39flXHMmeMQ4GTaibnjUGBRjp-vX_MniR796E0xIBGDZQw7_7Tqb1PGdhZhMMZP6-vK_2Tr9mj3vfRDS4Or6wL9y5JhKFd4ekvZoL9aD5WBu_vJmSqrWQFhYCoiI8LwN-zVop_ZyMZaxCglN_g64rtZm9fMYHM8DbFGnU2CQWjpjYiBfJLWVYfAtZ4prbHu6mAGEbD_a8qxKijYvdNEIW8aVXZeTD7TXmAzVhzRmsSXdFw0TjBFUKiUkZzFRku_EdGWB-k4Zx4FszrOGBBmpw7UJDYW5yGDC0pBhhxHj0pKQh4ORnoAC6e9ai9Mvzxgj6IL9z46Jr_FRjFjONsh6cfDMx3EA-DlMl5O6w0cZ_eXug/4lf/XOBpETqhQgueBwSXCMrnTw/h1/h001.BV7Oi0nNc3prrtoQjAvr3mtdBSLcdWnZx9X7JzpTHdw) Thank you for fighting for the rights of all Americans, Morgan Stahr
United for Democracy

name: Team AOC
subject: For the long haul
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
When we say we organize year-round, we mean it.
A lot of campaigns pack up their organizing efforts after Election Day. But that’s not how we do things. Our team keeps showing up — building community, deepening connections, and making sure our movement grows stronger every single day.
**That kind of work is different. It’s slower. It’s harder. And yes — it costs more. But it’s also what _delivers results._**
This year, our organizers and volunteers helped flip the only Republican-held City Council seat in the Bronx, electing Shirley Aldebol in District 13. We also helped power Justin Sanchez to victory in District 17 and Shanel Thomas Henry in District 21 — three movement leaders who will bring the voices of working people straight into City Hall.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251108.Y6Rrpf&refcode=em20251108-10173-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10173%2E2526796%2EypLFYo)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251108.Y6Rrpf&refcode=em20251108-10173-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10173%2E2526796%2EypLFYo)
And across the city, we showed up for Zohran Mamdani — and together, we helped elect him Mayor of New York City.
It’s our grassroots work, our on-the-ground organizing, and the power of our people that helped make that possible.
Because this is how change happens: by showing up. Neighbor to neighbor. Year after year.
Our campaign isn’t powered by corporate PACs and Alexandria doesn’t ask wealthy donors for big checks. It’s powered by you — by people who believe that democracy means something we do together, not something that happens to us.
[So if you can, please chip in today to help us keep organizing, keep growing, and keep building this movement for the long haul. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251108.Y6Rrpf&refcode=em20251108-10173-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=10173%2E2526796%2EypLFYo)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251108.Y6Rrpf&refcode=em20251108-10173-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=10173%2E2526796%2EypLFYo)**
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251108?refcode=em20251108-10173-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&refcode2=10173_2526796_ypLFYo&akid=10173%2E2526796%2EypLFYo)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251108-10173-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=24&akid=10173%2E2526796%2EypLFYo)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=10173%2E2526796%2EypLFYo) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=10173%2E2526796%2EypLFYo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=10173%2E2526796%2EypLFYo) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=28&akid=10173%2E2526796%2EypLFYo)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

The Radical Left is jumping at this opportunity. Our team is working tirelessly to defend our nation from the spread of socialism in the states, but we need your help to put a stop to it once and for all. We can't stress enough the gravity of this situation. | REPUBLICAN STATE LEADERSHIP MEMBERSHIP NOTICE ACCOUNT HOLDER: 2024 MEMBERSHIP: LAPSED 2025 MEMBERSHIP ENROLLMENT: PENDING You have 24 hours to reactivate your membership for 2025 and send a resounding message to the Radical Left. Your membership card is more than just a symbol of your patriotism - it's a powerful tool in our fight for the future of our nation. Don't let it lapse. We’re BEATING Hochul by 1 POINT...
This poll changes everything...
| Peter,
---
Ever since the Democrats’ government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign’s fundraising.
---
With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts.
In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that _YOU_ are our ONLY priority, which is why I’ve had my own salary withheld during the Democrats’ senseless shutdown.
**_But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will _UPEND_ the 2026 elections. _**
**A BRAND NEW POLL in New York just dropped, showing that once voters are aware of our positions, I would _BEAT_ Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by _1 POINT_!**
Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum.
There’s no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She’s even being labeled the **MOST VULNERABLE** Democrat governor in the country.
_And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory._
_So long as we reach every last voter, so long as our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and so long as I have YOU in my corner, we can SAVE New York!_
_...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done._
**That is why I’ve made the calls to secure a 5oo% MATCH for the next 24 hours to ensure we capitalize on this moment. **
Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul?
[**Please make a contribution now that we can take the LEAD in the fight to FIRE Hochul and SAVE New York – and I’ll ensure it goes 5 TIMES AS FAR.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=170bd2cdb5a84d3b8e3e3e68e222365e&_e=jhj31W9mNzn3AKjwsibDsZMm_WzuDK1Blof_nNhI7sVTpTah235s7rNmjrTULC_JdQ9DWXbZ4rehGOQnrDVRa0KYGDgIVpbtimQA4_DeEBIgc7Df_HPk4JWxqr4yzFl5eFxeyMifqECJPmmQ6fLbrNS4hrwXZGsH-vCQ1woOCxz_OhmsKku5G30jaA3h6BNxKBleBY4bdkoYTdUcuprZqS7-XC4lrJxrpl1Pm3W9bkTMJYwxgzCVW1UAO59eQIS-xzYTiyqw2EUifkKWpgKA9fTlk7U0SN68aLekQG6p4vNoGVjdTppTXTIv3YN7sbjsV-2gcAgcm5sYW1A1aPr8FBlyNNbl-oZLnXzBvFtib4rAIPnHvv3y9f07Gw3m81h-ArrP7jPmj7pW3A73soBjF45dBKNIfRCt_dIs00FOkc0TmNiUEZTOhS47qxJF1mAh9ZrkFUMwxjdOlAU7cRjQEQg4QSNKJr5CHWUYOGvwtwGX8UQkHr28CP9F7LjKHHMgXaVXCZenOypKurYsvi37HGAGQ7ISul_Daw1KydLfNxhn3lHsFCV2-1g_odqCzqHtSjnrLkNweuO64vcucBnpZVkPVNRGiyI6Ru7gYi3RuIU%3D)

name: NDRC
subject: Kansas Republicans just abandoned their special session
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This is a testament to what’s possible when we come together and fight back
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118922515/581332343/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3NTdhMjVkLWM0YmMtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IikfC6J5x-d0FbadjVZ2HjWzDUB_ehGIXD8QcQuhAlo=&emci=01dec977-20bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=f757a25d-c4bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=8431045)
---

**_“Kansas is the latest example that public pressure can work to defeat gerrymandering.”_** _— Marina Jenkins, Executive Director of the NDRC_ Peter, Kansas Republicans are abandoning efforts to force a special session to gerrymander ahead of the midterms. **This is a clear signal that fighting back works. ** This is the latest setback to Trump’s gerrymandering scheme, and it’s fitting that this news broke the same day California voters overwhelmingly approved their state’s effort to punch back against these mid-decade redraws. When Kansas Republicans first started down the path of trying to manipulate its congressional map to eliminate Kansas’s only Democratic congressional seat, we took action. The fair maps movement helped Kansans organize to contact their representatives to make sure lawmakers know their constituents deeply oppose a gerrymander. The result? **Kansas Republicans have — at least for now — thrown in the towel in the face of incredible pressure from the people. It’s a testament to what’s possible when we come together and fight back.** It should make other Republicans across the country pause. As our executive director, Marina Jenkins, put it: “By raising their voices, Kansans have made Republicans think twice before drawing another extreme gerrymander and fended off a special session on redistricting. This highlights the fact that Republicans do not have to participate in this manufactured gerrymandering crisis; in fact, they can stop this crisis from continuing — as long as they stand up for their own constituents instead of blindly following orders from Washington.” **This fight is far from over. Kansas could revisit this gerrymandering plan in the months ahead — and, as we write this, several other Republican-led states are already in the process of attempting a mid-decade redraw.[Please make a donation to help us continue to fight back wherever fair representation is under attack.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118922519/581332347/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Kansas_email_20251108-NDRC-Tier1-Kansas_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251108-NDRC-Tier1-Kansas_&utm_campaign=Kansas&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3NTdhMjVkLWM0YmMtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMjI0ODIzZmY5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IikfC6J5x-d0FbadjVZ2HjWzDUB_ehGIXD8QcQuhAlo=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: This is a testament to what’s possible when we come together and fight back | “Kansas is the latest example that public pressure can work to defeat gerrymandering.” — Marina Jenkins, Executive Director of the NDRC Peter, Kansas Republicans are abandoning efforts to force a special session to gerrymander ahead of the midterms. This is a clear signal that fighting back works. This is the latest setback to Trump’s gerrymandering scheme, and it’s fitting that this news broke the same day California voters overwhelmingly approved their state’s effort to punch back against these mid-decade redraws. When Kansas Republicans first started down the path of trying to manipulate its congressional map to eliminate Kansas’s only Democratic congressional seat, we took action. The fair maps movement helped Kansans organize to contact their representatives to make sure lawmakers know their constituents deeply oppose a gerrymander. The result? Kansas Republicans have — at least for now — thrown in the towel in the face of incredible pressure from the people. It’s a testament to what’s possible when we come together and fight back. It should make other Republicans across the country pause. As our executive director, Marina Jenkins, put it: “By raising their voices, Kansans have made Republicans think twice before drawing another extreme gerrymander and fended off a special session on redistricting. This highlights the fact that Republicans do not have to participate in this manufactured gerrymandering crisis; in fact, they can stop this crisis from continuing — as long as they stand up for their own constituents instead of blindly following orders from Washington.” This fight is far from over. Kansas could revisit this gerrymandering plan in the months ahead — and, as we write this, several other Republican-led states are already in the process of attempting a mid-decade redraw.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Kristen McDonald Rivet is exposing the human toll of Congressional Republicans’ refusal to make a deal that would lower healthcare costs for working Americans.
_**“This crisis is playing out in front of our eyes and in every community across the country. Waiting any longer to act will be devastating.” – Kristen McDonald Rivet**_
---
The GOP’s reckless agenda has driven up prices on everything — from groceries to utilities — and now, their push to slash Medicaid and eliminate Affordable Care Act (ACA) tax credits is creating a full-blown healthcare affordability crisis.

**New Dems like Rivet are fighting back to lower costs, protect healthcare access, and put working families first.**

But to stop these attacks on everyday Americans and pass real solutions, we need a Democratic House Majority.

clean_body: We must stop the extreme MAGA agenda immediately | LOOK: New Dems call out Speaker Johnson and House Republicans for abandoning Congress during the government shutdown! = | = Kristen McDonald Rivet is exposing the human toll of Congressional Republicans’ refusal to make a deal that would lower healthcare costs for working Americans. “This crisis is playing out in front of our eyes and in every community across the country. Waiting any longer to act will be devastating.” – Kristen McDonald Rivet The GOP’s reckless agenda has driven up prices on everything — from groceries to utilities — and now, their push to slash Medicaid and eliminate Affordable Care Act (ACA) tax credits is creating a full-blown healthcare affordability crisis. New Dems like Rivet are fighting back to lower costs, protect healthcare access, and put working families first. # **_From Trump: You’ve got me worried_**
**__**

I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me.
I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you.
Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW...

clean_body: It’s been a while since I heard from you. | | | | From Trump: You’ve got me worried I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me. I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you. Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW... But I know you haven’t abandoned me. I’m reaching out because YOUR NAME is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you. I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you... Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you. I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever. THANK YOU. \- President Donald J. name: Michael Bennet
subject: $14 for 14ers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Our 58 14-ers are a big part of why CO is the most beautiful state in the country. Chip in $14 now to help me keep it that way.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118923182/581334559/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk980-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzFjM2IwYy1jNWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rm1K_fw_NlgJsHLvNCiUAKFJ8argM3RL1QSSoWMz98U=)
Friend,
As a Coloradan and an avid hiker, I take a lot of pride in the fact that we've got more fourteeners (peaks of 14,000 feet or higher in elevation) here in our backyard than in any other state – 58, to be exact.
They're at the heart of our outdoor heritage and economy. They're where some of my most treasured memories have been made. They're part of what makes Colorado, in my not-so-humble opinion, the most beautiful state in the U.S.
**In short, Colorado's fourteeners are core to who we are.****_[So I'm asking you to donate $14 to help me defend them as governor, right away.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118923183/581334560/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=14&refcode=jtk980-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzFjM2IwYy1jNWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rm1K_fw_NlgJsHLvNCiUAKFJ8argM3RL1QSSoWMz98U=)_**
Because, as Donald Trump's administration and his GOP allies –
* Attempt to lay off scores of National Park Service and Forest Service staff,
* Open up cherished wild spaces to industrial logging, mining, and drilling,
* Propose selling off millions of acres of public lands to the highest bidder,
* Undo regulations that protect our land, and more...

– the stakes of preserving our fourteeners, and every Coloradan's right to safely scale them, have never been higher.
I believe we share a responsibility to protect – _not pillage_ – Colorado's outdoors for the generations who inherit them from us. And I'm committed to doing just that.
**So as governor, I'll make sure that together, we make Colorado a national leader in expanding protections for our parks, peaks, and open spaces.** Our kids and grandkids deserve nothing less.
But upholding this commitment first requires winning this race – and since I'm running a grassroots-powered campaign, I can't do that without you alongside me every step of the way.
**So please, friend:_[Will you join me in the fight for our fourteeners, and all the majestic outdoor wonders that make Colorado great, by chipping in just $14 (or anything you can spare) today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118923184/581334561/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=14&refcode=jtk980-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzFjM2IwYy1jNWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rm1K_fw_NlgJsHLvNCiUAKFJ8argM3RL1QSSoWMz98U=)_**

name: Eric Trump
subject: I remember thinking, “Dear God, they finally got him.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION
body:
I want you to know the whole story...| | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=818df154afbe40df96fb4299915202c9&_e=8CWmWCQNld_ML7KhzYKezMTsqVOVo07EKFbMfzZFz-F2r3W4TemwjqfGd9QI9C6rytsCr2JrrdOLJSIbl65qjDbq3_RC7PdLLI4Y-DBizxgOY_g4UTH_4e0npSCaBIdagkzgqeLli5jHH8Gi0kmly1b5Ar5XsxMdhIIALqNtH1Twl5wDQujSO6uQmj_jmNSRP2bAc7etcU09ePerfvuGhXG6DxGhLuthGJTshnAYlBxVJ_yr7CNkxADrJNuHGX-YKdtEBfo-vgI5QMb4G069fNlZEBpHCzyI0FeN80T4RZvhtn8dEqb93NNwFoyif-_-MmNGzCSIm3uAwTaNyrzO1q4gDFKP_ZbG_BNpFV2Zx1U6fL9Fv31hN2p9VCaTEFFJwhSsbqCdA7xv9-0x-jSXs3L2cYCTUED4wG0oYj62yuJjeTorBiET_UCTeXj-qULa627f1xB1FtITbHgJzEqroeEAI1iHDtbXY8HA_nnuVwVITHyI7-acV6N8xsix4TtrSpGTyvId4T_VJC3IlS5Ya7SGvvj1H3Nn1X0zx_Et48t7jZwCiUapzpTSuTL7WO62hleQJfYDJUtQFTrBLWJ4m_PpmgQwiRsVKczsKOlSXpdQcVwdUc0tXpIn3a2WUs3eXIoiH-I75GE1bufHPaGDN1zCxOmbikVBxMeJDBQ38sFooYdTWKJf0pzy7flv42295mjJTxYSifeeUDjz4variidtHAtrXk-DYBaJ58IB2a0%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, They shot my father. Then, they killed my friend Charlie Kirk. And still -- _the Left hasn't won._ But if we back down now... they will. That's why I'm asking you to stand with me -- and support an organization Charlie built to fight back and WIN: **Turning Point Action.** Charlie was assassinated for daring to teach young Americans to love this country. My father was almost murdered for refusing to give up on America. **My new book -- _Under Siege_ -- is the story of how we've endured and how YOU can help fight back.**
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=818df154afbe40df96fb4299915202c9&_e=8CWmWCQNld_ML7KhzYKezMTsqVOVo07EKFbMfzZFz-F2r3W4TemwjqfGd9QI9C6rytsCr2JrrdOLJSIbl65qjDbq3_RC7PdLLI4Y-DBizxgOY_g4UTH_4e0npSCaBIdagkzgqeLli5jHH8Gi0kmly1b5Ar5XsxMdhIIALqNtH1Twl5wDQujSO6uQmj_jmNSRP2bAc7etcU09ePerfvuGhXG6DxGhLuthGJTshnAYlBxVJ_yr7CNkxADrJNuHGX-Yop6BBUHtrisD_yrD_hT5oIgSqNwpZ8TvpnM0enEfNoDeWx9r0Mpvf4D_Q7D9_L1SS7oOAaUytRulEmcQX7IxJUbvv9GzwjzOiyZHJ0kO1qT0EQSFQAGtfqHlGCzB4HW14g2JeddNc5VIgz_JV5AC9adJKePrO9NEGH1LUvOiJ6UxAFgkARBpelNP0an--3x52UjAbVOYwleKUCjGovF-7geRJPdQjNmZxCn6XjoJsKbao_nf8a7A2dj5dsWCH6P0lNV53v7lqPQiksNVuWoEJm9hB5doIMv0dOae8UX7Bl1tr8vqtVTAAG0YGfaEI8oqAE_2G75_p6Ur1iSaC__fuIx_-lGfhRBYoJscmfBLir7bzEmeM7p3yNasu1aPFwssfKxU9KAti5Ort2ogDDS4X9UUV3FH9ccTnFLtWktr2jS65g3Kks47WHuKmkQr6z8ncLaXQTZz7Ed676wpWWyt35l4afDvQGA_-R1xVxWu46I%3D)

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Great news for families working hard to put food on the table →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Now, working families can breathe a little easier |
#
---
Team, We fought like hell for Michigan families — _and won._ Yesterday, a federal court made clear what we’ve been saying all along: families who rely on SNAP should never be treated like bargaining chips in a political fight. **After this ruling, Michigan moved immediately to make sure every eligible household receives its full benefits without delay.** That means parents can put food on the table, seniors can stretch their budgets, and hundreds of thousands of Michiganders can finally breathe a little easier heading into the holidays. But we can’t stop now. **Fight Like Hell PAC is how we defend and elect leaders who put people first — leaders who’ll defend the fundamental right to feed your family.** When Republicans in Washington try to attack programs like SNAP, we step up, organize, and hold the line. **[If you’re with me, chip in today so we can keep electing leaders with some backbone — leaders who will fight for working families every single day. Here in Michigan, we’re showing what real leadership looks like: moving fast, cutting red tape, and making sure families get what they need — whether Washington is functioning or not.
We’ve protected school meals, strengthened our food banks, and worked with partners across the state to make sure no one goes hungry.
I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished this week. **But this fight is so much bigger than one court ruling or one month of benefits.** Our fight is about building a future where families aren’t one shutdown or one political stunt away from losing their ability to put food on the table.
**[That’s why I’m excited about what we’re building, and why I’m asking for your support. Please, make a contribution to Fight Like Hell PAC today so we can keep electing leaders who put people over politics.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118924611/581339644/-1313101069?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20251108_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjIwNThmMzAtYzdiYy1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAyMjQ4MjNmZjliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UWHMYmE7lhtgrmFHUNoPjvhUaqcLC5OG6QtKjQC_YZU=)**

clean_body: Now, working families can breathe a little easier | Team, We fought like hell for Michigan families — and won. Yesterday, a federal court made clear what we’ve been saying all along: families who rely on SNAP should never be treated like bargaining chips in a political fight. After this ruling, Michigan moved immediately to make sure every eligible household receives its full benefits without delay. That means parents can put food on the table, seniors can stretch their budgets, and hundreds of thousands of Michiganders can finally breathe a little easier heading into the holidays. But we can’t stop now. Fight Like Hell PAC is how we defend and elect leaders who put people first — leaders who’ll defend the fundamental right to feed your family. When Republicans in Washington try to attack programs like SNAP, we step up, organize, and hold the line. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Here in Michigan, we’re showing what real leadership looks like: moving fast, cutting red tape, and making sure families get what they need — whether Washington is functioning or not. We’ve protected school meals, strengthened our food banks, and worked with partners across the state to make sure no one goes hungry. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished this week. But this fight is so much bigger than one court ruling or one month of benefits. Our fight is about building a future where families aren’t one shutdown or one political stunt away from losing their ability to put food on the table. = | = Thank you, Gretchen Whitmer Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. FightLikeHellPAC.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: This is a defining moment for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Now, we need your help to take advantage of it.
#
Up and down the ballot.
In states like Georgia, Virginia, Mississippi, and Pennsylvania.
On Tuesday, Democrats delivered major wins for everyday Americans at every level. **But our work _cannot_ end here, Peter.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97520?refcode=em20251108-9689&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9689%2E614464%2EbwHoIh)
**[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97520?refcode=em20251108-9689&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9689%2E614464%2EbwHoIh)**
Every day between now and next November, we need to make sure voters keep hearing about the ways GOP politicians + their billionaire donors use the rest of us for their own benefit. And we need to uplift the Democratic candidates fighting to protect our freedoms and our democracy.
That’s where you come in, Peter. As a grassroots movement, we need support from everyday people like you – even just $3 or $5 at a time – to rally around Democrats across the country and fight back against the GOP in the moments it matters most. So today we’re asking:
**[Can you chip in $5 right now to help us prepare for the 2026 midterms? name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Putting our champions in the strongest position possible
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251108-1615-foote&t=1001&akid=1615%2E342411%2ENB4pCB ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Every day, our Squad members are on the front lines — standing up for
their communities and fighting for bold, progressive change. They’re
tackling issues others ignore, challenging entrenched power, and showing
up for the people, no matter how tough the fight gets.

But right now, they’re facing a serious challenge: their cash on hand
isn’t at the level it needs to be to keep them fully prepared and in the
fight.

Without enough funding, our champions are left exposed. They can’t reach
voters as effectively, respond to attacks from opponents, or counter
misinformation quickly. Every gap in resources puts their campaigns — and
the progress we’ve fought so hard for — at risk.

That’s why grassroots support is so crucial. Our movement is powered by
people, not billionaires or corporate PACs. Every donation, no matter the
size, fuels our champions’ campaigns, strengthens their ability to
organize, and helps them put out the strongest numbers possible in every
report.

This is how we make sure the Squad can continue standing up for justice on
all fronts — from protecting voting rights to fighting for economic
fairness and equality in every community.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251108-movement.ub4V7n&refcode=em20251108-1615&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1615%2E342411%2ENB4pCB ]Will you chip in $3 today to make sure our champions
have the resources they need to keep pushing back and driving the bold,
progressive change our country needs?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251108-movement.ub4V7n&refcode=em20251108-1615&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1615%2E342411%2ENB4pCB ]Contribute ››

Together, we’re building a movement that doesn’t back down. Thank you for
standing with us,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1615%2E342411%2ENB4pCB

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

clean_body: I’m laser-focused on this one thing. | Fellow American, You're probably getting lots of fundraising emails. Believe it or not, I get them too! In fact, Senate Republicans recently OUTRAISED Senate Democrats, so I'm not going to give you a sky-is-falling fundraising pitch. Senate Majority Leader, I'm focused on the ONE and ONLY thing that wins elections: So, my priority right now is fixing the fact that our party's voter file isLAGGING behind the Democrats'. Look, we can be winning in the polls (we are), we can be winning by passing President Trump's agenda in the Senate and HOLDING THE LINE against Schumer's Shutdown (we are), and we can be winning in popularity over the Democrats (we absolutely are)... ...But unless we have a 100% verified voter file, we'll lose everything to the Democrats, We need to MATCH that energy and determination. We can't let Democrats take back the reins of the Senate for the second half of the Trump-Vance presidency. Thank you, Senator John Thune If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. clean_body: [] Peter – Jena was just on MSNBC to discuss David Graham’s article in the The Atlantic , titled “Donald Trump’s Plan to Subvert the Midterms Is Already Under Way”. The article makes one thing crystal clear: Donald Trump is a danger to our democracy and elections. Watch her interview here → [] [] It’s exactly what Democratic Secretaries of State have been warning about for years. Trump and his allies will stop at nothing to undermine our democracy and spread lies about our elections. As Colorado’s Secretary of State, Jena never backed down in the fight against Trump’s attempts to dismantle democracy. Now, as she runs for Attorney General, Jena is ready to keep fighting to protect our rights, our votes, and our democracy from those who would destroy them. But we can’t wait until it’s too late. To stand up to Trump and his enablers, we need to build the strongest grassroots campaign in Colorado right now. Chip in today to help Jena Griswold defend democracy — in 2025, 2026, and beyond. **_OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally...
---
**_I’m officially launching my campaign for governor of New York – and I’d like _YOU_ to be one of our very first Founding Members!_**
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d1872940add04713b45472efe1ee9f7e&_e=uMRATXdbjjXN8l9haPt6joh2xu9wynGaA7l6aBClAJ1-2CPikh-6kpywSp4Pl5q_1eCAiV1Dsj9E_zvRU2oWjI_4Eylt3TIQEccVnjhfgY3SXVuCzjMblwnVnhh6N2xdbCxhB4CmAN0whSpraUPqQdmgypxvFvnACC03MYMujqrV__8hvJ1yHNy7FkQQNgEFp0PszfJHGcQYgfDeFMsLhNFo0Fak1mvHQYJFQF9nJnckQQiKk_9PWBriKe-theiMKIL0Ep2siLrdTK97NCNlPyvkw6EZ58rCBian9M29MliBqpoZ51ek4mB1oJE96OAth1Fa-LD2kxHaOAo02SHRQ7CcJdw0lSKZOjr0XCeOV6_UvoHe36p_iWJpLHz8c-8wpq4SSYSXyogB9fPSTDTM4XmOWSjzugzNYugMMd40TTOKon3w7oK4KRDGo48Tbwpd0dZ_7Y6M5PES1CLF3cRf3sWxwMDqHWwg_eDxqhDXoZLCeB_A7JnZErz3GWXzKSAlJl0VnskIGAg-iZxIkhD_gGcYsGJBwx6RiTfv0MSz7FGHXMnJmza8E7qpEjp2GklnIbyVv0A6ASLotHbCP0hmUfQb6gbvJrt9DGeuVXTJu8yoNBPDrOPEvhe3OcpCCHwn)
---

Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she’s brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda.
---
__But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw.__
---
**As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover!**
---
This isn’t just another election, Fellow Patriot.
---
**_It’s the _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ to SAVE New York before it’s lost forever!_**
---
Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani’s dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees.
---
**But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the _FINAL_ _FIREWALL_ that protects New Yorkers from this insanity!**
---
We’re starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a _**ONE-POINT LEAD**_ – _and that’s before I even officially launched our campaign!_
---
As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul’s attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory.
---
That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign.
---
Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state!
---
**_That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,_600% MATCH_!_**
---
When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank...
---
**_Our Founding Members like _YOU_ who had my back on day one!_**
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount to become an official Founding Member of my gubernatorial campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul – and help unlock a 600% MATCH.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d1872940add04713b45472efe1ee9f7e&_e=uMRATXdbjjXN8l9haPt6joh2xu9wynGaA7l6aBClAJ1-2CPikh-6kpywSp4Pl5q_1eCAiV1Dsj9E_zvRU2oWjI_4Eylt3TIQEccVnjhfgY3SXVuCzjMblwnVnhh6N2xdbCxhB4CmAN0whSpraUPqQdmgypxvFvnACC03MYMujqrV__8hvJ1yHNy7FkQQNgEFp0PszfJHGcQYgfDeFMsLhNCbYidfleHtGWA0Uj07pwpTigBTfwzJqol7MYic1fIdwIl06G3IqOMQDMz8fPSCWcHoox_IGZsE7gfI-Agcg63NRs2e390-ig7sUEGLW6InsQw0lTUc1RckHCQXI3l1D0PupBjmjecOEHyDAZEi1kUQ8vHqacG7tye1iMr2Xb-qmmof1aHTwjO_WFRWjE6hddlpx-ASsGbtzIn2YfZnPGzKWG1mKsq6sSQNg-WyYM7E332QPznnYFMsEfOEnOsk6cZLr_qP746uYNvMVqaxE6agJYZqDVY6tckhxf_1JhyGZCwmbT5CwVZmPRCFGJOsT0NGX3NfmEGo9fgIVUkyz7b5eAkTvWIUVDReoTFsDxLAMnPvm5laXXYqC_n8L7WZPZtqlB7Jcqmoyqx0qZwh-2txvH2ikGROZJp77yAHPdo4)

Thank you,

name: Powered by People
subject: Proof that this is working
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Powered by People just held organizing events in McKinney, College
Station, and Waco—three Texas communities where Donald Trump won big in
2024.

And the results speak for themselves:

* McKinney (Trump +11): we recruited 22 new candidates to run for local
office and 67 new volunteers joined our movement.
* College Station (Trump +25): we recruited 12 new candidates and 21 new
volunteers signed up to fight for their communities.
* Waco (Trump +30): we recruited 16 new candidates and 32 new volunteers
committed to organizing on the ground for change.

These are places that pundits like to write off. But we know better. Every
conversation, every candidate, every volunteer moves us closer to turning
the tide here in Texas—and that’s exactly what happened at these three
events.

This is what building a people-powered movement looks like.

But we can’t stop now, and we can’t stop with just three cities. To keep
organizing effective events like these across the state, recruit new
candidates up and down the ballot, and give volunteers the tools they
need, we need your support.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251108.dxeNqR&refcode=ema20251108-240451&amount=3&t=1002&akid=240451%2E444211%2EdT3kny ]Will you chip in $3 today to keep this movement growing
across Texas? Every contribution helps us reach more communities and prove
that no place is too red or too blue to organize.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251108.dxeNqR&refcode=ema20251108-240451&amount=3&t=1021&akid=240451%2E444211%2EdT3kny ]DONATE $3

Thank you,

Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=240451%2E444211%2EdT3kny

name: Sharice for Congress HQ
subject: Here’s the gameplan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We wanted to follow up with a little more information on the gameplan for Team Sharice over these next few weeks

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118925467/581341539/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2FkYWVhMy1jYWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cj2gJDlOE5ozP4tisuyyPBOjJ7hZusH2a7VsTxKLrgY=) Hey, We know Sharice emailed you yesterday about the latest updates for our campaign because, well... she reached out to pretty much everyone! To that end, we wanted to follow up with a little more information on the gameplan for Team Sharice over these next few weeks, and tell you exactly why your support makes a big difference not only for our campaign — but for Kansas’ future as a whole. [_**We’ll share the toplines with you in a second, but we also want to be transparent: Our fundraising this month has started off a little bit slow. We’re not pushing the panic button or claiming that the sky will fall if you don’t donate, but it’s something we want to correct. Can you help Sharice out?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118925468/581341540/-46554286?refcode=email_110825_gameplan&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2FkYWVhMy1jYWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cj2gJDlOE5ozP4tisuyyPBOjJ7hZusH2a7VsTxKLrgY=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118925469/581341541/-46554286?refcode=email_110825_gameplan&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2FkYWVhMy1jYWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cj2gJDlOE5ozP4tisuyyPBOjJ7hZusH2a7VsTxKLrgY=)
---
Here’s where things stand:
* **Donald Trump’s gerrymander has stalled in Kansas... for now.** But Kansas Republicans aren’t showing any signs of giving up. The Kansas House Speaker even released a press release with the title “Countdown to January 12th” — the very first opportunity Kansas Republicans will have to gerrymander Kansas’ maps.

* **So for all intents and purposes, our next Election Day is just two months away.** For most other Congressional campaigns, they won’t even begin to _think_ about ramping up until 2026. Not us. We have to keep this campaign firing on all cylinders for another two months, just like we have since September.

* **Your support is what made Kansas Republicans back off this month. And it’s how we’ll win this next round too.** Because so many folks like you stepped up, Kansas Republicans felt the pressure. They _knew_ the political consequences would be enormous if they went ahead with the November special session — so they dropped it. Now, we need to keep it up.

We have to keep this campaign firing on all cylinders for another two months, just like we have since September. Your support is what made Kansas Republicans back off this month. And it’s how we’ll win this next round too. Because so many folks like you stepped up, Kansas Republicans felt the pressure. name: Jane Fonda
subject: We have two more chances to beat Trump's agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
These critical races represent the next chapter in our climate movement.

|
---
We've spent the week celebrating historic JanePAC victories across the country — _and there's so much more to celebrate._ But today, I want to focus on something equally important: making sure that **blue wave** doesn't stop. On Tuesday, two of our JanePAC-endorsed climate champions advanced to heated runoffs that have the power to transform the future of our country and our climate:
* **In Texas, Christian Menefee** dominated a 16-candidate field with 29% of the vote for the TX-18 congressional seat. But you need 50% to avoid a runoff in the state — so the fight continues early next year.

* **In New Jersey, James Solomon** made it through a competitive 7-candidate field to reach the December 2nd runoff for Mayor of Jersey City, the Garden State's second-largest city.

**[Both races are winnable, but Christian and James can’t cross the finish line without grassroots supporters like you standing with them once again. name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The Trump administration is preparing to open our oceans to new offshore oil and gas drilling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
This is reckless, dangerous, and totally avoidable.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118926873/581347091/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjM5ZmNiNS1jZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t8A1y4EsM0yEn6-szwxzpNSENZ1zg8dKsbGEm3ZHfE4=&emci=e2057092-1bbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=5239fcb5-cdbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=7731215)
---

| | The Trump administration is preparing to open large areas of our oceans to new offshore oil and gas drilling, and **I'm leading the fight to stop it.** Opening these fragile coastal waters to drilling would devastate communities, economies, and ecosystems. Coastal towns that rely on fishing, tourism, and recreation would be put at risk. And we know from experience that when drilling expands, oil spills follow. NOAA already responds to more than 150 oil and chemical spills every year. One major spill can kill marine life, wipe out small businesses, contaminate beaches for generations, and cost taxpayers billions of dollars. This isn't about energy security. The United States already leads the world in oil and gas production. Oil companies already hold more than 2,000 offshore leases — covering over 12 million acres of federal waters — and fewer than 500 of those leases are even producing oil or gas. **There is simply no justification to open untouched coastal areas when existing leases go unused.** And while the administration is trying to ramp up drilling, it is simultaneously dismantling the very programs designed to prevent and respond to spills. The Trump administration has hollowed out NOAA's oil spill prevention and response operations — nearly 30 percent of the team has been laid off or pushed into early retirement, and the remaining program is slated to lose half its funding in next year's budget. That means more drilling, less oversight, and no plan to protect coastal communities when things go wrong. **This is reckless, dangerous, and totally avoidable.** Our coastal economies, our national security, and our environment should never be sacrificed for short-term fossil fuel profits. I'll keep pushing to stop this plan in its tracks and defend our oceans and coastal communities — because once these places are damaged, there's no going back. Onward, _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: This is reckless, dangerous, and totally avoidable. | | | | The Trump administration is preparing to open large areas of our oceans to new offshore oil and gas drilling, and I'm leading the fight to stop it. Opening these fragile coastal waters to drilling would devastate communities, economies, and ecosystems. Coastal towns that rely on fishing, tourism, and recreation would be put at risk. And we know from experience that when drilling expands, oil spills follow. NOAA already responds to more than 150 oil and chemical spills every year. One major spill can kill marine life, wipe out small businesses, contaminate beaches for generations, and cost taxpayers billions of dollars. This isn't about energy security. The United States already leads the world in oil and gas production. Oil companies already hold more than 2,000 offshore leases — covering over 12 million acres of federal waters — and fewer than 500 of those leases are even producing oil or gas. There is simply no justification to open untouched coastal areas when existing leases go unused. And while the administration is trying to ramp up drilling, it is simultaneously dismantling the very programs designed to prevent and respond to spills. The Trump administration has hollowed out NOAA's oil spill prevention and response operations — nearly 30 percent of the team has been laid off or pushed into early retirement, and the remaining program is slated to lose half its funding in next year's budget. That means more drilling, less oversight, and no plan to protect coastal communities when things go wrong. This is reckless, dangerous, and totally avoidable. Our coastal economies, our national security, and our environment should never be sacrificed for short-term fossil fuel profits. I'll keep pushing to stop this plan in its tracks and defend our oceans and coastal communities — because once these places are damaged, there's no going back. Onward, Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

Peter,

Ask any family and they'll tell you: The holiday season can be one of the most magical times of the year...but also one of the most expensive.

Between planning Thanksgiving dinner, finding gifts for loved ones, covering travel costs, or even managing higher heating and electricity bills when it gets colder — it all adds up fast.

**_And Mariannette Miller-Meeks isn't making it any easier._** With more folks getting sick this time of year, taking care of healthcare costs is going to be difficult for the thousands of people she voted to kick off their healthcare. Now, add the burden of rising prices, tariffs Miller-Meeks has championed, cuts to nutrition assistance she barely fought against, and a crisis in Washington her party engineered which is leaving workers and families across the country asking when their next paycheck will come.

Christina knows Iowans are tired of politicians working against their interests. She knows nothing means more than true action, and she’s ready to fight for this district with everything she's got. In Congress, she'll work every day to bring costs down and give families some breathing room. [**She is the candidate for your wallet, and with your support we can send her to Washington in 2026 to fight for you. Help her by making a donation to her campaign today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118927988/581350237/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251108_FRisin_fnd_gq_act___BHQ_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251108_FRisin_fnd_gq_act___BHQ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5a08a1ea-d1bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTA4YTFlYS1kMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8MxbmQOL10kmmJYcOJKjThsyhXRonVJrH04WabAiK5s=)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: 1,800 meals and counting!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
You helped us exceed our goal and provide 1,800 meals. Let’s keep going.
#
Hi Peter. I’m so excited to share this news with you:
**Thanks to this incredible community, we didn’t just hit our $2,500 goal to feed Seattle families impacted by SNAP delays — we _crushed_ it!**
So far, we’ve raised over **$4,500** to support the White Center Food Bank. That’s enough to provide **1,800 meals.** I knew this community would be willing to help, but I’m truly moved by how quickly and generously folks like you stepped up while Trump and MAGA Republicans continue abandoning families in need.
**And we’re not done yet.** Food banks in Seattle and across the country are seeing longer lines and higher demand than ever. With no end in sight to the shutdown and SNAP funding still on the line, we need to pull through again.
**That’s why we’re setting a new goal: $9,000 to provide 3,600 meals before Thanksgiving. [Will you pitch in today to help us get there?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251108-whitecenter.P6pduy&refcode=em20251108-5610&t=1&akid=5610%2E420207%2Egg9b7Z)**
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251108-whitecenter.P6pduy&refcode=em20251108-5610&t=2&akid=5610%2E420207%2Egg9b7Z)**
These meals make a real difference. It’s one less worry for families trying to pay rent, care for their kids, and put food on the table during a difficult time.
This is what resistance looks like: community, compassion, and taking action when our leaders fail to.
Let’s keep it going — together.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

Hi, it's Shawn Harris, the Democrat running to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene. When I say I'm a _Dirt Road Democrat,_ I don't mean it as a slogan. I mean it as a way of life.
---
| [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/_GdowVb1VN4HVJQ9uxafqQ~~/AAPPABA~/aNQs42EKG4FEZk9x3L-F0MNvha7kfQGJ9GwjTyYPHjVvwSSfD26xirNSsVSAT-HW-GhRzDio0b1_Y-Sf4E-OPOZNwnJfU6Sd9ES9C4y9RnS7EKHD2s4eqSv-Iuy50ujtZz0yuOGsoA9U7RcKqIJmu3lQFttjl4W5T4NAoX4FgBSvXrpNwKPq4FSPsVxihUUzMlvooOhl71Br_JqpgBHye0RddrEjGWL93maIRGDRnoZvKtg2vEgTsBLs_lUL5uoJhgKwbX4AdWA3q3JnKWmxSA~~)

Being a Dirt Road Democrat means more than identifying with where we live--it means standing up for the values rural communities care about most:**_fairness, opportunity, and dignity._** For too long, rural Georgia has been treated like an afterthought. Our **hospitals** have shut their doors, our **farmers** face rising costs and shrinking margins, and our**small towns** have lost jobs while politicians in Washington argue on TV. Meanwhile, Marjorie Taylor Greene has spent her time chasing headlines instead of delivering results. That's not leadership--it's abandonment. We're building something different. Being a Dirt Road Democrat is about showing up everywhere, fighting for affordable healthcare, protecting Social Security and Medicare, investing in local schools, and making sure rural Georgia has the same shot at prosperity as anyone else. [**And we 're not just building a campaign--we're building a movement. That's why I'm asking you to take the first step with me: Will you add your name to let me know that YOU are a Dirt Road Democrat?**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/_GdowVb1VN4HVJQ9uxafqQ~~/AAPPABA~/aNQs42EKG4FEZk9x3L-F0MNvha7kfQGJ9GwjTyYPHjVvwSSfD26xirNSsVSAT-HW-GhRzDio0b1_Y-Sf4E-OPOZNwnJfU6Sd9ES9C4y9RnS7EKHD2s4eqSv-Iuy50ujtZz0yuOGsoA9U7RcKqIJmu3lQFttjl4W5T4NAoX4FgBSvXrpNwKPq4FSPsVxihUUzMlvooOhl71Br_JqpgBHye0RddrEjGWL93maIRGDRnoZvKtg2vEgTsBLs_lUL5uoJhgKwbX4AdWA3q3JnKWmxSA~~)

clean_body: | | Hi, it's Shawn Harris, the Democrat running to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene. When I say I'm a Dirt Road Democrat, I don't mean it as a slogan. I mean it as a way of life. | ~~ Being a Dirt Road Democrat means more than identifying with where we live--it means standing up for the values rural communities care about most:fairness, opportunity, and dignity. For too long, rural Georgia has been treated like an afterthought. Our hospitals have shut their doors, our farmers face rising costs and shrinking margins, and oursmall towns have lost jobs while politicians in Washington argue on TV. Meanwhile, Marjorie Taylor Greene has spent her time chasing headlines instead of delivering results. That's not leadership--it's abandonment. We're building something different. Being a Dirt Road Democrat is about showing up everywhere, fighting for affordable healthcare, protecting Social Security and Medicare, investing in local schools, and making sure rural Georgia has the same shot at prosperity as anyone else. ~~ ~~ Together, we're sending a message loud and clear that rural voters matter, that we won't be written off anymore, and that it's time for leaders who actually fight for us. Together, we can defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and prove that dirt roads lead somewhere powerful. Onward, Shawn Harris | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: Capitol Update – November 8th: Preparing for the 2026 Legislative Session
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
Weekly Highlights: Justice Action Network convention, Eyman prison tour, Capitol meetings, community recognition, and upcoming legislative priorities. | | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=90430b0871&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Patriot:

November is off to a strong start as we prepare for the next legislative session beginning on **January 12th.**
#### **Weekly Highlights:**
* **Justice Action Network Convention **On Tuesday morning, I co-presented and answered some questions about one of my signed pieces of legislation at the Justice Action Network’s convention in Scottsdale. This legislation focuses on increasing accountability and transparency within the Department of Corrections Rehabilitation and Reentry. Next session, our goal is to ensure this independent oversight is fully funded since the current governor defunded it during our budget negotiations.
* **Eyman State Prison Tour **On Wednesday, I drove down to Florence to tour the Eyman state prison complex. Rep. Blackman and I met with the director of our state's corrections department and some of his staff to gain a deeper insight into day-to-day operations and challenges. We toured the maximum security unit and the sex offender unit.
* **Capitol Meetings**** **This Thursday was packed meeting with more than a dozen individuals, including with some of my fellow state senators to discuss such critical issues as elder abuse solutions to ways to address district-specific concerns.
* **Congressional Meeting **I ended Thursday meeting with Congressman Abe Hamadeh, who represents the western portion of our legislative district in Washington, D.C. We discussed veterans’ issues, the federal government shutdown, SNAP, election integrity, and ways our offices can collaborate for the benefit of our constituents.
* **Community Recognition **On Friday afternoon, I visited **Karen’s Hallmark on Bell Road** to present them with a State Senate business recognition certificate as the **Arizona Retailer of the Year for District 2**. Congratulations to Teresa and Wei for their outstanding work!

#### **2025 Legislator of the Year Award**

I am proud to share that on Friday night I was awarded the **2025 “Legislator of the Year”** by **ABATE of Arizona** in recognition of my leadership on issues vital to motorcyclists’ rights, freedom, and safety.
_"Senator Bolick has earned this award every year she has served in the Legislature, with the exception of her freshman term when she was recognized as an Honorable Mention. Her long-standing record reflects consistent support for protecting riders from government overreach, including her advocacy for safer roadways and her push for real world transportation solutions. __Senator Bolick exemplifies the kind of legislative leadership Arizona’s motorcyclists need. She has shown that safety and liberty can go hand-in-hand.” _~ Michael Infanzon, ABATE Legislative Director
####
**About ABATE of Arizona **ABATE is the state’s largest motorcycle rights organization, dedicated to protecting riders’ freedoms, promoting roadway safety, and ensuring fair treatment under the law.
####
**Looking Ahead**
The season of drafting legislation is in full swing at the Arizona Capitol. I’m working on a wide range of policy matters—from addressing family court issues to election integrity—alongside constituents and colleagues.

Currently, Legislative Council has received over 700 bills to be drafted between the House and Senate for 2026. My current workload already leans towards the heavy side of the ledger.
**🗳️ Campaign Update 📈**

**👉[ Click here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=18f76e9743&e=a7ab36849c) **to sign my nomination petition.

**👉[ Click here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=faecbf2a68&e=a7ab36849c) **to donate to my campaign.
Thank you for staying engaged and informed. Together, we’re making real progress for District 2 and the State of Arizona.

Best regards,
Shawnna
---

body:
We’re BEATING Hochul by 1 POINT...
This poll changes everything...
| Friend,
---
Ever since the Democrats’ government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign’s fundraising.
---
With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts.
In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that _YOU_ are our ONLY priority, which is why I’ve had my own salary withheld during the Democrats’ senseless shutdown.
**_But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will _UPEND_ the 2026 elections. _**
**A BRAND NEW POLL in New York just dropped, showing that once voters are aware of our positions, I would _BEAT_ Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by _1 POINT_!**
Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum.
There’s no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She’s even being labeled the **MOST VULNERABLE** Democrat governor in the country.
_And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory._
_So long as we reach every last voter, so long as our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and so long as I have YOU in my corner, we can SAVE New York!_
_...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done._
**That is why I’ve made the calls to secure a 5oo% MATCH for the next 24 hours to ensure we capitalize on this moment. **
Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul?
