clean_body: We’re BEATING Hochul by 1 POINT... This poll changes everything... | Friend, Ever since the Democrats’ government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign’s fundraising. With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts. In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that YOU are our ONLY priority, which is why I’ve had my own salary withheld during the Democrats’ senseless shutdown. But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will UPEND the 2026 elections. A BRAND NEW POLL in New York just dropped, showing that once voters are aware of our positions, I would BEAT Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by 1 POINT! Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum. There’s no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She’s even being labeled the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat governor in the country. And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory. So long as we reach every last voter, so long as our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and so long as I have YOU in my corner, we can SAVE New York! ...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done. That is why I’ve made the calls to secure a 5oo% MATCH for the next 24 hours to ensure we capitalize on this moment. Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul? | Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Seth Moulton
subject: I've never been afraid to speak up and demand better
body:
| |
---
Team, I’ve never been one to sit on the sidelines or wait to act. When I see a problem, I try to fix it. I’m not willing to wait or play politics while our country and our values are under attack. This is not a time for caution but for change. Our future demands that Democrats — across the nation — win. And to do that, we need to be brave enough to put people over politics. **That's what public service means to me, friend. I've never been afraid to call out the institutions that I've served, because principled dissent is an American value that makes us all stronger.** After completing three combat deployments to Iraq, I spoke out against a war that I knew was unjust, and I’ve been fighting for our veterans and our Iraqi and Afghan allies ever since. I ran for Congress and won against an entrenched establishment-supported incumbent because I didn’t feel my community was getting the leadership it needed to meet our urgent needs. And with my Serve America team, we’ve flipped dozens of Congressional seats from red to blue in the past seven years. I’ve challenged leaders in my own party when I felt we could do better, and have never accepted "good enough" when too many Americans are being left behind. Our country is in crisis. People are hurting, scared, and angry. It’s time for a new generation of Americans to take the torch and lead us forward with honor, courage, and commitment. **[Are you with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118928231/581351111/2090747700?refcode=251108_sm_institutions_l1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGQ1MzdmOS1kNGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MljUs5oS2_lifBKEJcx6Gxo6piMZdZpSTZCRyXqevT4=)** **[SUPPORT OUR CAMPAIGN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118928232/581351112/1375639745?refcode=251108_sm_institutions_b1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGQ1MzdmOS1kNGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MljUs5oS2_lifBKEJcx6Gxo6piMZdZpSTZCRyXqevT4=)** Thank you, Seth

### About Seth Moulton
Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. clean_body: | | Team, I’ve never been one to sit on the sidelines or wait to act. When I see a problem, I try to fix it. I’m not willing to wait or play politics while our country and our values are under attack. This is not a time for caution but for change. Our future demands that Democrats — across the nation — win. And to do that, we need to be brave enough to put people over politics. That's what public service means to me, friend. I've never been afraid to call out the institutions that I've served, because principled dissent is an American value that makes us all stronger. After completing three combat deployments to Iraq, I spoke out against a war that I knew was unjust, and I’ve been fighting for our veterans and our Iraqi and Afghan allies ever since. I ran for Congress and won against an entrenched establishment-supported incumbent because I didn’t feel my community was getting the leadership it needed to meet our urgent needs. And with my Serve America team, we’ve flipped dozens of Congressional seats from red to blue in the past seven years. I’ve challenged leaders in my own party when I felt we could do better, and have never accepted "good enough" when too many Americans are being left behind. Our country is in crisis. People are hurting, scared, and angry. It’s time for a new generation of Americans to take the torch and lead us forward with honor, courage, and commitment. = = Thank you, Seth | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. They live in Salem, Massachusetts. | = | = ---|--- Follow Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Seth for Massachusetts PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

body:
Hi Peter,
Did you see my last email? I want to make sure you’ve heard about Oregon’s Political Tax Credit and have plans to use it this year! Right now, OLCV is building the resources we need to win big and elect pro-climate and pro-environment candidates in 2026. What we’re able to accomplish in 2026 all depends on you and your support. Will you use your Political Tax Credit today to support the OLCV PAC? This is a tax-deductible gift that is free to you! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]

Dear Peter,
With the current state of our country, imagining a climate safe and just future can feel like a reach. The attacks we’ve seen on our climate and environment in these first few months of Trump’s administration are unprecedented and daunting. But if we stop dreaming, then they have won. body:
|

Friend, A few weeks ago, I asked for your endorsement in one of the most competitive races in the country. Since then, the stakes have only grown: 📌 **California just passed Prop 50, which means thousands of new voters who have never heard of me are being added to CA-45**. As a reminder, I flipped this seat by just 653 votes – so I know how much every vote counts. 📌 **Four GOP challengers are now officially running to flip this seat**. With redistricting now the reality, they’re emboldened by my seat being one of the few places Republicans can go on offense. 📌 **National Republican operatives are zeroing in on CA-45 as their best shot to flip a seat in California under the new map**. We expect millions in outside spending to flood our race. **[This race just became the top target in the battle for the House majority, and we’re going to need every voice to hold the line and expand our voter outreach. name: EMILYs List
subject: Women are at the center of the fight to take back power.
body:
What Tuesday night's wins mean |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118928626/581352466/-1510725204?sourceid=1057318&refcode=WUEFEK24_20251108_EDayRRRS_PL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjJhYjIyMS1kNWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cv4Rpw1cPErNLnwkdEOgaN2OI7KVjR86obBR_qwXQ_A=) Peter, it was a CLEAN SWEEP for EMILYs List women Tuesday night.

That's right — _out of 20 Democratic pro-choice women we endorsed in November's elections, 18 won outright, and two advanced to runoffs_.

**Tuesday night's results prove that Democratic pro-choice women are at the center of the fight to take back power:**
* EMILYs List women secured a Democratic trifecta in Virginia — with **Abigail Spanberger** as governor, **Ghazala Hashmi** as lieutenant governor, and our **TEN House of Delegates candidates** flipping Republican seats.

* **Mikie Sherrill** won a hard-fought race to become New Jersey's next governor, defeat her MAGA Republican opponent, and address the challenges facing her community.

* **Justice Christine Donohue** retained her seat on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court — helping to hold the court's progressive majority for years to come.

* **Amanda Edwards** is advancing to a runoff in the special election for Texas' 18th Congressional District. She's on track to secure a critical blue seat in our fight to take back the U.S. House.

* And in cities across the country, voters elected **Democratic pro-choice women mayors** to lead their cities forward.

These women are powerful models of what it looks like to run and win in tough races, and we're proud to stand by them.

**Our 2025 victories give us a blueprint for our fight to take back power in 2026 and beyond, and we're already knee-deep in recruiting and preparing the women best equipped to battle out those wins. **

[**Right now, we need to know you're with us — not just on Election Day, but every day of this fight. So, please, will you pitch in today to support our mission to elect more Democratic pro-choice women and change the face of power in this country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118928628/581352468/-1510725204?sourceid=1057318&refcode=WUEFEK24_20251108_EDayRRRS_PL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjJhYjIyMS1kNWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cv4Rpw1cPErNLnwkdEOgaN2OI7KVjR86obBR_qwXQ_A=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118928631/581352470/-1403821653?express_lane=true&amount=15&sourceid=1057318&refcode=WUEFEK24_20251108_EDayRRRS_PL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjJhYjIyMS1kNWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cv4Rpw1cPErNLnwkdEOgaN2OI7KVjR86obBR_qwXQ_A=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118928633/581352475/-1403821653?express_lane=true&amount=35&sourceid=1057318&refcode=WUEFEK24_20251108_EDayRRRS_PL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjJhYjIyMS1kNWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cv4Rpw1cPErNLnwkdEOgaN2OI7KVjR86obBR_qwXQ_A=)

clean_body: What Tuesday night's wins mean | = Peter, it was a CLEAN SWEEP for EMILYs List women Tuesday night. That's right — out of 20 Democratic pro-choice women we endorsed in November's elections, 18 won outright, and two advanced to runoffs. Tuesday night's results prove that Democratic pro-choice women are at the center of the fight to take back power: EMILYs List women secured a Democratic trifecta in Virginia — with Abigail Spanberger as governor, Ghazala Hashmi as lieutenant governor, and our TEN House of Delegates candidates flipping Republican seats. Mikie Sherrill won a hard-fought race to become New Jersey's next governor, defeat her MAGA Republican opponent, and address the challenges facing her community. Justice Christine Donohue retained her seat on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court — helping to hold the court's progressive majority for years to come. Amanda Edwards is advancing to a runoff in the special election for Texas' 18th Congressional District. She's on track to secure a critical blue seat in our fight to take back the U.S. House. And in cities across the country, voters elected Democratic pro-choice women mayors to lead their cities forward. These women are powerful models of what it looks like to run and win in tough races, and we're proud to stand by them. Our 2025 victories give us a blueprint for our fight to take back power in 2026 and beyond, and we're already knee-deep in recruiting and preparing the women best equipped to battle out those wins. ** = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: 900,000 people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Under the Republican government, SNAP benefits are being wiped away without a care. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118929017/581353814/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTA3MGMzZi1kNmJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vlquKIECmG6JVjqVYGTCGGr3QWcnCoOF0tfz9VxMZu4=&emci=6819b4c8-f5bb-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=b1070c3f-d6bc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

The Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) is a vital resource for millions of Americans. Right here in Washington State, almost 900,000 people rely on these benefits to help put food on the table. **And under the Republican government, those benefits are being wiped away without a care.**

**FIRST:** Republicans took a hammer to SNAP benefits in their Big, Ugly Bill–pushing for states to receive less money for these benefits and leaving Americans worried about how they will find the resources to feed their families.

**THEN:** Republicans caused a government shutdown that halted spending on almost all government programs. SNAP benefits ran out on November 1, despite Democrats’ calls for Republicans to put the House back in session and find a solution to keep our government open and vital resources like SNAP fully funded.

**NOW:** The courts are directing Republicans to find money to fund SNAP immediately. Donald Trump told them he’d “maybe” pay out half of all SNAP benefits needed this month, and then turned right around and said he might just not pay anything despite being told to.

Peter—Americans rely on SNAP for a number of reasons, each one important and justified. The program is there to ensure no American goes hungry, that no family has to choose between rent or putting food on the table, and that elderly Americans and those with disabilities can live on their own and still lead healthy lives.

**But Republicans are using SNAP as a political pawn, making sure Americans feel as hurt as possible during this government shutdown, for frankly no good reason.**

Democrats are fighting for real solutions, and are calling on Republicans to get back to work in Congress so they can put an end to this shutdown once and for all. But we need Republicans to hear your voice loud and clear, too.

[**Will you sign your name right now to our petition and demand Republicans and Donald Trump stop their recklessness and fully fund our government? clean_body: Under the Republican government, SNAP benefits are being wiped away without a care. Peter, The Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) is a vital resource for millions of Americans. Right here in Washington State, almost 900,000 people rely on these benefits to help put food on the table. And under the Republican government, those benefits are being wiped away without a care. FIRST: Republicans took a hammer to SNAP benefits in their Big, Ugly Bill–pushing for states to receive less money for these benefits and leaving Americans worried about how they will find the resources to feed their families. THEN: Republicans caused a government shutdown that halted spending on almost all government programs. SNAP benefits ran out on November 1, despite Democrats’ calls for Republicans to put the House back in session and find a solution to keep our government open and vital resources like SNAP fully funded. NOW: The courts are directing Republicans to find money to fund SNAP immediately. Donald Trump told them he’d “maybe” pay out half of all SNAP benefits needed this month, and then turned right around and said he might just not pay anything despite being told to. Peter—Americans rely on SNAP for a number of reasons, each one important and justified. The program is there to ensure no American goes hungry, that no family has to choose between rent or putting food on the table, and that elderly Americans and those with disabilities can live on their own and still lead healthy lives. But Republicans are using SNAP as a political pawn, making sure Americans feel as hurt as possible during this government shutdown, for frankly no good reason. Democrats are fighting for real solutions, and are calling on Republicans to get back to work in Congress so they can put an end to this shutdown once and for all. But we need Republicans to hear your voice loud and clear, too. Thank you for taking action, Kim Schrier for Congress Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. The House should be in Session, but Republicans are refusing to come to the table — giving themselves a taxpayer-funded vacation.

clean_body: Every GOP voter should verify their profile ASAP Dear Fellow American, I am reaching out with a critical request. For decades, the radical left has allowed open borders that flooded their states with illegal immigrants. Now, they want to turn them into voters - but not on our watch. This is a long process. We need 100% participation to secure our strategy ahead of 2026. It'll take you less than 3 minutes - but it could save our House Majority. you & God bless. Sincerely, Speaker Mike Johnson| | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Ximena, United We Dream
subject: Tell Your Neighbors about the Defending Our Neighbors Fund!🗣️
body:
Please help spread the word about the Defending Our Neighbors Fund today! | | | Peter, **Across the country, there are more than 6.2 million families at risk of being separated by detention or deportation.** These families are essential to our communities. They care for us and our loved ones, teach our children, and power our cities in immeasurable ways. In a time when our neighbors are being snatched from our communities and denied due process, no one should have to face a punishing immigration system on their own. **This is why the Defending Our Neighbors Fund exists.** Without access to legal support, moms, dads, grandmas, uncles, cousins, and neighbors needlessly sit in immigration detention, missing out on priceless family moments. **Together with the ACLU and partners, we launched the Defending Our Neighbors Fund to rush resources to frontline organizations providing legal support to our immigrant communities.** Peter, this is about neighbors helping neighbors, making sure our communities and families remain together. **You have the power to take action today — let your friends know about the Defending Our Neighbors Fund and invite them to make a donation:** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg47GlQFFDrOP-NyNnajbZaRYPkYzkFHBLyJ0bfJtWX5-kFk_gzC_VlzdexsuuA9tSBtd9-9cxFroOnQdPBDTE7LAVjUzq_0F54SzhNyh4hY03D6H8iQaEpe4OjB7pq4MAHlXpEdPe3PDP19OGi0oghvnp2KksEAkM5-p953GN_QG1P8O9hTAX-34Btp9_G0xQtTWCwbT_zDMup6k5bbAOcgFxaKifCFuNqB0qwT4mzEovx5BxN4opNZzdX5eiIHSmdaKIrOsH00Fpi9EDiswUxPbUYQ-zpFlS-3mUW74rVH5rIBY73vrnD_0GRszhjVgzxQjQxLbAd6xXs5BVchL_aTXmSI3vzF2KXzi0KWdEJookg/4lf/DP4CE-X_Sdi_VGTQpkPleQ/h0/h001.tSxFVBNqlqDy1j8fy3VwQ1bi1fRfmQQ4h2NZA9dzU2E)

clean_body: Please help spread the word about the Defending Our Neighbors Fund today! | | | Peter, Across the country, there are more than 6.2 million families at risk of being separated by detention or deportation. These families are essential to our communities. They care for us and our loved ones, teach our children, and power our cities in immeasurable ways. In a time when our neighbors are being snatched from our communities and denied due process, no one should have to face a punishing immigration system on their own. This is why the Defending Our Neighbors Fund exists. Without access to legal support, moms, dads, grandmas, uncles, cousins, and neighbors needlessly sit in immigration detention, missing out on priceless family moments. Together with the ACLU and partners, we launched the Defending Our Neighbors Fund to rush resources to frontline organizations providing legal support to our immigrant communities. Peter, this is about neighbors helping neighbors, making sure our communities and families remain together. You have the power to take action today — let your friends know about the Defending Our Neighbors Fund and invite them to make a donation: Our Fund has already reached $10 million, with $160,000 raised within the first 24 hours of launching! That’s thousands of people who have stepped up to show their immigrant neighbors that they’re not alone. But there’s still so much more to do. Together, we’ll ensure more immigrant families have access to the legal support they need. Invite your friends and family to make a small donation to the Defending Our Neighbors Fund today — In unity, Ximena and the rest of the United We Dream Team | Follow us on: | | | | |

This is not leadership. It’s chaos (and cognitive decline) in 280 characters. And the worst part? The MAGA cowards in Congress are allowing him to put us all in danger. They’re too afraid to stand up, too desperate to keep their committee seats, too weak to say the obvious: Trump is unfit and dangerous. **At Cedar Key Progress, we’re done waiting for courage that will never come. We’re working year-round to DEFEAT MAGA minions, IMPEACH Donald Trump, and restore our democracy.** Because when nuclear testing, war crimes, and gibberish tweets are treated like normal politics, our nation is already in danger. name: John Fetterman
subject: This is about public safety (RFK Jr.)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1001&akid=10418%2E434096%2EGf43bG ]John Fetterman

Derek, we've gotta talk about RFK Jr.

The guy's turned HHS into a disaster. Since taking over, he's:

!!️ Canned the CDC director, throwing the agency into chaos
🤡 Stacked the country’s vaccine advisory panel with anti-vax goons
🧬 Fired thousands of career public health experts
🚫 Canceled vaccine campaigns during measles outbreaks
💊 Pushed bogus supplements over proven medicine
🧪 Spread junk science about Tylenol and autism
🚨 Slashed funding for cancer, HIV, and addiction research
⚠️ Demanded the FDA attack safe abortion medication

The list goes on.

SIX former U.S. surgeons general, from Republican and Democrat administrations alike, joined forces to warn that RFK Jr. is putting Americans’ health at risk.

And over ONE THOUSAND HHS employees have called on him to resign.

This isn't politics – it's public safety. RFK Jr. is wrecking decades of progress and gambling with American lives.

We need to know where you stand in the midst of all of this – and we need at least 5,000 responses for statistical significance before our poll closes at midnight. Can you take one second to respond right now?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52310?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1002&akid=10418%2E434096%2EGf43bG

Do you approve of RFK Jr.?

YES // NO

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52310?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1003&akid=10418%2E434096%2EGf43bG

Thanks for sharing your thoughts, Derek.

Team Fetterman 💛

# _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5be90871-ee58-4ebd-8926-ea5bedb5ebf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Support bold, independent journalism by becoming a PolitiBrawl member today:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7kovoCKK0YxPks-Wdo6Rj3CRvOp6Fvt6xmPyli4eNE4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=178367591)
* * *
**Much like the entirety of this year,** social media timelines were flooded with "horrifying" videos of Border Patrol and U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents arresting illegal aliens, with liberal users often not providing the full facts of what was actually happening with the arrests.
The first case that caused high levels of outrage was that of a Colombian illegal immigrant who was caught and released at the southern border by the Biden administration in 2023. Videos started circulating of federal agents **[rushing into a daycare and arresting the woman,](https://substack.com/redirect/051653db-9914-4bac-bc56-944116049d93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who was trying to resist apprehension.
The liberal narrative was that agents just haphazardly and cruelly raided the daycare to scare the children and immigrants. What the videos don't show is that the woman ran into the building after agents attempted to initiate a traffic stop.
According to the Department of Homeland Security, agents ran the license plates of the car the woman was in and it came back that she was not in the U.S. legally. The male driver refused to pull over and continued to drive to the daycare.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Together with Health Sciences Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/c25afbd2-b0fa-4334-9f18-05264a95e300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

---|---|---
Dear Reader,
RFK Jr just took dead aim on Big Pharma... and he is **NOT** messing around.
In a prime-time press conference he took them to task on everything from Tylenol and autism to COVID vaccines...
And Big Pharma is _**HORRIFIED**_.
For the first time in decades, they're face-to-face with a politician their money _**CAN NOT**_ control. And that means their # 1 fear may be about to come true.
RFK Jr is now poised to EXPOSE **[Big Pharma's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/c25afbd2-b0fa-4334-9f18-05264a95e300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. It's a secret that could cost them hundreds-of-billions in profit and dark money political donations...
Which is why they'll do everything in their power to stop you from hearing **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/c25afbd2-b0fa-4334-9f18-05264a95e300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
And they may just succeed...
So we're not taking any chances, we're revealing everything TODAY in **[this short video](https://substack.com/redirect/c25afbd2-b0fa-4334-9f18-05264a95e300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
**[Watch it here now](https://substack.com/redirect/c25afbd2-b0fa-4334-9f18-05264a95e300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available.
P.S. It's not every day the US Secretary of Health and Human Services calls out one of Big Pharma's biggest cash cows. But that's exactly what RFK Jr just did. And they're terrified he's going to go one step further by revealing **[Big Pharma's Biggest Secret yet](https://substack.com/redirect/c25afbd2-b0fa-4334-9f18-05264a95e300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
* * *
_**(Piece continues below)**_
"They ran into a daycare and attempted to barricade themselves inside the daycare -- recklessly endangering the children inside. The illegal alien female was arrested inside a vestibule, not in the school. Upon arrest, she lied about her identity," DHS said.
"The vehicle is registered in her name, though she claims that she didn't know the man who was driving her car and just picked him up from a bus stop," DHS added.
Liberal and activist media **[still claimed](https://substack.com/redirect/38f8f0d7-e8d5-4a1b-af7b-a4350f632eec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the arrest was unjust because the female had "citizenship documents," when in actuality, she only had a work permit. Work permits do not grant legal status and are only to enable people the ability to work while their case makes its way through the immigration courts.
Chicago Alderman Andre Vasquez (D) said drastic action needs to take place before the 2026 midterms to stop federal agents.
"We're all crossing our fingers and hoping for elections to change things, but we don't have that time right now ... If you're anybody here in the city of Chicago and you don't have a whistle around your neck and you're not out here doing school patrol, please find time to do so. We need everyone here," he said.
On Friday, another video appeared to show agents attacking a man while he was having a "seizure" with a child in his arms. Bystanders screamed at the agents.
Once again, DHS **[provided](https://substack.com/redirect/53dca1c5-2beb-49bc-8b50-1c9d2b3ccf4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** some needed context. The incident took place while agents were arresting Juliana Milena Ojeda-Montoya, who the agency says is among "WORST OF THE WORST":
"In August 2025, local police arrested Ojeda-Montoya, a criminal illegal alien from Ecuador, for assault and battery with a dangerous weapon after she STABBED her co-worker twice with a pair of scissors and then threw a trash barrel at her.
Ojeda-Montoya was RELEASED into the country by the Biden administration in 2023.
"During ICE's targeted vehicle stop of Ojeda-Montoya, her child and husband were in the car. The target threw the child into the arms of her husband while he purported to have a medical episode, though refused medical help and displayed absolutely no signs of medical concerns just moments later."
It is not surprising the entire Left is emboldened to spread fake news about DHS operations. It gives them a reason to be a foot soldier against the Trump administration's top priority. The sting of defeat after the 2024 election and they need a purpose. Assaults against federal agents during immigration enforcement operations are up 1,000%.
On Monday, an ICE officer was viciously attacked by an illegal alien with a metal coffee cup, causing a laceration to the officer's lip. The officer needed 13 stitches and had burns to the side of his face.
Who was the alleged attacker? Walter Leonel Perez Rodriguez, from El Salvador. Rodriguez's criminal history includes a conviction for sexual assault of a child under 17 -years-old, multiple DUIs, child fondling, and illegally re-entering the United States, **[according to DHS.](https://substack.com/redirect/7cec7d26-8825-4d7e-a3ba-06892a6a3f10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
This is who liberals are literally fighting to protect, by and large. They don't know who agents are going after, but they don't care. They are in this fight and it could escalate the more their violent actions are left unchecked.

Thousands of new voters will soon be added to CA-27, and the GOP is already signaling plans to compete aggressively here. They know they have to flip competitive seats like ours to keep their MAGA majority. This seat remains one of the most closely watched in the country, and control of the House could once again come down to districts just like ours. I’m proud of what we’ve built together, but this next chapter will take even more organizing, outreach, and resources to make sure every new voter hears our message. I’m ready for that work, but I can’t do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Add your name: Demand transparency on Trump’s $250 million White House ballroom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
While Americans suffer, Trump’s building a ballroom
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118930217/581358337/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDVhOGFjNS1kZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CCqbwmLPrhUE5KAzVHTSDf6Zgcbjo_gvvX5LLNaQQuo=)
Hi folks, it’s Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia, the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee.
Last week, my colleagues and I demanded answers from Donald Trump about one of the most outrageous scandals of this government shutdown:
Trump is building a $250 million ballroom at the White House while millions of Americans go without paychecks and food assistance.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118930218/581358338/1535239651?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDVhOGFjNS1kZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CCqbwmLPrhUE5KAzVHTSDf6Zgcbjo_gvvX5LLNaQQuo=&emci=1c3e6865-2cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=f05a8ac5-ddbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=16877361)
_Yes, you read that right._
While federal employees are furloughed, families are struggling to buy groceries, and health care programs are on hold, the president is using this shutdown to quietly demolish parts of the East Wing and begin construction on a luxury ballroom — funded by billionaire donors at a private dinner inside the White House.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118930220/581358339/1535239651?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDVhOGFjNS1kZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CCqbwmLPrhUE5KAzVHTSDf6Zgcbjo_gvvX5LLNaQQuo=&emci=1c3e6865-2cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=f05a8ac5-ddbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=16877361)
This isn't just unethical, it's un-American.
It’s a betrayal of the public trust and a direct insult to every family being hurt by this shutdown.
**That’s why we’re demanding full transparency: we’ve requested all documents, communications, and donor records tied to this project. But we need the public’s voice behind us to make sure the truth comes out.**
**[I’m asking you personally — will you add your name to our petition demanding transparency and accountability from Donald Trump and his administration?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118930222/581358342/1535239651?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDVhOGFjNS1kZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CCqbwmLPrhUE5KAzVHTSDf6Zgcbjo_gvvX5LLNaQQuo=&emci=1c3e6865-2cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=f05a8ac5-ddbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=16877361)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118930224/581358344/1535239651?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDVhOGFjNS1kZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CCqbwmLPrhUE5KAzVHTSDf6Zgcbjo_gvvX5LLNaQQuo=&emci=1c3e6865-2cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=f05a8ac5-ddbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=16877361)
The White House belongs to the people — not billionaires funding secret vanity projects. The American people deserve answers about what’s happening behind closed doors, especially during a shutdown that’s hurting millions.
_Let’s send a clear message: no more secrecy, no more corruption, no more self-dealing while the country suffers._
**[Add your name now and join us in demanding the truth.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118930225/581358346/169640552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDVhOGFjNS1kZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CCqbwmLPrhUE5KAzVHTSDf6Zgcbjo_gvvX5LLNaQQuo=&emci=1c3e6865-2cbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=f05a8ac5-ddbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=16877361)**
Thank you,
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118930227/581358347/789508428?REFCODE=250914_RG_standwithdems-PET-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDVhOGFjNS1kZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CCqbwmLPrhUE5KAzVHTSDf6Zgcbjo_gvvX5LLNaQQuo=)

[contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118930228/581358348/-309737922?REFCODE=251108_RG_ballrom-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDVhOGFjNS1kZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CCqbwmLPrhUE5KAzVHTSDf6Zgcbjo_gvvX5LLNaQQuo=)

subject: We need to save health care funding
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=TQCZXrLaWq%2BUDU51FB1JFHgInOcqO80UixxyrYlGw9LDbB2PcF%2FrNuOQnLeAqSQrk%2FfWZ%2Be6oECLm4O4UXma6exObqWNGAW%2FYot2%2B%2FrTocVSLNpiYl6gt0wX7USzNE4StBMcvCDvybg8Iw3wlU7mVJt9mW7JCNH88XaJB0hletJAlUJJew%2B2O43CTqbp6zerSVA7VY%2FuPBWpzCcpLDArXTiu%2Fmmw5YBfqTCmLRWBZ0wZW8Y8SKW19yz1EZY87qKS2%2FYQzte8wghneMFutlguKfhWm1qjr4MXgYSbpfUQvSAD50S0HxWCRki%2Fe2290UEsE8fKz9of%2BjlwmyC045LfpG1P1nWvCo1ARFCgv1UL6SIKnBgwXA3RhMvgg%2FPlikQbJiOzpCnc9JnU0zqvxhCgiliQk%2Bqb8BTLQSDnLq%2Fp6GH6LNyNu4Ch%2B73DprFWnqRX)

---
Hi Peter,

Every week that Republicans in Congress delay, more people are facing higher insurance premiums, hospitals scrambling to budget, and patients wondering what they’ll do when their coverage costs double.

We can’t afford to “deal with it later.”

**In Rhode Island, insurers have already announced huge rate hikes for next year, right as families prepare for open enrollment. That’s when people make hard choices about coverage, and when care providers set their budgets for the year ahead.**

This is urgent.

And yet, Republicans in Congress have chosen to stay on recess, letting the government shut down instead of protecting access to affordable care.

Millions of Americans are counting on Congress to act, not argue. We can fund the government and protect health care at the same time.

I’m fighting to do both. But I need your help to keep the pressure on and make sure Congress puts people over politics.

**_[Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us keep fighting for affordable health care and common sense in Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118930679/581359959/-1851914409?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20251108_FR_Healthcare_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_cantnegotiate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTFiZGQzMy1kZmJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L9-QpkCpMG6UfyfCdeH82TovXiHc2l3g3FmvBJrBVTs=)_**

Thank you,

Seth

Austin Davis **As a public servant for over a decade, I’ve traveled all over the Commonwealth talking to Pennsylvanians about what they need from their government.** It’s clear that no matter if you’re in Philadelphia or Erie, we all need economic opportunities for ourselves and our kids. That’s why I have worked so hard to create more jobs, safer communities, and more opportunities to advance in your career. [**If that’s all you need to hear, can you chip in $10 to help make sure my team and I can keep up the fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118930830/581360456/-92396084?amount=10&source=AD_EM_110825_B1_Support&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzQ0NzkyNy1lMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SbHN2KxanaZHyHf9HKzpiYjbGOue0zqlUWFaGuMUliE=) | | **[CHIP IN $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118930831/581360457/950170653?amount=10&source=AD_EM_110825_B1_Support&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzQ0NzkyNy1lMWJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SbHN2KxanaZHyHf9HKzpiYjbGOue0zqlUWFaGuMUliE=)**

It's increasingly clear that we can't trust those in Trump's administration to do what's best for the people of the Commonwealth. **Trump rewards those loyal to his regime, and those "leaders" are never the ones looking out for us.** That’s why my administration has worked tirelessly to improve the lives of everyday Pennsylvanians.
A few examples of what the Shapiro-Davis administration has accomplished:
* Nearly $26 billion in private-sector investment and created more than 12,000 new jobs since we took office — and we’re continuing to make strategic investments that will keep our state growing.
* A proposed $292 million in new SEPTA funding next year to support 52 transit systems that serve nearly one million riders each day across rural, urban, and suburban communities. These investments would help create jobs, connect communities, and ensure Pennsylvanians can commute to work, go to school, access health care, and travel safely and reliably.
* Investments in 81 community projects throughout the state to help revitalize downtown areas, help businesses grow, and improve community infrastructure.

[**I intend to keep fighting and working for our neighbors, but I can’t do this without your support. Hi there, **Andy Biggs has shown Arizona exactly who he is.** By now, you’ve probably heard that the GOP gubernatorial candidate called Democrats "political terrorists, just like they are domestic terrorists." And you’re probably aware that he's been missing from work for nearly a month after voting to slash healthcare. And there’s his lying on TV about ACA subsidies, claiming people making $600,000 get free healthcare — which fact-checkers immediately debunked. **But now, he’s decided to come out and back Trump's $300 million White House ballroom vanity project** , at the same time as over 40 million Americans risk going hungry during the shutdown because of lost SNAP benefits. Andy Bigg’s extreme rhetoric and his tone-deaf positions are pushing Arizona's gubernatorial race further to the right, with him, Karrin Taylor Robson, and David Schweikert all competing to see who can be most loyal to Trump. This is the man who wants to be Arizona's governor. Someone who calls half the state "domestic terrorists," lies about healthcare on live TV, and refuses to show up to work. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. name: Tobias Read
subject: Add your name: Call on Christy McCormick to resign
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251108-mccormick-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251108-mccormick-pet-rs]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I don’t say this lightly — what we’re witnessing is a betrayal of the public trust.
This week, Christy McCormick, a sitting federal election official, went on stage at a Trump-aligned event and claimed that Democrats “need the votes of illegal citizens” to win elections:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251108-mccormick-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251108-mccormick-pet-rs]
That is a dangerous lie — one that undermines faith in our democracy and fans the flames of paranoia.
These are not the words of a nonpartisan public servant. They’re the words of a conspiracy theorist with a federal platform. And every day she remains in office, she damages public confidence in the elections that hold this country together.
That’s why I’m calling on Americans everywhere — Democrats, Republicans, and independents alike — to join me in demanding accountability.
Add your name to the petition calling for Commissioner McCormick’s resignation immediately: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CL-OwXrTU0m-UjKeLBwZXg2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CL-OwXrTU0m-UjKeLBwZXg2]
Simply put: It’s un-American to spread lies that sow fear and paranoia in the heart of our democracy.
Our founders built this nation on free and fair elections. Every generation since has been asked to defend democracy in its own way. For us, that means standing up to the lies that corrode trust in free and fair elections.
If we stay silent now, this kind of rot spreads — from the edges of the fever swamp straight into the heart of our government.
Commissioner McCormick’s false claims dishonor our democracy. She betrayed the trust of the people she was meant to serve. She must resign or be removed immediately. Let’s make our voices heard. Let’s prove that Americans still stand for truth, decency, and democracy.
Right now, add your name to demand Christy McCormick’s resignation: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/CL-OwXrTU0m-UjKeLBwZXg2]
Thank you for standing up for democracy.
Tobias Read
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251108-mccormick-pet-rs]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=vzjZLqyVh7n4IdMmvy1RXqE1vzGlW9Olk6FNEMqaUkKQ2m7%2BHgdaZI%2FdVjZgd7UDwQqFICNS9pS91Fh96yyw566%2B41b3kAsu%2B1N4AxKqGW8r9ZzZjhQia78rqDILNC44YctLCMKrGQvE8fZONYMmEJ3gigdxngdW4xnwuyEq19ssNRydDXb2pHdHDwD%2BLUiFU9Ngt1wO69AhrfJ4nhunRTs3ey%2BRsPQLnLovJu%2FTRBqnTay%2Bj6Le%2FGOC%2F%2Fl4PBzV8lQG%2FOn%2BDoNij9%2FeabYzrbUpvRWtmuvwuuGwaHPG1zD0KtFJvMg3%2Bc6zf%2BuL63pZNRQpAgSgQV5xQygF7V%2F3jbOrA6TbJ491lBVYqphE0mr%2FPZyk6YZPQvD%2BR83BSTHKcc16Kt0tC15Gy51QO092rpPwu0tzMqJDdPmnJUOyXvpal7YNPwwStph7kg1j2x02 .

They’d rather keep wasting your money on their radical agendas. It’s going to be hard, but in order to make this plan a reality, I’m going to need your help TODAY, not tomorrow. Tomorrow will be too late. All I’m asking is for you to respond to me, IMMEDIATELY: Thank you, Donald J. Trump | | | | | | | Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate authorized’s committee. . | | P.O. BOX 13570 ARLINGTON, VA 22219 Click here to change your subscription status.

name: Letitia James
subject: A dangerous precedent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
That’s not democracy. That’s authoritarianism.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T055df034-997a-45b0-84a0-c18386945c78/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, I want to be direct with you about Trump’s blatant abuse of our justice system that has just happened. [But if you don’t need to read any further because you’re already fed up and have seen and heard enough of his political revenge tour, rush a rapid-response donation right now to help me stand firm against the sham indictment that’s been filed against me. >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9cb7b76a-2e7b-4e9b-9ddb-dd818b034b53/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [RUSH A RAPID RESPONSE DONATION NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T018c4c51-5bf3-4824-b5b0-03aeffdc35de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| So here’s what happened: Donald Trump fired the U.S. attorney who refused to bring baseless charges against me and then replaced them with someone who is blindly loyal to him – not the rule of law. But, Peter, this is not just about me. It’s about the dangerous precedent being set for our justice system – where any president can install their own prosecutor to punish their political rivals. That’s not democracy. That’s authoritarianism. The truth is simple: My office is doing its job. We’ve followed the facts, the evidence, and the law – and judges have upheld our case that not only has Donald Trump and his company committed fraud, but many of his administration’s heinous executive orders have been unconstitutional. So now, instead of facing accountability, he’s trying to rewrite the rules and discredit me for holding him accountable. But I refuse to back down. This is a historic moment in our nation’s history – not just for me, but for the rule of law in America and defending our justice system. And that’s why I need your voice and your support today. [Will you chip in $10, $20, or whatever you can to my campaign and Blue Amp Action before midnight to stand with me against this dangerous abuse of our justice system?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te803cc04-704f-42fd-8616-2dc56173d531/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25bbcefb-627d-491f-bb80-173e197547cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team Calvarese
subject: Americans are going hungry tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Tonight more than 42 million Americans who rely on SNAP benefits are having to come to terms with a new reality because the help they rely on to feed and sustain their families is gone.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GdD1eTKw72iXqnQIeWrH6lr8pyYfBrIu9BSDx7ARsnR7DGbfDBOq_kef4esjdj2MT9jdh8q8V7Ac1w5AHKMrPuDPQ2jyEpSSOQMWSKtB3ikj21xjnhEpglBuTLOJ6PQdleZnws-5CSXsz7Z86-hsp2QBEpWCEvVcrxQPdFQeJydTnc3KFQg4DiWw-6NzeMGqSSMjfcRE-PB4qIWtUWKUehsJjzvIIvF6&c=nx64c9-50sLlb-LkI_20pNT6jyCkgp44-0B8Dmm0btqzeJY5kxG6rA==&ch=ct53ZEc5Xi1gy2sCjS7yUksi_0t9zqpcS3oeDzTE9lPNmqihWMU6TA==)
---
|

Peter,
Trump's government shutdown entered its 39th day today and the systems that make our society function continue to deteriorate.
Tonight more than 42 million Americans who rely on SNAP benefits are having to come to terms with a new reality because the assistance they rely on to feed and sustain their families is gone.
The suffering that is already taking place is unbearable.
Today, our campaign set up a foodbank in front of the King Soopers in Highlands Ranch, one of the largest cities in ours and Lauren Boebert's district, to do our small part to alleviate the strain of this disaster for local families.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GdD1eTKw72iXqnQIeWrH6lr8pyYfBrIu9BSDx7ARsnR7DGbfDBOq_kef4esjdj2MT9jdh8q8V7Ac1w5AHKMrPuDPQ2jyEpSSOQMWSKtB3ikj21xjnhEpglBuTLOJ6PQdleZnws-5CSXsz7Z86-hsp2QBEpWCEvVcrxQPdFQeJydTnc3KFQg4DiWw-6NzeMGqSSMjfcRE-PD-s-uPFiyq2H8eHpxmN0r1&c=nx64c9-50sLlb-LkI_20pNT6jyCkgp44-0B8Dmm0btqzeJY5kxG6rA==&ch=ct53ZEc5Xi1gy2sCjS7yUksi_0t9zqpcS3oeDzTE9lPNmqihWMU6TA==)
---

This catastrophe did not happen in a vacuum. It was deliberate. And there are people to blame for this complete breakdown in empathy for fellow Americans.
Lauren Boebert is one of them. She has voted to gut Medicaid by over $800 billion, slash SNAP for hungry kids and families, and gut low-income housing programs.
This past Tuesday's blue wave was an overwhelming indictment of this cold callousness. If we can replicate Tuesday's results in 2026 we can unseat Boebert.
It is doable. She is in Congress because of just 546 votes and when her and Trisha went head to head in 2024 Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district. Trisha's platform of economic populism is a rejection of everything that Boebert stands for.
By this time next year Lauren Boebert could be at the end of her final term but only if we can count on the support of people like you. [Please, can you make a donation of $50, $25, or even $5, to help us beat Boebert and replace her with Democrat Trisha Calvarese, who has empathy and will fight for all Coloradans. ](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GdD1eTKw72iXqnQIeWrH6lr8pyYfBrIu9BSDx7ARsnR7DGbfDBOq_kef4esjdj2MT9jdh8q8V7Ac1w5AHKMrPuDPQ2jyEpSSOQMWSKtB3ikj21xjnhEpglBuTLOJ6PQdleZnws-5CSXsz7Z86-hsp2QBEpWCEvVcrxQPdFQeJydTnc3KFQg4DiWw-6NzeMGqSSMjfcRE-PDBM0vHC93Dyi-mDqIfIhK6&c=nx64c9-50sLlb-LkI_20pNT6jyCkgp44-0B8Dmm0btqzeJY5kxG6rA==&ch=ct53ZEc5Xi1gy2sCjS7yUksi_0t9zqpcS3oeDzTE9lPNmqihWMU6TA==)
---

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: A giant, flashing neon warning sign for Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
We have to fix this before the midterms...
| Fellow Patriot,
---
If this year’s special election results were red flags, then Tuesday’s election results were a giant, flashing neon warning sign for Republicans...
---
**_...we’re not turning out our voters when President Trump isn’t on the ballot._**
---
**I've vowed to always be honest with you, so I’m not going to mince words:_If we see the same kind of margins we did on Tuesday in the midterms, our House majority is as good as gone._**
---
Approval ratings, poll numbers, and fundraising all mean _NOTHING_ if Republican voters don’t show up to vote when it matters most!
---
In the midterms, we need to turn out and vote like President Trump is on the ballot – _because for all intents and purposes,**he is**._
---
The Democrats have all but promised to IMPEACH President Trump.
---
**As House GOP Leadership Chair, I’m leading the GOP’s project to verify EVERY Republican voter we have on file and get their commitment to vote in the midterms.**
---
That project just got even more urgent following Tuesday’s results!
---
_Fellow Patriot, can I check off your name as one of the voters that President Trump and the GOP can count on to show up and vote for us in the midterms no matter what?_
---
[**Please complete your updated voter verification following the 2025 elections to show that YOU are among the GOP’s most active voters.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e526af2a7880477e9a40843626d9f5cd&_e=upDRUaLEs9g3mXL5u6FrvwoRFiMBogLVPLPX-cU3p9ml01imPtxqpxRw5VHZgRsp1UNr5u0ad8oh7MfVu6-R1KI42fEKoUtTdqnoMnCHIOP_TEHSwKSAsmjtXW4-II9oWlfICs4Y7FXjGvM30d8PjsJ2LgLaah_LkbCtdTMAjyYEbXpGDHrw-0fRD9pqDYCJtY4ZeLQEQoa3kmqLNfw8XoO6W94sRWQBAFYX2qa1xQKwxuhEZVP1rMw0VKgt7Y_AVBBo7zZVF6_NTobes4Ci4CI6lOO0UdGgrpPDCRlINLV-2MWEqcqbuOJAZUGLm9mfEoO4IPRFkyvveeCxNCXvVenxfyeVvslCMEVqNqI4R-7dXWHdZyocVQCbTBnGkd6JI8cbe8i7nA_IXuDPTht4_J1b5whvr6Mkd-q_I27hZF4YqclwGkYg4U-OONvIoV4T7PYu0QIK7uwadu3VIAxD8twaAiAZ17cK7PWHO8cLVIlQn-IhxPotc7_fxeSoDkVPb2DyySZU8cBS9gYcfCTPjdFKvADHSao2-UW2GwblXUPtcm8KhKvw7fFgKk4r1NqwgHT42D-jViH5ihtXv8m_Jzb88yLbv5pZCFrZeXx8wGY6GzfFGQAltwqIZ_yH9kWc)

body:
When it comes down to it, we will elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor through voter contact.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40387%2E3422442%2EwrubXh)
Peter, are you ever curious what donating $5 to a campaign actually helps accomplish?
This is what a campaign can get with just $5:
* 250 digital ad impressions
* 8 pieces of mail
* 10 doors knocked (you can increase this number by volunteering!)

When it comes down to it, we will elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor through voter contact—communicating with people and explaining why they should support her.
For $5 you can help us reach voters through digital ads, mail, or door knocks! For a campaign that rejects contributions from corporations, every single $5 donation really adds up to make a difference.
So what do you say, Peter?
**[Will you chip in $5 to help our campaign reach the voters needed to win?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251108_1_ak.-OXuw0&refcode=em20251108-40387&amount=5&t=3&akid=40387%2E3422442%2EwrubXh)**
[Donate $5](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251108_1_ak.-OXuw0&refcode=em20251108-40387&amount=5&t=4&akid=40387%2E3422442%2EwrubXh)
Thanks for considering,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251108-40387&amounts=&t=5&refcode2=40387_3422442_wrubXh&akid=40387%2E3422442%2EwrubXh)**
