name: Kevin Kijewski for Michigan Attorney General
subject: 🇺🇸 Kevin Kijewski for Attorney General - November Update 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kijewski for Michigan, 115 W Allegan St, Ste 900, Lansing, MI 48933_
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinformi/kevin-kijewski-for-attorney-general-november-update-4740958?e=4b10910eed)
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=0f54e1ff49&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=7deab438ba&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | |
# November Update from Kevin
---
| | Dear Friend and Patriot,
I hope this message finds you well! We have been very busy this past week with some big developments on our pathway to reclaim Michigan as your next Michigan Attorney General in 2026.
On the writing front, I had an important [op-ed published in ](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=3c36406445&e=4b10910eed)[The](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=8dd6e27f26&e=4b10910eed)[ Detroit News about h](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=b6b63d5b9b&e=4b10910eed)ow Lansing’s assault on local energy decisions it’s just about power - it’s unconstitutional. It’s a threat to our communities, economy, and autonomy. In my article, I lay out the risks and my plan as Michigan’s AG to stop it: defend local control, challenge mandates, and protect choices. [Click here to read the article](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=a87ab03dd6&e=4b10910eed).
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=63517cc49a&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | | | | | | | |

**Endorsement news:**
I’m pleased to announce that the following patriots have endorsed our campaign for AG, recognizing our commitment to protecting Michigan families and restoring integrity to Lansing. They have joined our coalition, lending their voice to our mission of making Michigan great again for all residents, not just some. These endorsements from key GOP party officials matter. They reflect that more people across the state see the urgency of this race and want real leadership.
* Tyler Campbell, Macomb County GOP
* Russ Jennings, Jackson County GOP
* Luke Demming, Huron County GOP
* Jill Schmidt, MIGOP State Committeewoman (8th Congressional District)

---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=b87c748ede&e=4b10910eed)
| |
On the media front, [it was great to join the Justin Barclay Show](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=35dcadb9f2&e=4b10910eed) this past Thursday. We discussed pressing issues facing Michigan and how to turn things around under strong Republican leadership. We started with alarming terrorism threats in our backyard, like the recent ISIS terror plot busted in suburban Detroit - radicals plotting violence with knives, guns, and IEDs, a direct result of weak Democrat policies. We also discussed defeating Dana Nessel's lawfare and my recent op-eds in the Detroit News! [Click ](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=8658630108&e=4b10910eed)[on](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=33b63d7fad&e=4b10910eed)[ the image below to watch the video.](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=9e5a8f0aed&e=4b10910eed)
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=71fe5e8640&e=4b10910eed)
| |
I also had a great time [appearing on Trucker Randy's radio show](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=54ab3c0ed6&e=4b10910eed) this week to discuss Michigan's Public Act 233 - it allows the Michigan Public Service Commission to override local zoning to impose massive energy projects on unwilling communities, endanger farmland, destroy property values, and diminish rural life. Michiganders across the state are pushing back not just because it's wrong, but because it's also unconstitutional. [Click on the image below to listen to Kevin’s interview with Trucker Randy](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=75de35b607&e=4b10910eed).
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=17ebcd2627&e=4b10910eed)
| | Also this week, I was happy to [attend the second Michigan gubernatorial debate in Macomb County](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=76fae3ab49&e=4b10910eed), where I shared our campaign’s plan to restore genuine justice as Michigan’s next Attorney General. Teaming up with our future Republican governor, we’ll liberate Michigan from the radical Democrat hold that’s turned our state into a hotspot for corruption, political witch hunts, and rising crime. [Click the image below to hear the remarks I delivered right before the debate](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=a6d0c181a1&e=4b10910eed).
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=a807500774&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=40b7138bf6&e=4b10910eed)
| |
I also [visited with Chairman Todd Gillman and his dedicated patriots in Monroe County](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=dff67b8e86&e=4b10910eed) tonight, focusing on revitalizing our state's future! We discussed our plans to restore safety, protect constitutional freedoms, and ensure fair elections for every Michigander. [The enthusiasm and energy was electric about making Michigan red again - check it out for yourself! ](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=a42b901abb&e=4b10910eed)
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=1ee0e8cb2b&e=4b10910eed)
| |
Lastly, [I had an incredible time today connecting with fellow Republicans at the Oakland County GOP's Meet the Candidates event this morning](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=9d74806fef&e=4b10910eed). I shared my vision for restoring public safety, defending constitutional rights, and ensuring election integrity as Michigan's next Attorney General. Moderated by WWJ950’s Jackie Paige, we discussed pushing back against Democrat overreach, ending lawfare, protecting communities from threats like terrorism and foreign espionage, and putting Michigan first. Tonight, I’ll be attending and speaking at the Lapeer County GOP Pasta Dinner Fundraiser.
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=074e49db26&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=c027f003cf&e=4b10910eed)
| [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=9f1bd8d883&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=7b5d1d04d6&e=4b10910eed)
| | I’m looking forward to meeting with additional Republican groups in November and December from across the state.
I’m committed to keeping you informed and welcome your feedback. As Michigan's next Attorney General, I’ll fight to uphold the rule of law, prosecute dangerous criminals, protect our Second Amendment rights, stop political prosecutions, and defend the hardworking people of this state from government overreach. [To win against the radical left's agenda, please contribute today and join the movement to take Michigan back!](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=122c4c69fd&e=4b10910eed)
Very truly yours,Kevin Kijewski
Candidate for Michigan Attorney General
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=827928ddaa&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | [](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=0dc05584e6&e=4b10910eed)
---
[Follow Kevin on X (formerly Twitter)](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=4bc1fe3eb6&e=4b10910eed "Follow Kevin on X \(formerly Twitter\)")
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=06c613823c&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=0d95a0d026&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=21b01e3e95&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | | | | | _Paid for by Kevin Kijewski for Michigan, 115 W Allegan St, Ste 900, Lansing, MI 48933_
Want to change how you receive these emails?You can [update your preferences](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/profile?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=be3f835d77&e=4b10910eed&c=d2f9123938) or [unsubscribe](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=be3f835d77&t=b&e=4b10910eed&c=d2f9123938)
---

name: Congressman Al Green, TX-09
subject: I'm in
body:
https://www.chron.com/politics/article/green-hints-at-run-for-tx-18-21145707.php [https://www.chron.com/politics/article/green-hints-at-run-for-tx-18-21145707.php]
Friend,
Today, I officially filed the paperwork to run for Congress in the 18th Congressional District.
I want to be perfectly clear about what is happening: I am not moving. The district was moved on me.
In a corrupt, racist power grab, Donald Trump and Greg Abbott gerrymandered my 9th District to try to silence my voice. They thought they could erase our community.
They failed.
Their new, illegal map has placed my home of more than 25 years—and 75% of the constituents I represent right now—directly into the new 18th Congressional District.
They didn't stop our movement; they just gave us a new district number.
This campaign starts today. We must send an immediate, powerful message that we are funded, we are organized, and we are ready to win this primary and continue our fight against the authoritarians who fear our voice.
Our Day 1 starts now .
I am asking you to be a Day 1 Founding Donor to our new campaign for the 18th District. We need to raise $25,000 in the next 24 hours. Can I count on you?
DONATE $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em]
In the fight,
Congressman Al Green
Stand with Cong. Al Green! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251025txftbackeml [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251025txftbackeml]
RSVP for NOV 8th HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/shamiandfriends2025]

Keep Al Green in Congress Campaign

clean_body: [] Friend, Today, I officially filed the paperwork to run for Congress in the 18th Congressional District. I want to be perfectly clear about what is happening: I am not moving. The district was moved on me. In a corrupt, racist power grab, Donald Trump and Greg Abbott gerrymandered my 9th District to try to silence my voice. They thought they could erase our community. They failed. Their new, illegal map has placed my home of more than 25 years—and 75% of the constituents I represent right now—directly into the new 18th Congressional District. They didn't stop our movement; they just gave us a new district number. This campaign starts today. We must send an immediate, powerful message that we are funded, we are organized, and we are ready to win this primary and continue our fight against the authoritarians who fear our voice. Our Day 1 starts now . I am asking you to be a Day 1 Founding Donor to our new campaign for the 18th District. We need to raise $25,000 in the next 24 hours. Can I count on you? DONATE $25 NOW [] In the fight, Congressman Al Green Stand with Cong. Al Green! name: Sarah McBride
subject: My personal reflections on this week’s elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
When we collectively choose hope over hate, politics can move our nation forward.
#
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251108-1.eudyX4&amount=5&%3Brefcode=em20251108-2485&t=1&akid=2485%2E21716%2EDQEa-L)
I often tell people: hope isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And this week’s elections reminded me why.
After nearly a year of chaos and cruelty from the Trump administration and the continued dysfunction we see in Congress, it’s tempting to believe that nothing will change. **But what we saw Tuesday night proves otherwise.**
We were reminded that when we collectively choose hope over hate, politics can move our nation forward.
That glimmer of light is what helped me when I was a kid going through my own crisis of hope — when I was so afraid that the heart of this country wasn’t big enough to love someone like me.
But in that darkness, I found that politics — at its best — is where we can come together to make life a little fairer and a little kinder for one another.
**And that’s what keeps me going. Because time and time again, I’ve seen what happens when we don’t give up on one another.**
When Delaware chose hope, we made history together. We passed paid family and medical leave. We protected reproductive freedom. And we elected leaders who reflect the full promise of our democracy _— including my own election as the first openly trans person ever elected to Congress one year ago this month_.
**Hope isn’t blind optimism. It’s work. It’s showing up. It’s believing that persuasion and progress are still possible if we stay persistent and intentional.**
[**So today, I’m asking you to stand with me — by chipping in $5 or anything you can — to help us continue talking to voters across the country, winning conversations, and winning hearts and minds. Because that’s how we restore faith in what’s possible and build a country that truly works for all of us.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251108-1.eudyX4&refcode=em20251108-2485&amount=5&t=2&akid=2485%2E21716%2EDQEa-L)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251108-1.eudyX4&amount=5&refcode=em20251108-2485&t=21&akid=2485%2E21716%2EDQEa-L)**
Thank you,
— Sarah
* * *

name: Team Schiff
subject: Will you pitch in to help Adam secure a blue House and Senate next year?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Adam is supporting Senators in tough reelections, connecting with voters in swing districts in California, and championing the progress Democrats have made.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9164%2E5257348%2ELv5knx)
Derek — We know it’s hard to believe, but we have less than one year until next year's midterm elections.
Time will fly, and we need to make the most of EVERY opportunity to flip the House and the Senate next year.
The results this week showed what is possible when we campaign on what voters care about most, like bringing costs down, being able to live in a safe community, and sending their kids to a good school.
And that’s what Adam is working on. Supporting Senators in tough reelections, connecting with voters in swing districts in California, and championing the progress Democrats have made. **[Will you pitch in to help him secure a blue House and Senate next year?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251108_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=9164%2E5257348%2ELv5knx)**

This is important because we know that we can’t trust Republicans in Washington to hold Trump accountable. Their reckless tariffs have driven up costs for everyone. And they will roll over and do whatever Trump asks of them. Our only option is to defeat them at the ballot box and elect people who will actually do their jobs.
That’s how we prevent another unnecessary government shutdown. That’s how we protect Americans’ access to affordable healthcare and lower costs. It’s how we move forward as a country from this nightmare of the Trump administration.
Pitch in now: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/q42025_abs_em?refcode=PITCH-IN](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251108_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=9164%2E5257348%2ELv5knx)**

name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: What if we told you that just $5 can help power the final five months of our campaign to elect Judge Chris Taylor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Right-wing special interests are gearing up to spend millions to try and buy a seat on Wisconsin’s highest court.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251108-795&t=1&akid=799%2E294397%2ESrX9j8)
Folks,
What if we told you that just $5 can help power the final five months of our campaign to elect Judge Chris Taylor?
It’s true.
Right-wing special interests are gearing up to spend millions to try and buy a seat on Wisconsin’s highest court. **But their money can’t match the strength of thousands of grassroots supporters coming together — people like you.**
When you chip in $5, you’re helping reach more voters across Wisconsin and fight back against the flood of dark money headed our way.
That’s how we build a people-powered campaign strong enough to protect reproductive healthcare access, workers’ rights, and a fair, independent court for everyone.
With just five months left until Election Day, every single dollar makes a difference.
[**Will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help us win this race?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/146?c0=em_ms_jct_20251108_1_ak.zQegR8&refcode=em20251108-795&t=3&akid=799%2E294397%2ESrX9j8)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/146?c0=em_ms_jct_20251108_1_ak.zQegR8&refcode=em20251108-795&t=22&akid=799%2E294397%2ESrX9j8)**
Thank you,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251108-795&t=23&refcode2=799_294397_SrX9j8&akid=799%2E294397%2ESrX9j8)**

Madison, WI 53701

name: Veronica Escobar
subject: The Work Ahead: I'm Running for Reelection!
body:
Serving our community in Congress has been the greatest honor of my life, and together we’ve proven what’s possible when we put people first and strive for our better angels.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118932039/581364928/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTA5Yjk5My1lZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YDE6NNgwp7VLGceOb0O-9XqOUf3vX1x4R3SJqnRG7EM=&emci=b93c3168-edbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=8909b993-edbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=14565883)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, Today, I’m proud to share that I’ve officially filed for **re-election in the 2026 midterm** , and I’m ready to continue fighting for El Paso’s future. Serving our community in Congress has been the greatest honor of my life, and together we’ve proven what’s possible when we put people first and strive for our better angels. **What We’ve Achieved - Together** Over the past few years, we’ve:
* **Brought home _billions_ in federal investments **to strengthen our community - from clean water projects and infrastructure upgrades to new public safety, mental health, and job-training initiatives.
* **Fought for border communities** with a vision rooted in dignity, fairness, and security.
* **Defended our democracy and families** by championing gun safety reforms, reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights and dignity, and access to affordable health care.
* **Invested in opportunity -** from education and workforce training to support for small businesses and veterans.

Every win belongs to the people of El Paso, and every dollar we’ve secured means safer neighborhoods, cleaner water, and stronger futures for our kids.

**The Work Ahead** There’s more to do. I’m running for re-election to:
* Finish the job on **comprehensive immigration reform** that reflects our values.
* Continue delivering **federal funding** to modernize our infrastructure, create good-paying jobs, and build climate resilience.**
* Keep fighting for **gun violence prevention, affordable health care, and equal opportunity** for all.**
* **Continue to stand up for those under attack** by this administration: women, immigrants, and the LGBTQ+ community
* **Preserve our democracy** in the face of authoritarianism.**

El Paso’s story is one of resilience, compassion, and courage, and I believe our best chapters are still ahead. **Join Our Movement** This campaign is about _us_ \- our community, our values, our shared future. We’ve never lived through a more challenging time, we’ve never faced such dangerous opposition, and we’ve never had to fight for fundamental rights like we have fought this year. My campaign, the work of resistance to fascism, the fight for all that is dear - all of this is more important than ever. We need you, and I’d love for you to join us! _**Get involved:**_ Volunteer, host an event, or make a grassroots donation ([to my campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118932040/581364929/2048946422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTA5Yjk5My1lZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YDE6NNgwp7VLGceOb0O-9XqOUf3vX1x4R3SJqnRG7EM=) or any [local food bank](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118932041/581364930/693753794?svcid=renxt&formId=321e766f-22b1-4a1f-8ce2-e5d1de448457&envid=p-3Zy64CNsVEuX9r4zywnbRQ&zone=usa&fbclid=IwY2xjawN8T0VleHRuA2FlbQIxMABicmlkETFWUTRlcHFFbTM2bExRVDJUc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHlPR7aCLltgrUW_UsEX1uQZeelSjTJ0C5yKsWQhoJe_sr5B50SEh8IMyftOe_aem_1oxpDhMxcaCIcTSZyUEjjg&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTA5Yjk5My1lZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YDE6NNgwp7VLGceOb0O-9XqOUf3vX1x4R3SJqnRG7EM=&emci=b93c3168-edbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=8909b993-edbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=14565883)).
_**Stay connected:**_ Follow our campaign on Facebook, Instagram, Bluesky, or Threads, or at [**veronicaescobar.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118932042/581364931/-1405467182?utm_source=chatgpt.com&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTA5Yjk5My1lZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YDE6NNgwp7VLGceOb0O-9XqOUf3vX1x4R3SJqnRG7EM=&emci=b93c3168-edbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=8909b993-edbc-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&ceid=14565883) for updates and upcoming events.
_**Make your voice heard:**_ Encourage your friends and neighbors to register, vote, and stay engaged. With your energy, your stories, and your support, we’ll keep building a stronger, fairer, more compassionate El Paso for all of us, and for generations to come.

name: Crow HQ
subject: Jason’s always gone where the fight is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Flipping just a few seats will help us win back the House. |
#
---
Folks, As a former Army Ranger, Jason will never forget the importance of servant leadership as he works to bring Colorado values to Congress. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118932049/581364967/1937676057?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251108_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBlODNmZi1lZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KO_ONkfUqY2auS2ug3VaSFJDj8BO9eXfV2JM0PRGqYg=) Jason has always gone where the fight is. No matter how tough. When he served as an Army Captain, he never forgot where he came from: he was always the last to eat and the first to jump out of a plane. When a five-term GOP congressman shamefully avoided passing gun safety legislation (and instead took money from the NRA), Jason refused to let that slide. He flipped the seat blue for the first time since its creation and helped take back the House majority in 2018. And when Republicans didn’t have the courage to hold Donald Trump accountable, Jason stepped up. He served as an impeachment manager for Trump’s first trial and exposed the truth directly to the American people. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118932050/581364968/1937676057?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251108_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjBlODNmZi1lZGJjLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDIyNDgyM2ZmOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KO_ONkfUqY2auS2ug3VaSFJDj8BO9eXfV2JM0PRGqYg=) Now, less than one year away from 2026 midterm elections, the fight to deliver servant leadership in Washington has never been more important. We’re up against an administration and GOP House majority that openly places the wealthiest few over the needs of working American people. **Here’s Jason’s mission for the next 12 months: We need to bring more servant leaders to Congress who won’t back down from fighting for what’s right.** **[Flipping just a few seats will help us win back the House, and we have a real chance at winning if we build a big enough movement. clean_body: Flipping just a few seats will help us win back the House. | Folks, As a former Army Ranger, Jason will never forget the importance of servant leadership as he works to bring Colorado values to Congress. = Jason has always gone where the fight is. No matter how tough. When he served as an Army Captain, he never forgot where he came from: he was always the last to eat and the first to jump out of a plane. When a five-term GOP congressman shamefully avoided passing gun safety legislation (and instead took money from the NRA), Jason refused to let that slide. He flipped the seat blue for the first time since its creation and helped take back the House majority in 2018. And when Republicans didn’t have the courage to hold Donald Trump accountable, Jason stepped up. He served as an impeachment manager for Trump’s first trial and exposed the truth directly to the American people. = Now, less than one year away from 2026 midterm elections, the fight to deliver servant leadership in Washington has never been more important. We’re up against an administration and GOP House majority that openly places the wealthiest few over the needs of working American people. Here’s Jason’s mission for the next 12 months: We need to bring more servant leaders to Congress who won’t back down from fighting for what’s right. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you! — Team Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. clean_body: Will you please complete the 2025 Voter Verification Audit AS SOON AS POSSIBLE? | Fellow American, Senate Republicans are hard at work, advancing President Trump's America First Agenda, but there's something important we still need from you. We haven't been able to locate your response to the , and we're starting to get worried. This is critical for ensuring we have the accurate, up-to-date information needed to protect our Senate majority and continue advancing President Trump's America First Agenda. 2025 VOTER VERIFICATION AUDIT Patriot ID: Zip Code: Email: Response Sent: Thank you, - Senator Katie Britt If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Tony Johnson
subject: The fight against Antifa just got real
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/2a422f13c3734434b18b241f4fe44c1b-ada5b11120b04cfaaf1ac47aa07001f2/63)
---
| |

---
|

---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

Enough is enough. I’m glad to see the Trump administration is taking action to combat the rising tide of left-wing violence in America.

After years of witnessing Antifa members incite and commit violence against innocent people, attack law enforcement officials, and torch federal and private property, President Trump officially designated Antifa as a domestic terrorist organization.

This is a move The Heritage Foundation’s scholars have promoted since 2019. It will prioritize attention and federal resources on Antifa and provide tools for stopping the funding that allows Antifa to operate.

Antifa is not just “a set of ideas.” It is an organization with a logo, trained activists, funding, and uses pre-made signs and pre-gathered vehicles, gear, and projectiles.

This is a great first step. But there is even more President Trump can do to protect Americans from leftist violence.

The Heritage Foundation is urging the FBI to designate Transgender Ideology-Inspired Violent Extremism (TIVE) as domestic terrorism, following a string of attacks by trans or trans-supporting criminals.

Especially in the aftermath of the Charlie Kirk assassination, this action is long overdue.

If you want to help erase the threat of Antifa, please consider activating your Heritage Foundation membership today.

Your tax-deductible gift will help create and promote public policies that will help defeat the threat of violence from Antifa and transgender extremism.

**It just takes a moment. Click the secure link below to activate your membership today:**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/activate-2/**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/2a422f13c3734434b18b241f4fe44c1b-ada5b11120b04cfaaf1ac47aa07001f2/63)

Thank you for your dedication to protecting our country.

Best,

Tony Johnson
Director of Membership

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

---

---

DCDailyJournal.com

[Click Here to Unsubscribe Or Report as Spam](https://paramountcomm.app.optipub.com/messages/opt-outs/2a422f13c3734434b18b241f4fe44c1b?op-notrack)

This is the whole reason behind President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order. After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular _._ He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day. **It's worth noting that Trump himself has used mail-in ballots to vote** , most recently in an election in his now-home state of Florida.This isn't about safety or security. **It's a blatantly partisan exercise to suppress the vote and make it harder for you to have your voice heard in our elections.** It's about their anti-democratic authoritarian desires and need for total control. **[Team, we're fighting every day to protect vote-by-mail and increase participation in our elections. | | We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, **making it easier for voters to participate in our elections**. Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. **Mail-in voting has been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic.** There's no good faith reason to get rid of it. **[Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. clean_body: @JeffMerkley: Why does Trump want to ban Vote by Mail? Because it blocks Election Day interference: closing polling places, long lines, voter suppression. Vote by Mail is the best tool we have to put power where it belongs—in the hands of the people. I'll fight like hell to protect it.| | | | | This is the whole ball game, Team: = This is the whole reason behind President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order. After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular . He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day. It's worth noting that Trump himself has used mail-in ballots to vote , most recently in an election in his now-home state of Florida.This isn't about safety or security. It's a blatantly partisan exercise to suppress the vote and make it harder for you to have your voice heard in our elections. It's about their anti-democratic authoritarian desires and need for total control. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | | We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections. Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. Mail-in voting has been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic. There's no good faith reason to get rid of it. = | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. name: Deb Haaland
subject: Emergency goal update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
We're short.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5573%2E400544%2EEqNSEn)
I wanted to make sure you saw this:
**A NEW Republican opponent just launched their campaign to defeat us and turn New Mexico red.**
New Mexico needs a fighter in the governor’s office. Someone who is fierce and who won’t forget who she’s fighting for — not a rubber stamp for Trump’s cruel agenda.
But the GOP field is growing, and very soon, right-wing megadonors will start flooding this state with cash and TV ads to buy this race.
**That’s why our campaign set an emergency goal to raise $25,000 by midnight tonight to help us respond. Right now, we’re still $12,000 short.**
**[Can you chip in a $5 donation to help us reach our goal? My team and I will be closely monitoring our fundraising in the hope we see a surge of online donations before midnight.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251108_1_opponent.L16Um1&amount=5&refcode=em20251108-5573&t=2&akid=5573%2E400544%2EEqNSEn)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251108_1_opponent.L16Um1&amount=5&refcode=em20251108-5573&t=21&akid=5573%2E400544%2EEqNSEn)**
Thank you for having my back,
Deb
P.S. I know the Republican shutdown is impacting tens of thousands of New Mexicans and folks across the country. If you’re not able to donate today, I completely understand. My team and I appreciate your support!
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251108-1&t=22&refcode2=5573_400544_EqNSEn&akid=5573%2E400544%2EEqNSEn)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=23&akid=5573%2E400544%2EEqNSEn)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=24&akid=5573%2E400544%2EEqNSEn)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Help me stand up for students and educators
body:
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=38%2E124072%2E-U1pEq)
Hello Peter — From first grade through law school, I attended public schools right here in North Carolina. My mom was a public school teacher, and during my time in public schools, I was privileged to have teachers who cared about me, a family that supported me, and a broader community committed to providing an excellent public education for which I remain grateful. **My NC public school education put me on the path that has brought me here.** As a new school year gets underway, I want us all to bear in mind that our nation’s future leaders are learning in public schools today. Every student in every classroom across our country deserves the same opportunities that I had. **[I am making an urgent appeal today for you to stand with me in support of public education, Peter. It’s a bedrock of our society and a promise to future generations — but it is under attack. Will you add your name to oppose extreme GOP cuts to public education?](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/public-education-pet/?t=6&akid=38%2E124072%2E-U1pEq)** | [SIGN ON](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/public-education-pet/?t=7&akid=38%2E124072%2E-U1pEq)
---
The federal government’s policies of slashing education funding, cutting school lunches, and otherwise undermining education are sowing chaos across the country, and they will harm students here in North Carolina and beyond.
I’m concerned for students who rely on Individualized Education Programs (IEPs) or other special education services. I worry for districts where far-right school voucher scams for the wealthy are siphoning resources away from the students most in need. And I am deeply troubled by the prospect of further cuts to come.
**[Join me and defend public schools, educators, and students. Add your name to my petition opposing far-right cuts to public education.](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/public-education-pet/?t=8&akid=38%2E124072%2E-U1pEq)**
[SIGN ON](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/public-education-pet/?t=9&akid=38%2E124072%2E-U1pEq)
---
Thank you for speaking out,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/public-education-pet/?t=10&akid=38%2E124072%2E-U1pEq)
P.S. Public schools shaped me. I know the same is true for many of you, and if you are willing, I hope you will share a story of how public education has impacted you or your loved ones. **[You can share your thoughts when you add your name to our petition here.](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/public-education-pet/?t=11&akid=38%2E124072%2E-U1pEq)**
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=38%2E124072%2E-U1pEq)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=38%2E124072%2E-U1pEq)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=38%2E124072%2E-U1pEq)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=38%2E124072%2E-U1pEq)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=38%2E124072%2E-U1pEq)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=12&akid=38%2E124072%2E-U1pEq)

_Everything about him runs counter to America First_.

**The fact that he WON in arguably America's greatest city proves that, while we won Congress and the White House,_the fight for the heart, soul, and future of America still rages on_.**

We’re carrying on Charlie’s fight to ensure that radical socialists like Mamdani do NOT gain power in other cities, counties, and states across the country.

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Jon Ossoff for Georgia
subject: Jon is MAGA’s #1 target
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

**_Troops in our cities...
Masked federal agents all over the place...
Political prosecutions and corruption out of control..._**
Peter, we know that reading the news can feel like the Republic is falling apart.
But here is the truth behind why Donald Trump and his administration are pushing politically-motivated prosecutions of his enemies and forcing major media companies to bend the knee:
Donald Trump wants the whole country to fear him. _Because fear is the currency of tyranny._
_He wants us all so afraid of retribution, of investigation, of destruction that we won’t speak up against him._
That’s why he’s sending masked federal agents to terrorize regular working people, why he’s enlisting intelligence contractors to harvest our data and profile us, and why he’s _doubling down_ on undermining our elections.
**This descent into an un-American America must be stopped._We must regain Congressional power and hold Trump accountable._**
**And that means we MUST win in Georgia.**
Jon Ossoff is the ONLY Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won. That means he’s MAGA’s #1 target for defeat. They know if they win in Georgia, they hold the Senate.
**Help us beat them again, just like we did in 2021.**
**[Please, make a contribution to Jon’s reelection campaign today.](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251108-1-f-b&t=1&akid=1060%2E5691347%2EgbwhuM)**
Thank you!
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=2&akid=1060%2E5691347%2EgbwhuM) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1060%2E5691347%2EgbwhuM) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Janet Mills
subject: Here's why I’m running to defeat Susan Collins:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1300%2E49239%2EY80xCi)
| | |
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8037?t=2&akid=1300%2E49239%2EY80xCi)
null, I didn’t plan to run for Senate. But I could _never_ live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stop Donald Trump’s far-right takeover.
Trump is putting Maine, our country, and our democracy in danger every _single day,_ and Susan Collins isn’t doing a thing about it.
**So I’ve officially announced my Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins. MAGA donors will spend millions to protect this seat and their majority.[Will you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign right now to help me win in Maine and flip the Senate blue? >> ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8038?t=3&akid=1300%2E49239%2EY80xCi)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8037?t=4&akid=1300%2E49239%2EY80xCi)
---
null, I’m running because I love Maine with everything I’ve got.
My family has called this great state home for eight generations. It's where my late husband and I raised our five daughters. And it’s where I’ve broken barriers as the first woman District Attorney, the first woman Attorney General, and now as the first woman Governor.
I’ve fought – and won – a lot of battles to protect our health care, to protect access to abortion, to take on drug companies that fueled the opioid crisis, and to defend our state from Trump. I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished.
But I can’t sit on the sidelines while Donald Trump is hurting Maine families and driving our democracy into the ground. **Frankly, I could never live with myself if I didn’t do everything in my power to stand up for the people and state I love.**
_And null, I'm the only Maine Democrat to win a statewide election in the last 20 years.
_
So I’m running. And I’m going to fight like hell for Maine and for you.
This could easily be the most expensive Senate race in the country. The path to flipping the Senate majority for Democrats runs straight through Maine. Unless we win this race, Donald Trump could have two more years to enact his lawless agenda.
**[Please, help me prove to Donald Trump and Susan Collins the power of this campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign – whether it’s $100 or $1, I need you in this fight with me.>> ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8037?t=5&akid=1300%2E49239%2EY80xCi)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Janet Mills and Haley Stevens will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8039?t=6&akid=1300%2E49239%2EY80xCi)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8040?t=7&akid=1300%2E49239%2EY80xCi)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8041?t=8&akid=1300%2E49239%2EY80xCi)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8037?t=9&akid=1300%2E49239%2EY80xCi)
---
Let’s win this thing.

– Janet Mills
Governor of Maine
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8042?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1300%2E49239%2EY80xCi) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8043?t=11&akid=1300%2E49239%2EY80xCi)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
